Name: SIVA
Description:
A SIVA - Sociedade de Importação de Veículos Automóveis, SA - atualmente integra a Porsche Holding Salzburg (PHS), o maior Distribuidor Automóvel Europeu. Importa e distribui, em Portugal as marcas do Grupo Volkswagen, Volkswagen, Audi, Skoda, e Volkswagen Veículos Comerciais, assim como a Bentley e Lamborghini. 
A SIVA foi constituída em Agosto de 1987. No primeiro ano completo de atividade, que coincidiu com a liberalização das importações de veículos provenientes da EU, a SIVA vendeu mais de 16 000 viaturas. Desde então, já colocou no mercado português perto de 900 000 carros novos. 
Às áreas da Importação e Distribuição de Veículos, Peças e Acessórios foi-se juntando uma oferta global e completa de serviços conexos com o automóvel, uma estratégia que permitiu responder com sucesso às crescentes exigências e sofisticação e fidelização dos Clientes e reforçando a parceria com o Grupo Volkswagen e Redes de Concessionários. 
Em Outubro de 2019, a SIVA passou a integrar a PHS, subsidiária do Grupo Volkswagen, a qual opera em 29 países da Europa, América Latina e Asia, vendeu em 2018 perto de 750 000 automóveis novos, e conta com 30 900 Colaboradores.

Name: WORLDPAC
Description:
WORLDPAC was formed in 1995 as a result of several acquisitions of the top tier import companies spanning over 30 years of service in the import aftermarket. WORLDPAC imports and distributes original equipment (OE) and quality aftermarket replacement automotive parts for the independent service professional. We offer more than 110,000 part numbers at one source for 41 import and domestic carlines. Our exclusive online catalog and fulfillment ordering software (speedDIAL) contains more than 7 million import and domestic multiple brand applications for virtually every automotive make and model.

WORLDPAC imports parts directly from the most respected OE manufacturers in the automotive industry. Sourcing the original parts from the original manufacturers ensures the precise fit and easy installation the first time, as well as the quality that maintains the integrity of the vehicle. To enhance our OEM import and domestic product offering, we also provide products from the highest quality aftermarket suppliers. The fact is, by the time new cars hit the road, replacement parts are in our system, ready for you to source.

Leveraging the organization and efficiencies of our 100+ strategically located facilities is the backbone of our commitment to delivering the right part at the right time. Utilizing sophisticated automation and software systems, most orders are processed within a few minutes to ensure consistent and timely deliveries.

Description:

Name: Grupo Automec
Description:
Grupo Automec – 75 anos de história, inovação e excelência
Fundado em 1949 por João Peres como Auto Mecânica Sorocaba, o Grupo Automec construiu uma trajetória marcada pelo crescimento contínuo e pela busca incessante pela excelência. Nos anos 1950, expandimos nossas operações para a venda de carros importados e conquistamos a exclusividade na revenda dos caminhões Studebaker. Já na década de 1960, nos tornamos concessionária da marca DKW-Vemag e importadores de tratores Massey Ferguson. Em abril de 1962, demos um passo fundamental ao sermos nomeados Concessionária Chevrolet para Sorocaba e região.

Nossa jornada de sucesso é impulsionada pelo compromisso em oferecer soluções completas no setor automotivo. Hoje, atuamos na venda de veículos novos e seminovos, peças, acessórios, serviços mecânicos, funilaria e pintura, além de seguros, gestão de frotas e locação de veículos. Sempre com um propósito claro: proporcionar negócios confiáveis e uma experiência excepcional para clientes e parceiros.

A Paixão por Excelência nos move! Investimos constantemente no desenvolvimento técnico e profissional de nossas equipes, garantindo inovação, alta performance e um atendimento diferenciado. Nossa cultura organizacional está em evolução contínua, valorizando o potencial humano e promovendo a integração entre vida pessoal e profissional.

Mais do que um grupo empresarial, somos um ecossistema de pessoas comprometidas com a inovação, a qualidade e o respeito. Nosso legado nos fortalece, mas é o futuro que nos inspira. Seguimos prontos para os desafios e as oportunidades que estão por vir, com um único objetivo: transformar cada experiência com a Automec em sinônimo de confiança, tranquilidade e excelência.

 Junte-se a nós – como parceiro de negócios, cliente ou colaborador – e descubra como nossa história pode fazer a diferença na sua jornada!

Nossa Missão
- Desenvolver nossas atividades preservando a segurança de todos
- Promover a excelência no atendimento e o bem estar aos clientes, com transparência, responsabilidade social, respeito as pessoas e ao meio ambiente
- Criar mudanças e adaptar-se rapidamente às inovações

Nossa Visão
- Ser referência no mercado em que atuamos
- Adaptar-se as mudanças e as tecnologias que estão por vir de maneira inovadora, oferecendo aos clientes e a sociedade um valor agregado único que só pode vir da Toyota Tsusho

Nossos Valores
- Excelência: Superar as expectativas
- Ética: Honrar os princípios da sociedade
- Desafio: Superar o impossível
- Respeito: Tratar as pessoas como a si mesmo

Name: CENTRAL TRADING COMPANY
Description:
Central Trading Company was established in 1957 and is the first company under the Al Rostamani Group. CTC prides itself on its long-term business partnerships; its customer-focused strategies and wide distribution network.

Global brands such as Michelin, Castrol and Blue Star are part of its portfolio of 25 brands. The company’s strength is a step ahead in the game due to the goodwill it shares with its dealers and customers, built through dedicated and trusted service over a span of 65 years. CTC’s dynamic management has always fueled its appetite to identify new opportunities while continuing to innovate, grow and improve existing business.

CTC has its head office in Dubai and branches in Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ras Al Khaimah and Fujairah, proudly reaching out and serving more than 3500 clients. It’s warehouse facilities in Al Quoz Industrial Area as well as in Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ras Al Khaimah and Fujairah are headed and supported by efficient manpower and state of the art equipment to satisfy customer needs.

CTC is honored to be one of the most valuable players in the automotive aftermarket today while continuing to strengthen the vision laid at the time of the founding. CTC aims to provide you with nothing but the best.

Name: Suzuki Motor USA, LLC
Description:
Anybody can drive. To ride, you need passion.

It’s that favorite road where you know the pavement like a good friend. The wild stretch of woods that begs you to wander and explore. Or the call of the racetrack that has you up early on the weekends. At Suzuki, we build motorcycles and ATVs because we share your same enthusiasm to get out and go. For us, it’s a Way of Life.

ATV riders will dig the tough and reliable KingQuad family. Why? Because it’s not just an ATV, it’s a KingQuad ATV. Sportbike riders will be thrilled to climb aboard The King of Sportbikes, the iconic GSX-R1000, while those longing for the ultimate sportbike can swing a leg over the legendary Hayabusa. For fun and adventure on any type of road, hop on a Suzuki DualSport or V-Strom. Families can enjoy the outdoors together riding our youth-oriented off-road motorcycles and ATVs.

We know you share the same passion for powersports as we do at Suzuki. Whether you are an experienced riding enthusiast or a beginning rider, we're certain you'll find something exciting and new about Suzuki products. With a broad range of motorcycles and ATVs in our lineup, we're confident that there’s a Suzuki for you!
 
Our commitment to you:

Suzuki Motor USA, LLC (Suzuki) has built a reputation that requires ethical business practices and high levels of integrity in all of its business transactions. At Suzuki, our ethical standards are more than words; they reflect who we are and how we conduct business on a day-to-day basis. Suzuki is committed to fostering an environment where integrity is valued. This includes all of our business relationships with customers, suppliers, business associates, and our employees.

Name: Viscaal Fahrzeuggroßhandel GmbH - EU Neuwagen - EU Fahrzeuge - Autohandel

Wir, das Team von Viscaal, beschäftigen uns seit vielen Jahren tagtäglich mit dem Kauf und Weiterverkauf von Fahrzeugen / Autos aus den verschiedensten europäischen Ländern. Name: Gonar Automotores S.A. Concesionario Oficial Scania Argentina
Description:
Gonar Automotores S.A. es un concesionario oficial de Scania Argentina, con una sólida trayectoria en el mercado desde su fundación en 1978. 
Como representantes de la marca Scania en 8 provincias, hemos crecido y evolucionado a lo largo de tres generaciones.

Contamos con 4 sucursales estratégicamente ubicadas en nuestro territorio, donde ofrecemos soluciones integrales en ventas, servicio postventa y repuestos para unidades. 
Nos enorgullece tener un equipo de trabajo altamente capacitado y comprometido, quienes reciben formación  continua para mantenerse al día con las últimas innovaciones y técnicas de la marca.

Con una visión de futuro centrada en la modernización y sostenibilidad, en Gonar Automotores S.A. implementamos estrategias continuas para mejorar el clima laboral y promover un ambiente de trabajo saludable y productivo. Creemos firmemente que un entorno de trabajo positivo es clave para el crecimiento de la empresa y el bienestar de nuestros empleados, quienes son la base de nuestro éxito.

Con un enfoque en el crecimiento y modernización, tanto en términos de infraestructura como en la adopción de tecnologías sostenibles. Estamos desarrollando iniciativas para modernizar nuestras instalaciones, asegurando que estén alineadas con las tendencias más innovadoras de la marca. Esto nos permite no solo ofrecer un servicio de alta calidad a nuestros clientes, sino también operar de manera eficiente y responsable con el medio ambiente.

Con nuestro compromiso hacia la innovación y la mejora continua, seguimos trabajando para ser un referente en el sector.

Name: Parts Panel
Description:
Who We Are:
Founded in Saskatchewan over 20 years ago, Parts Panel is your all-in-one auto parts store, catering to a diverse range of vehicles. With a network of suppliers and sourcing points, we offer new and used OEM auto parts, alongside new aftermarket options.

Expanding to Ontario to better serve our Canadian customers, we also supply international markets seeking quality auto parts. Our newly launched website enhances our digital presence, ensuring a seamless customer experience. With 5 locations across Canada, we're poised for continued growth.

Our Mission:
At Parts Panel, we're committed to customer satisfaction and continuously improving our service. Our dedicated quality assurance team ensures we deliver the most reliable auto parts. Since 2020, our research team has focused on sustainability, enhancing our enduring procurement policy.

To stay competitive, we specialize in late-model and high-demand auto parts, including premium late-model truck and European brand components, all offered at affordable prices. Our passion for cars and commitment to customer satisfaction forge lasting relationships with clients who trust us with their vehicle needs.

Name: Anchieta Motos Premium
Description:
Bem-vindo à Anchieta Motos Premium, a pioneira em vendas online de veículos.

Aqui somos mais que uma empresa; somos uma equipe de 28 colaboradores dedicados, unidos por nossa paixão por motocicletas e comprometidos em proporcionar a excelência em cada aspecto de nossos serviços. Desde a manutenção até o transporte de nossas motocicletas, cada membro de nossa equipe desempenha um papel vital na entrega de qualidade.

Nosso ambiente de trabalho é dinâmico, repleto de energia positiva e recheado de desafios estimulantes. Se você é alguém que abraça desafios e busca a excelência em cada tarefa, então a Anchieta é o seu lugar. Acreditamos que é nos desafios que encontramos oportunidades de crescimento, e é com energia que corremos atrás de nossas metas.

Nossa missão vai além de vender motocicletas. Queremos transformar a vida de nossos clientes, potencializando sonhos por meio da excelência no atendimento e de uma entrega empática. Estamos empenhados em proporcionar uma experiência única, onde cada interação com nossos clientes seja marcada pela qualidade, dedicação e comprometimento em superar expectativas.

Ao integrar-se conosco, você não apenas faz parte de uma empresa líder no setor, mas também se junta a uma comunidade que valoriza a inovação, a paixão pelo cliente e a busca incessante pela excelência.

Name: TurkAuto Motorlu Araçlar
Description:
TurkAuto olarak Bursa’nın eşsiz doğasından aldığımız ilhamla, kurulduğumuz 1967 yılından bugüne uzman kadromuz ve yenilikçi çözümlerimizle ticari araç yedek parçalarında kalite ve güveni ortak paydada buluşturmaya devam ediyoruz.
Global tedarik ağımız ile lider yedek parça markalarını vitrinimize çıkarırken, yarım asrı aşkın tecrübemiz, ürün gamımız, güçlü stok yapımız ve özel projelerimizle sektör paydaşlarımıza sadece ürün değil, uzun vadeli iş ortaklığı sunuyoruz.
Her yolculuğu daha güvenli, verimli ve sürdürülebilir kılmak misyonuyla başlayan hikâyemizi “global bir marka olma” hedefiyle sürdürüyoruz.

***

As TurkAuto, inspired by the unique nature of Bursa, we have been blending quality and trust in commercial vehicle spare parts since our establishment in 1967. With our expert team and innovative solutions, we continue to bring leading spare parts brands to our customers.
While showcasing leading spare parts brands through our global supply network, we provide our industry stakeholders not only with products but also with long-term partnerships, supported by over half a century of experience, a broad product range, strong inventory, and specialized projects.
We continue our journey, which began with the mission to make every journey safer, more efficient, and sustainable, with the goal of becoming a global brand.

Name: AUTOPLUS Reifen
Description:
Die AUTOPLUS Reifen GmbH betreut als Teil der Wolfgang Denzel Auto AG rund 2.500 Reifenhändler, Autohäuser und freie Werkstätten am österreichischen Markt. Die Angebotspalette reicht vom Verkauf von Reifen, über die Entwicklung und Bereitstellung von Dienstleistungen (Finanzierung, erweiterte Garantien, EASY LIFE Komfort Schutz-Paket, etc.) bis hin zur kompetenten Beratung im Innen- und Außendienst. Wir verstehen uns als internationaler Importeur und Großhändler für Reifen und Alufelgen. Neben Firmen, die ihre Flotten ausrüsten möchten, beraten wir auch Privatkund:Innen und vermitteln im Anschluss die Geschäfte an unsere Händler Partner weiter. Wir sind stolz, mit 21 Mitarbeiter:Innen seit 1989 in Kooperation gemeinsam mit unseren zahlreichen Handelspartnern auf dem so spannenden Reifenmarkt zu bestehen.

Vorteile für Handelspartner
Als Händlerpartner profitieren Sie von starken Marken, Top-Gewinnspannen, einem professionellen Innen- und Außendienst, ausgezeichneter Lieferfähigkeit auch in der Hauptsaison und dem einzigartigen Nachtsprung-Lieferservice. Wir unterstützen Sie mit verkaufsfördernden Angeboten wie erweiterten Garantien, dem Easy Life Komfort Schutz-Paket, attraktiven Social Media Aktivitäten, moderner Flottenabrechnung sowie www.meinereifen.at, der für Sie kostenlosen Vermittlungsplattform zwischen Händlern und Endverbraucher:Innen. Meine Reifen dient also als Vermarktungsplattform und Kundenbindungstool.

Vorteile für Endverbraucher:Innen
Wir bieten fachkompetente Hilfe bei der Reifen-Suche. Auf der Vermittlungsplattform www.meinereifen.at finden Sie große Marken zu kleinen Preisen, mit bis zu 5 Jahren Garantie, 600 freundliche Händler und jede Menge attraktive Beigaben. Auto Plus Reifen bietet ein umfassendes Angebot und für jede Ihrer persönlichen Anforderungen den richtigen Reifen.

www.autoplus-reifen.at/impressum

Name: Bijnens Automotive
Description:
Bijnens Automotive : Specialist in Kwalitatieve Tweedehandswagens

Bij Bijnens Automotive kunt u rekenen op kwalitatieve tweedehandswagens die volledig nagekeken en in topconditie zijn. Wij hebben een passie voor auto's en zorgen ervoor dat elke wagen die wij aanbieden voldoet aan de hoogste standaarden van betrouwbaarheid en veiligheid.

Wat maakt Bijnens Automotive uniek?

Kwaliteit: Alle voertuigen worden grondig geïnspecteerd en nagekeken.

Betrouwbaarheid: Wij verkopen enkel auto's die wij zelf vertrouwen en die in topvorm zijn.

Name: Atli Otomotiv
Description:
Atlı Otomotiv bir aile şirketi olarak 1986 yılında kurulmuş olup günümüzde Türkiye’deki en büyük kamyon lastiği satışı, servisi ve kamyon lastiği kaplama firmasıdır. Eversafe Rubber, Marangoni ve İnci Akü distribütörüdür ve 2022 yılında Opet ve Petrol Ofisi bayilikleri ile perakende ve toptan akaryakıt satışı şirket faaliyetlerine eklenmiştir.

Atli Otomotiv has been established in 1986 as a family company. Today, it is the largest independent truck tyres seller, retreader and service provider in the Turkish market. Is the distributor of Eversafe Rubber, Marangoni and İnci Akü (Yuasa Batteries). Retail and wholesale fuel sales have been added to the company's activities in 2022 trough dealerships of Opet (Koc Holding) and Petrol Ofisi (Vitol).

Name: Ningbo Shangerze Auto Parts--Spark Plugs Factory
Description:
Ningbo Shangerze Auto Parts Co., Ltd. is a dynamic and innovative company specializing in the manufacturing of high-quality automotive components and spark plugs. 

We take pride in being a leading manufacturer of premium spark plugs and ignition coils, with a relentless commitment to quality and performance. Our production processes adhere to the highest industry standards, including ISO9001 and TS16949 quality management system certifications.

 Global Reach:

Our reach extends across the globe, with key export destinations including the Middle East (25%), Southeast Asia (20%), and South America (15%). We have established a strong presence in these regions and continue to expand our global footprint.

 Customization and Quality Assurance:

At Ningbo Shangerze, we understand the unique needs of our customers. That's why we offer comprehensive customization options for our product range. Our products are renowned for their exceptional quality and reliability.

 Production Capacity:

Our state-of-the-art factory comprises ten production lines, enabling us to manufacture an impressive 2.4 million units annually. We have the flexibility to produce a wide variety of auto parts, making us a one-stop solution for your automotive component requirements.

 Join Hands with Us:

If you're seeking top-tier auto parts, look no further. Feel free to send us your product specifications and images for a customized quote. We are dedicated to providing professional quotations and excellent customer service.

We warmly welcome business partners and friends from around the world to visit our facilities and explore opportunities for collaboration. Together, we can drive excellence and innovation in the automotive industry.

Name: Car Trade 24
Description:
We would like to take the opportunity to introduce you to our company.

Car Trade 24 is a consultancy service dealing in new vehicles and direct import. The object of our business is the import of new vehicles, annual cars and company work cars. We can also offer you the latest CH cars at top selling prices.

Since 2003 the market expert of Car Trade 24 deals in importing new vehicles from different European countries. There are only a few enterprises which boast such reliable experience in this field. We also have an established network in over twenty European countries which enables us to offer an excellent choice of cars at top prices.

Car Trade 24 has cars, vans and mini-vans, cabriolets, all-terrain and small commercial vehicles – almost all brands. Car Trade 24 also offers you brand-independent purchase network in reconditioned vehicles.

Car Trade 24 is a serious business, which has established excellent contacts to dealers within Europe and Switzerland over the years. It took time and patience to secure these valuable contacts. Through these contacts we can guarantee delivery dates etc.

Car Trade 24 exhibits a small stock of vehicles at competitive prices to meet the individual needs of the customers.

Buying a car is a matter of confidence - we hope to win your confidence and we will do everything, to achieve that.

Name: EASYGOM

Name: Glass Max Hungary Kft.
Description:
A Glass Max több mint 10 000 ügyféllel, 30 éve fontos szereplője a magyar autóüveg iparágnak.
Mind a kiskereskedelmi üzletágunkban, mind a nagykereskedelemben a termék minősége alapvető fontosságú saját magunk, és az ügyfeleink számára egyaránt.
Beszállító partnereinket nagy körültekintéssel választjuk ki a világ különböző pontjairól. A német Pro Glass kizárólagos magyarországi partnereként csak prémium eszközökkel és a legmodernebb technikával dolgozunk. Kamerás szélvédőjű autók esetén a TEXA számítógépes program segítségével kalibrálunk. Büszkék vagyunk rá, hogy Magyarországon a Glass Max képviselheti a Lucas Glass-t, mely a globális technológiai vállalat, a ZF csoport tagja. Kiterjedt készlet lefedettségünknek és saját raktárunknak köszönhetően időt tudunk spórolni ügyfeleink számára minimalizálva a bevételkiesést, ami a gépjármű üzemen kívül töltött idejéből ered.
A hiánycikknek számító, vagy különleges luxus modellek esetén nemzetközi kapcsolatainkra támaszkodva akár 7-10 napos termékbeszerzést biztosítunk, szemben a piacon általános 1-2 hónapos átfutási idővel. 
Az autóüvegezési ipar nemcsak az üvegtechnológia terén, hanem a beépítés folyamatának összetettségében is gyorsan változik. Kiváló minőségű szerszámok és kapcsolódó termékek nagyon széles skáláját kínáljuk, amelyekkel a munkafolyamat biztonságosabbá és egyszerűbbé tehető. 
Céges ügyfeleinknek részére, igény szerint, azonnali kiszolgálást biztosítunk, helyszíni kiszállással. Szükség esetén teljeskörű CASCO ügyintézést vállalunk, garanciális feltételeink megegyeznek az általánosan elfogadott kondíciókkal.

Name: EMINIA Trading GmbH
Description:
EMINIA Trading GmbH was established in 2014 as a private firm supplying original automotive spare parts to B2B companies throughout Europe. The company's main goal is to help car dealerships manage their overstock of auto parts and to supply clients with OE parts at very competitive prices.

Since the beginning of its operations, our company has experienced continuous success due to its reliable and stable reputation among its client base. We deal in spare parts for all major brands, such as Mercedes-Benz, BMW, VW Group, Stellantis Group, Toyota, Nissan, Hyundai, and others.

We operate from our own warehouse, a company-owned facility covering 2,700 sqm, with a maximum storage capacity of 5,000 pallets. Thanks to its efficient logistical location, our company offers competitive delivery terms to any country, serving both wholesale and e-commerce customers.

Our operational office can handle over 5,000 calls per day, enabling us to reach and acquire new vendors and customers efficiently.

OUR MISSION: To reduce overproduction in the automotive industry.

OUR VISION: To be the leading OE automotive spare parts supplier on the market by achieving the highest quality of service, ensuring maximum customer satisfaction, and fostering sustainable growth and profitability.

Nuestra pasión por brindar un servicio inigualable a nuestros valiosos clientes es el motor que impulsa cada acción en Grupo Mopal. Nuestra filosofía se centra en la productividad, transparencia y priorización del cliente en todo lo que hacemos. Cada miembro de nuestra organización, con su dedicación constante y profesionalismo, contribuye al tejido mismo de nuestra reputación impecable.
En Grupo Mopal, entendemos que nuestros clientes son más que transacciones; son parte de nuestra extendida familia. Cada interacción es una oportunidad para demostrar nuestro compromiso inquebrantable con la satisfacción del cliente y la entrega de soluciones automotrices excepcionales. 
Al elegirnos, nuestros clientes se benefician no solo de la calidad de los vehículos Toyota, sino también de la atención personalizada y el respaldo que solo Grupo Mopal puede proporcionar.
En resumen, Grupo Mopal, Concesionario de Toyota, no solo es una referencia en la industria automotriz peruana, sino un símbolo de dedicación incansable a la excelencia y la comunidad.

For more than 30 years, our locally owned parts stores have delivered great products at great prices to the New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut market. We are large enough to offer great prices and great service and small enough to listen and respond to your individual needs.

Our buyers carefully select the brands we carry so you can install parts with confidence. We never substitute price over quality. That is why we carry brands like Denso, Bosch, Gates, Moog, Delco and many other fine brands domestic, Asian, and European vehicles.

Our fleet of company-owned vehicles are GPS equipped through our delivery dispatch system to provide you the consistent delivery times that you expect. We pride ourselves on having staff drivers with, so you don’t see the revolving faces like many of our competitors. Have returns? Don’t let them build up, simply give them to our driver.

Our clean and efficient return department carefully and quickly process returns so you can receive your credits via fax or email within 24 hours. We never want our customers paying for parts they did not use or have cores and defects laying around their shops.

The name ProStock states our goals for the present and our vision of the future: Professional service, always in stock.
We offer multiple ways for you to order your own parts 24 hours a day online through ACDelco connection, Nexpart, ProStockAutoParts.com, and now Parts Tech. All you have to do is scan a VIN or enter a license plate and the vehicle will self-populate.

You can even do it with a smartphone. Why let the counterman make your purchasing decisions.

If you still need help, have a tough lookup, or need to source something special…no problem. Let one of our more than 25 counter specialists with an average of 20 years of experience each get you that “hard to find part”.

Name: Transerv Zimbabwe
Description:
Transerv was established in 2002 initially as a cross border transport company also importing automotive spares for light vehicle workshops. Transerv capitalised on a niche market opportunity that arose in the spares wholesale market supplying larger operators with fast moving stock. Following Zimbabwe's dollarization in 2009, the wholesale market became more competitive and a decision was taken to expand into the retail space with the first retail branch opened in Graniteside in May 2009.

Today, Transerv employs 319 people and utilises multiple retail channels to service the needs of its customers countrywide, operating through a network of 25 of its homegrown branded Transerv retail branches. Three of these Transerv retail branches were formerly franchised Midas stores. The retail network operates a total of 8,290m2 in space.

In addition, Transerv Fitment Center was launched as a complementary brand to offer customers a venue to fit their tyres, batteries and suspension, etc bought at Transerv. There are now 15 Transerv fitment centres operating from a total of 5,050m2 spread across the country. The company also operates specialist automotive businesses, namely Transerv Clutch and Brake (formerly Clutch & Brake Specialists (CBS), Transerv Diesel Services (formerly ADCO) and Transerv Auto Cycle Centre.

All these businesses are controlled and supported from Transerv Head Office.

Name: Sim Distribuidora de Peças de Motos
Description:
As Lojas Nosso Lar existem no Tocantins há mais de 25 anos. Com 16 lojas nas cidades de Araguaína/TO, São Geraldo/PA, Palmas/TO, Taquaralto/TO, Colinas/TO, Guaraí/TO, Gurupi/TO, Araguatins/TO, Paraíso/TO, Porto Nacional/TO, Luís Eduardo/BA, Balsas/MA, Redenção/PA, Xinguara/PA, Barreiras/BA, Santa Inês/MA, dois Centros de Distribuição (Araguaína e Palmas) além de mais 11 depósitos para armazenamento de mercadorias, se destacam no segmento com farta variedade de produtos, pagamento facilitado e preços competitivos. 

Ao todo, empregam cerca de 1.500 funcionários diretos, movimentando significativamente a economia do Tocantins.

Em 2008, as Lojas Nosso Lar ampliaram suas fronteiras de negócios, criando então a SIM Distribuidora de Peças. 

Com equipe formada por capacitados profissionais, proporcionou ao mercado do Tocantins, Pará, Maranhão, Bahia e Piauí mais uma oportunidade para adquirir produtos de qualidade com condições comerciais compatíveis à necessidade e expectativa do segmento. 

Com sede localizada em Araguaína/TO, atende além do Tocantins, os Estados do Pará, Maranhão, Bahia e Piauí. Com uma equipe de 15 consultores Externos de vendas e 10 internos de vendas. 

Firmando a credibilidade e serviços que destacam a SIM Distribuidora no mercado Norte e Nordeste, promove palestras de Capacitação Comercial e Técnica a todos os profissionais do setor, assim como eventos para o mercado além de incentivos às modalidades ligadas ao setor. 

Atua com a linha de moto peças, pneus e acessórios. 

Em 2017 a SIM ampliou suas fronteiras, inaugurando a Unidade de Marabá/PA. 
Em 2022 a SIM ampliou suas fronteiras, inaugurando a Unidade de Santa Inês/MA.

Name: RO Bus Sales -  Commercial Fleet Dealer
Description:
Welcome to RO Bus Sales! We specialize in custom-built transportation solutions designed to meet the unique needs of businesses across industries—including senior living, secure transport, hospitality, casinos, tour operations, churches, schools, government contracts, and more. Our commitment is simple: provide high-quality, ADA-compliant vehicles that enhance safety, comfort, and accessibility.

Who We Are
RO Bus Sales offers a range of customizable buses, vans, and shuttles to help your business move forward. Based in Las Vegas, we’re more than a vehicle provider—we’re a partner dedicated to helping you find the perfect solution for your transportation needs. Our team brings extensive expertise in vehicle customization, and we pride ourselves on delivering personalized service that aligns with your specific business goals. We’re proud to deliver throughout Nevada, California, Utah, Arizona, and Colorado.

Our Specialties
Our inventory includes ADA-compliant vans, Ford Transit buses, Chevy Pro Master, and more. We understand the critical role of accessible transportation, especially for industries like senior living and secured transport, where comfort, safety, and accessibility are paramount. Whether you need a shuttle bus for hotel guests or a fleet of ADA-compliant vehicles for a senior care facility, we’ll work with you to create the best fit for your needs.

Our Process
We believe that successful projects begin with understanding our clients. Our process is collaborative and efficient. From initial consultation to the final delivery, we focus on your vision, requirements, and feedback. For custom builds, we’ll guide you through every step of the customization process, ensuring the end result is a vehicle that truly meets your operational needs and standards.

Die Tartaruga AG wurde 1994 gegründet und beschäftigt ca. 15 Mitarbeitende.

Name: Machter Autoparts
Description:
Since 2002, Machter Autoparts has built a solid reputation with an extensive history supplying affordable replacement car parts to Australians and now car owners worldwide. With a vast range of aftermarket parts for cars, 4WDs, utes, SUVs and crossovers we strive to offer the best value for money without sacrificing service for all domestic vehicles as well as Japanese, Korean and European imports. 

Aftermarket Car Parts - Machter AutoPartsWe extensively research and develop our range of aftermarket parts so we can provide unique solutions and scale products to your requirements. Through years of service, our team has become highly skilled in sourcing, developing, and organising our expanding range of parts including engine & mechanical components, suspension & steering parts, heating & cooling, electrical, lighting and other exterior parts. We are also proud to supply our own brands of patented products such as our EGR blanking plate, oil catch can and throttle body.

At Machter Autoparts we cover the entire process of aftermarket automotive parts from development and engineering to customer sales and service. This scope gives us the insight to connect to the market and community so we can engineer innovative solutions we know our customers need. 

Machter Autoparts attributes its success and expansion to the emphasis we place on honest, affordable service. Focusing on suspension & steering parts in particular, we have been chosen as the preferred supplier of Burson, Auto One Group & Parts4 Group and future more.

We are based in Sydney, Australia with a headquarters, main warehouse and sales office, and additional warehouses in Melbourne & Brisbane as well as Auckland New Zealand.

Name: Solnascente Motos
Description: A SOLNASCENTE MOTOS, concessionária Honda, foi criada em maio de 2001 em Teresina-PI e tem como principal atividade a comercialização de motocicletas, peças e serviços. A SOLNASCENTE MOTOS, concessionária Honda é fruto de uma experiência idealizada e com muito bom senso e ousadia, tivemos como prioridade a escolha da melhor localização, uma infraestrutura moderna e uma equipe técnica de qualidade. Toda essa performance aliada a um bom desempenho mostrou posteriormente que valeu a pena ser exigente desde o inicio. Em março de 2003 os horizontes foram ampliados. A empresa atravessou a ponte que liga o Piauí ao Maranhão e instalou na cidade vizinha de Timon - Ma, seguindo o mesmo padrão de qualidade que chamou a atenção dos teresinenses. O resultado desse trabalho pode ser visto nas ruas e avenidas do Piauí e do Maranhão. Milhares de pessoas puderam realizar o sonho de ter como o seu primeiro veiculo automotor uma moto Honda. A SOLNASCENTE MOTOS se orgulha de, com o mesmo entusiasmo, continuar realizando sonhos.

Panther Tools is also the Uk importer of the Toptul range of professional hand tools. Made to the highest international standards in Taiwan, Toptul offers a complete range of high quality tools in a well packaged modern design.

We are one of the world's leading specialists in windscreen replacement and repair tools, our staff have over 30 years experience in the automotive glazing industry. Name: BR Tractor
Description:
A BR Tractor é uma empresa especializada na venda de peças seminovas para equipamentos CAT. Nossa missão é reduzir significativamente os custos de manutenção dos nossos clientes, fornecendo peças de alta qualidade, 100% inspecionadas, confiáveis e com garantia de desempenho, a preços competitivos.

Nossa Visão:
Ser a principal referência no mercado de peças seminovas para equipamentos CAT, reconhecida pela excelência em qualidade e pelo compromisso em proporcionar economia e eficiência operacional aos nossos clientes.

Nossa Missão:
Reduzir os custos de manutenção dos nossos clientes, oferecendo uma alternativa confiável e econômica às peças novas, sem comprometer a qualidade e a durabilidade.

Nossos Valores:
   •    Qualidade: Garantimos que todas as peças seminovas passam por rigorosos processos de inspeção e testes.
   •    Economia: Oferecemos peças a preços acessíveis, permitindo que nossos clientes reduzam seus custos operacionais sem abrir mão da confiabilidade.
   •    Sustentabilidade: Promovemos a reutilização e o reaproveitamento de peças, contribuindo para a redução do desperdício e do impacto ambiental.
   •    Compromisso com o Cliente: Nosso foco está em entender as necessidades dos nossos clientes e fornecer soluções que excedam suas expectativas.
   •    Inovação: Buscamos constantemente novas maneiras de melhorar nossos processos e serviços para atender às demandas do mercado.

Serviços Oferecidos:
   •    Venda de Peças Seminovas: Ampla gama de componentes e peças para diversos modelos de equipamentos CAT, incluindo motores, transmissões, hidráulicos, e mais.
   •    Consultoria Técnica: Nossa equipe de especialistas, com mais de 30 anos de experiência, está à disposição para ajudar na escolha das peças corretas e oferecer orientações técnicas.

Entre em contato:
Bruno Romanelli
31 975097319
Bruno.romanelli@br-tractor.com

Escolha a BR Tractor e experimente uma nova maneira de realizar a manutenção, com economia, confiabilidade e sustentabilidade

Name: Fratelli Cozzi SpA
Description:
Fondata nel 1955 a Legnano (MI), Fratelli Cozzi S.p.A. è una realtà storica dell’automotive italiano.
Oggi continuiamo a crescere e a rinnovarci, restando fedeli a un principio che ci accompagna da oltre settant’anni: mettere il cliente al centro, in ogni fase del suo percorso di mobilità.
Siamo conosciuti da generazioni come storici Concessionari Alfa Romeo, e oggi rappresentiamo con orgoglio i marchi EVO, EMC e Foton per la vendita di auto nuove. Il nostro core business è la vendita di auto usate multimarca, un segmento in cui mettiamo a disposizione un’ampia scelta di veicoli selezionati e certificati, garantendo trasparenza e sicurezza in ogni acquisto.
Accanto alla vendita e all’assistenza, siamo anche broker per le principali società di Noleggio a Lungo Termine in Europa, offrendo soluzioni su misura per aziende, professionisti e privati. Dalla consulenza iniziale alla gestione completa del contratto, accompagniamo i nostri clienti nella scelta della formula di mobilità più conveniente e flessibile.
Nel nostro Service offriamo assistenza ufficiale per i marchi Alfa Romeo, FIAT, Lancia, Jeep, FIAT Professional, DR, EVO, EMC e Foton, unendo competenza tecnica e tecnologia d’avanguardia per assicurare prestazioni e affidabilità nel tempo.
Far parte del Gruppo Intergea, il principale distributore automobilistico italiano, ci consente di garantire solidità finanziaria, accesso privilegiato alle migliori offerte e un servizio integrato a livello nazionale.
Fratelli Cozzi S.p.A. non è solo una concessionaria: è un partner di fiducia per chi cerca esperienza, competenza e una visione moderna della mobilità.
 Visita il nostro sito e richiedi una consulenza personalizzata. Scopri come possiamo accompagnarti nel tuo prossimo viaggio su quattro ruote.

Name: SAM Tunisie
Description:
Créée en 1963, la SAM bénéficie d’une grande expérience dans la représentation exclusive de matériel roulant, matériel de travaux publics, agricoles et également matériaux de voierie.

Dès le début, une attention particulière a été portée sur l’édification d’un service après vente susceptible de répondre aux exigences d’une « Après Vente » à l’image des grandes marques distribuées. 
Pour se faire, une infrastructure correspondante a été conçue et réalisée avec la collaboration des meilleurs conseillers techniques des producteurs représentés.

La SAM est actuellement en mesure de fournir aux clients le maximum de garantie d’achat grâce à la mise en place d’un encadrement commercial et technique qualifié et efficace. 
Niveau supérieur plus une formation continue et recyclage dans les usines des fabricants, son équipe commerciale et technique se distinguent toutes les deux par une compétence et une expérience capables de conseiller et d’aider les clients dans le choix du matériel adéquat à leurs besoins.

La mise à jour des connaissances de l’ensemble du personnel tant commercial que technique s’effectue par une information systématique envoyée par les constructeurs, relative à toutes modifications, perfectionnement ou changement de pièces.

En 1997, la SAM a créé au sein de son établissement un centre de formation équipé et agréé par l’Etat pour le recyclage de ses mécaniciens.

Afin de vous offrir les possibilités de choix les plus larges de matériaux roulants, la SAM s'attache à nouer et à développer des partenariats forts avec des constructeurs de renommée mondiale (JCB / MITSUBISHI MOTORS / TATRA / DAF / ZETOR / CARMIX / TEMSA / ZOOMLION...). 
Avec nos enseignes partenaires, nous travaillons à renforcer la relation de confiance que nous entretenons avec nos clients depuis 1963.

Name: CAMEL CYCLE
Description:
Camel Cycle s’impose aujourd’hui comme un partenaire stratégique dans le secteur du deux-roues au Maroc. En tant qu’importateur exclusif des marques internationales SYM, QJ Motor et TAILG, nous répondons à des besoins variés : scooters urbains, motos trail/route et solutions électriques destinées aussi bien aux particuliers qu’aux professionnels.

Notre rôle va au-delà de la simple distribution de véhicules. Nous proposons une offre complète, intégrant les pièces de rechange et les équipements techniques indispensables, notamment au travers des gammes ALAWISH (pièces détachées) et Chaoyang (pneumatiques). Cette approche permet d’accompagner durablement le marché tout en assurant la cohérence de l’écosystème deux-roues.

Notre slogan « Votre mobilité, notre priorité » résume notre vision : offrir au marché marocain des solutions fiables, modernes et adaptées aux usages actuels. Cette orientation s’appuie sur trois piliers : la qualité des produits, la maîtrise du marché et la proximité avec nos partenaires.

Au-delà de la performance commerciale, Camel Cycle contribue à la structuration du secteur à travers le développement du réseau revendeur, la formation, l’approvisionnement en pièces et la promotion des nouvelles formes de mobilité. Nous accompagnons ainsi un ensemble d’acteurs variés : utilisateurs particuliers, entreprises spécialisées dans la livraison, prestataires logistiques, flottes professionnelles et revendeurs indépendants.

Notre ambition est d’encourager une mobilité plus fluide, plus accessible et plus durable, en valorisant le deux-roues comme véritable solution de déplacement et d’efficacité.

Name: Cartotrade.com
Description:
We are very proud to bring you Cartotrade! Having previously run the original Autotrade-mail for over 10 years, and seeing how it changed under corporate ownership, we totally understand the need for a back to basics approach, addressing dealer wants and needs and not those of corporate giants and their shareholders.

Our simple aim is to be the best by having only the most trustworthy, professional motor industry members trading together. 

To demonstrate our enthusiasm, passion and dedication we issue a pledge, a company manifesto if you like, which states that we will only have:

Proper people 
We will only allow established dealers access to the website
 
Proper cars 
We won’t ever want to make claims about having the most stock. A car on Cartotrade will be real and the seller will know about it when you contact them.

A simple platform 
We will allow our members to buy and sell retailable trade vehicles quickly and easily, with no distracting gimmicks or unwanted “add-ons” only there to justify price increases.

A fair pricing policy 
We will be fairly priced committing to no contracts and no price increases whatsoever; a dealer's starting monthly fee will be theirs for the life of their membership.

Non-corporate governance 
We have the freedom to run the service for the benefit of you, our members and we know what you want. Not only does our team bring the most experience within the online B2B car trading industry but also over 30 years’ experience working in dealerships.

Name: PMA/TOOLS GmbH
Description:
Right at the front: PMA/TOOLS GmbH

With subsidiaries in France, Spain, the USA and China, PMA/TOOLS GmbH offers complete automotive glass accessories expertise from a single source. For more than 30 years we have been constructing, producing and distributing products and services for the windscreen. Automotive glass fitters, automotive glass manufacturers and parts dealers can therefore always find the tools, windscreen attachments and fastening elements they need from us. We share our experience with our customers and partners worldwide, and we are constantly on the lookout together for solutions in the daily application of vehicle glazing. 

In addition to a well thought-out, constantly growing product range, the focus has always been on investing in relevant and future-oriented technologies. In the meantime, almost the entire product development and quality assurance at PMA/TOOLS AG takes place in-house. 

To meet the ever-increasing challenges of replacing windscreens, we have built a new, state-of-the-art training centre for calibrating driver assistance systems. Here we train everything important about ADAS systems in seminars and training courses - in theory and practice.

Name: Jolly Caravan
Description:
Da oltre 40 anni, Jolly Caravan è un punto di riferimento nel mondo dei veicoli ricreazionali nel Nord-Est d’Italia. La nostra storia è fatta di passione, competenza e un impegno costante nel creare esperienze indimenticabili su quattro ruote.

Nel 2023 siamo entrati a far parte del Gruppo FBH, un passaggio che ha portato nuova energia, innovazione e visione al nostro percorso. Questo cambiamento ci ha permesso di crescere, rinnovarci e rafforzare ancora di più il legame con la nostra community.

Ci distinguiamo per:

Accoglienza autentica: ogni cliente è parte della nostra famiglia.
Attenzione al dettaglio: ascoltiamo, consigliamo e seguiamo con cura ogni esigenza.
Desiderio di evoluzione: investiamo ogni giorno per migliorare servizi, spazi e tecnologie, guardando al futuro del turismo itinerante.

Offriamo vendita di camper nuovi e usati, accessori specializzati, noleggio e assistenza qualificata, con un'attenzione particolare a qualità, sicurezza e comfort.

Siamo più di un concessionario: siamo compagni di viaggio per chi ama la libertà, l’avventura e le strade da scoprire.

Name: Profi Glass B.V.
Description:

Name: Ceylon Motor Traders' Association
Description:
The Ceylon Motor Traders' Association (CMTA), founded on December 2, 1919 is one of the oldest trade associations affiliated to the Ceylon Chamber of Commerce.

The CCC is the most senior trade chamber in Sri Lanka, and widely respected as the most influential trade association in the Country.
The Association represents the leading automotive manufacturers in the world through their local agents in Sri Lanka. The association is also open to automotive related franchise holders, and automotive ancillary industries. En LiquiFast, entendemos que el tiempo es un recurso valioso para las empresas. Name: AFRIDI TRADING JAPAN
Description:
About Us

MISSION
At AFRIDI TRADING JAPAN, our unwavering mission is to elevate the standard of service for our global clientele within the used automobile industry. We are committed to tirelessly pursuing customer satisfaction through continuous dedication and a genuine passion for what we do.

VISION
In an era marked by the growth of emerging economies and an increasing emphasis on resource conservation, the demand for used automobiles is on a remarkable ascent. At AFRIDI TRADING JAPAN, we are strategically positioned to support and catalyze your business endeavors in alignment with this worldwide trend.

WHO WE ARE
AFRIDI TRADING JAPAN stands at the forefront of the automotive trading sector, headquartered in Yokohama, Japan. Our extensive inventory boasts automobiles meticulously selected after rigorous assessment and inspection in key regions, including Japan, South Korea, the United States, the UK, and Germany, by our discerning and seasoned procurement specialists. Each vehicle in our collection represents the pinnacle of quality and value, making it an ideal choice for our discerning clientele.

Once a purchase is made, our streamlined and expeditious procedures ensure swift delivery to our customers' doorstep. With an extensive presence in many countries, our foreign affiliate business offices facilitate the seamless global provision of our esteemed services.

From our inception, we have continuously evolved, harnessing innovative concepts, advanced technologies, and robust operational systems. Our customers can effortlessly peruse our extensive stock of vehicles using our powerful search engine, making the selection process both efficient and enjoyable.

Our global network includes sales offices strategically positioned worldwide, complemented by our 24/7/365 customer service centers, ensuring that we are always within arm's reach to facilitate your purchasing journey.

Name: SUTTEL Group
Description:
Suttel Group, dirigé par Jean-Frédéric Suttel, est une entreprise familiale solidement implantée dans le paysage économique du littoral languedocien. 
Avec ses activités diversifiées, le groupe s’impose dans le paysage économique sur deux axes majeurs : forte expertise dans les activités nautiques et une présence plus que significative dans le secteur de la moto.

GESTION DE PORT A SEC
Notre groupe est expert dans ce secteur, avec une ambition de développer notre réseau de ports à sec sur le littoral languedocien, offrant une alternative aux ports de plaisance traditionnels.
Une histoire familiale forte dans les activités nautiques transmise sur trois générations. Le père de Jean-Frédéric Suttel, Jean Suttel, était un pionnier dans le domaine de la construction navale et de la gestion de ports.
D'importants investissements ont été réalisé par le groupe dans ce domaine, avec la création de Port on Land à Palavas-les-Flots et le lancement des travaux d'aménagement d'un nouveau port à sec à Carnon.
La création de ces ports à sec répond à un besoin croissant de places de port, tout en offrant des avantages en termes de coûts d'entretien pour les propriétaires de bateaux.

LEADER DE LA DISTRIBUTION DE MOTOS 
Suttel Group est un acteur important dans le secteur de la moto, avec un réseau étendu dans la région : 15 concessions à son actif autour de la distribution de 20 marques dont BMW, DUCATI, PIAGGIO, KTM, ROYAL ENFIELD, MV AGUSTA, … 
Jean-Frédéric SUTTEL est le pionnier et fondateur du MotoPark de Mauguio : Le plus grand village moto d’Europe avec 15 000 m2 dédié à l’univers de la moto.
Suttel Group est également distributeur de d’accessoires et d’équipements du Pilote 
Le groupe évolue également dans le PAP et Lifestyles autour du développement de la marque The Royal Racer

Depuis le cœur de nos campagnes marocaines, de nos grandes villes, nos routes et nos autoroutes, les lubrifiants MOTUL sont là pour assurer chaque jour, confort, sécurité et maintenance à des milliers de moteurs utilisés par des particuliers et des professionnels. Si en l'espace d'une trentaine d'années, MOTUL s'est imposé sur l'ensemble du Royaume, c'est grâce à son étroit partenariat avec la société FORAMAG.
FORAMAG a progressivement élargi son activité et en plus de la distribution des lubrifiants de la marque MOTUL, au niveau Automobile, Transport & Travaux publics, Motos & Loisirs, l'entreprise s'est imposée au niveau du secteur du Tréfilage, et depuis 2011 elle a renforcé sa pénétration du secteur industriel avec la représentation de la marque MOTUL TECH, lubrifiants industriels de haute performance, fournisseur conventionné par l'usine RENAULT TANGER, et chez nombres d'industriels marocains utilisant les huiles d'usinage Comme INGELEC, SERIMA, SCIF, TECHNIQUE ACIERS…

Description:

تعد شانجان، والتي تعني "الأمان الدائم"، من بين أربعة من أكبر مجموعات السيارات في الصين وتتصدر مبيعات العلامات التجارية المحلية لأعوام متتالية. بخبرة 157 عامًا في تصنيع المركبات و35 عامًا في مجال السيارات،تستثمر شانجان بشكل كبير في التقنيات المبتكرة والبحث والتطوير العالمي، بدعم من مراكز الأبحاث والتطوير في الصين، الولايات المتحدة، المملكة المتحدة، إيطاليا، واليابان. تركز على المنتجات المتقدمة، التصاميم الرائدة، وتقنيات السلامة المبتكرة. تأسست شانجان المجدوعي في السعودية عام 2016، وأصبحت العلامة التجارية الصينية الأكثر مبيعًا في المملكة، بأكثر من 40 منشأة، بما في ذلك 25 موقعًا لخدمات ما بعد البيع في 28 مدينة، ومركز تدريب فني إقليمي في الخُبر. حصلت على تقدير كأفضل موزع في العالم لأربع سنوات متتالية، مع العديد من الجوائز المحلية والدولية في قطاعات متعددة. تهدف شانجان المجدوعي إلى إعادة تعريف تجربة العملاء في السعودية، تمكين الشباب، ودعم رؤية السعودية الخضراء من خلال المشاركة بالخدمة المجتمعية للزراعة.

Name: Campello Motors
Description:
Passione, competenza, innovazione e professionalità sono il nostro motore quotidiano. È così che dal 1972 ad oggi abbiamo potuto diventare qualcosa in più di una semplice “concessionaria auto”.

Se Campello Motors è un punto di riferimento a livello nazionale è perché ogni giorno investiamo energie, risorse ed esperienza nell'unica direzione che davvero ci sta a cuore: la soddisfazione dei nostri clienti.
Retorica? No, perché è proprio ai clienti che stringiamo la mano ad ogni auto venduta e ad ogni servizio erogato. Il loro sorriso è il nostro miglior biglietto da visita. La loro stretta vigorosa è il nostro patrimonio più prezioso.

𝗖𝗼𝗻𝗰𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗮 𝗮𝘂𝘁𝗼 𝗙𝗶𝗮𝘁, 𝗔𝗹𝗳𝗮 𝗥𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗼, 𝗔𝗯𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗵, 𝗟𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗶𝗮, 𝗝𝗲𝗲𝗽, 𝗡𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗮𝗻, 𝗞𝗶𝗮, 𝗫𝗘𝗩 𝗲 𝗢𝗽𝗲𝗹.

L’azienda nasce nel 1972 come Stefar e opera fino al 2018 nel territorio di Mirano come concessionaria ufficiale Fiat. Nello stesso anno Alessandro Campello ne acquisisce la proprietà con il marchio Campello Motors, che attribuisce alle sue quattro sedi di Mestre, Padova e Mirano. Nel 2022 con l’inaugurazione della nuova sede di Padova (zona Stanga) Campello Motors corona un percorso di innovazione e transizione verso una forte presenza all’interno del mercato della mobilità sostenibile, costituendo il primo e più avanzato polo che comprende un’offerta combinata fra auto, e-bike e monopattini.
𝗩𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗶𝘁𝗮, 𝗮𝘀𝘀𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗻𝘇𝗮, 𝗻𝗼𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗴𝗶𝗼 𝗮 𝗯𝗿𝗲𝘃𝗲 𝗲 𝗹𝘂𝗻𝗴𝗼 𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗲. 
Siamo a tutti gli effetti un vero e proprio centro servizi: officina, carrozzeria, cambio gomme, linea revisioni, noleggio, magazzino ricambi, servizio targa con soccorso stradale 24 ore su 24, gestione sinistri, finanziamenti personalizzati, estensione di garanzia e prenotazione dell'usato. Tutte le quattro sedi fra Mestre, Padova e Mirano sono dotate di ogni servizio utile, con l'obiettivo di offrire al cliente il miglior supporto sempre e ovunque.

Name: CSA Centro Servizi Autocarri Srl
Description:
CSA Centro Servizi Autocarri Srl, Concessionaria Volkswagen Veicoli Commerciali, SCANIA Veicoli Industriali e Isuzu.

La missione di CSA Centro Servizi Autocarri Srl è di fornire il miglior servizio di vendita e assistenza possibile, garantendo una esperienza positiva e professionale alla nostra clientela.

Descrizione e Storia

All’altezza di Anzola Emilia, lungo la storica e trafficata via Emilia, si presenta l’ampia e moderna sede della CSA Cento Servizi Autocarri fondata il 22/10/2001 e inaugurata nel 2002. La concessionaria nasce sull’esperienza maturata negli anni da una famiglia di autotrasportatori che successivamente, compresa l'importanza strategica rivestita dalla imponente struttura, ha realizzato con altri soci una delle aziende più grandi e innovative dal punto di vista della vendita e del service legato al mondo dei veicoli industriali della zona. Avviata con una manciata di dipendenti la CSA ha da subito riscosso grandi consensi e successi ed è cresciuta nel tempo aprendo filiali a Modena e Spilamberto. Oggi la CSA vanta un organico di oltre 40  dipendenti tra service e forza vendita ed è in continua espansione e crescita grazie alla fedeltà dei suoi clienti nel tempo, CSA è attiva nelle provincie di Bologna, Modena, Ferrara e Reggio E. La nuova struttura è dotata di un ampio magazzino ricambi e di una attrezzata officina meccanica, disponiamo anche di un centro revisioni per i veicoli Industriali. Da alcuni anni altre officine di zona fanno capo alla CSA per meglio coprire in modo capillare le esigenze dei nostri clienti sul territorio.
CSA è concessionaria ufficiale e officina autorizzata Veicoli Commerciali Volkswagen, Veicoli Industriali Scania e Veicoli Isuzu.

Description: Founded in 2018, Alpha eMobility is an electric mobility pioneer dedicated to transforming urban transportation through innovative electric tuk-tuks. Name: Carzelle
Description:
Your trusted partner for both car buyers and sellers, providing access to a wide range of vehicles across borders. Navigate the ever-changing market with fast, efficient deals that keep you ahead.
Carzelle offers an expansive collection of vehicles that have been sourced from across Europe. Whether you’re a manufacturer, dealer, an intermediary, or another professional we optimize transactions and efficiently manage high-volume demands.
With our expertise and digital infrastructure, we ensure smooth, scalable operations tailored to your business needs.

Expert Assistance: Rely on our team to help find vehicles for your specific requirements.

Sell Cars:

Name: Off Road Performance - ORP
Description:
Welcome to Off Road Performance (ORP), the ultimate destination for all things off-road and adventure. Established in 2007, we are a premier retail company specializing in the automotive industry, with an unbending passion for 4x4 vehicles. With a comprehensive range of products and an unwavering commitment to quality, ORP is the “go-to” choice for enthusiasts seeking top-notch upgrades and installations.

With a portfolio featuring more than 50 well-known brands such as ARB, Bilstein, Fox Factory, iKamper, KC Hilites, Mickey Thompson, Method Race Wheels, and many others; we provide a curated selection of automotive accessories. From aggressive off-road tires to precision-engineered suspension systems, we have everything you need to conquer new grounds with confidence.

But our passion doesn't stop at the trailhead. ORP is not just about upgrading your vehicle; we're about enhancing your entire outdoor experience. In addition to our off-road offerings, we proudly supply a range of camping and overland products that ensure you're equipped for every adventure.

Name: BATTERY SHOP Maroc
Description:
BATTERYSHOP est une entreprise marocaine spécialisée dans l'importation, la distribution et la vente en ligne d'accumulateurs d'énergie.

BATTERY SHOP est le fruit d’une collaboration avec un des prestigieux groupes internationaux dans la distribution des batteries www.vtpower.es

Nous travaillons dans les secteurs traditionnels du démarrage automobile et des batteries industrielles

Notre catalogue comprend nos propres marques et les principales marques du marché international

L'internationalisation est l'un des objectifs à court terme que BATTERYSHOP a dans son portefeuille, ainsi que l'expansion des marques et des produits qui lui permettent d'être au plus haut niveau des demandes du marché.

Notre modèle d'entreprise vise à offrir un service efficace au client et se fonde sur une étroite coopération avec les principaux opérateurs logistiques pour garantir un service adéquat.

Nous disposons d'un stock suffisant pour garantir la viabilité des livraisons les plus urgentes. Pour les opérations internationales, nous avons le soutien des meilleurs spécialistes de la logistique multimodale pour coordonner les moyens et les ressources en vue d’un approvisionnement régulier.

Notre équipe travaille quotidiennement pour fournir aux clients le bon produit afin de trouver des solutions à leurs besoins de stockage d'énergie.

BATTERYSHOP  a pour mission de démocratiser la batterie premium et la rendre a la porté de tout conducteur ou utilisateur, en leur offrant le meilleur rapport qualité prix.

Les Batteries sont un marché de niche. Nous avons plus de 2 000 modèles différents de marques diverses qui sont en demande pour de nombreuses applications personnalisées. Notre objectif est d'obtenir la satisfaction des clients en apportant une réponse rapide sur un marché où la spécialisation et  la demande de solutions énergétiques sont en augmentation.  

Nous avons conclu des alliances stratégiques avec les principaux fabricants et fournisseurs internationaux

Name: Grupa Wanicki
Description:
Napędzamy Twój rozwój!

Od 35 lat dostarczamy niezawodne rozwiązania dla transportu, construction i rolnictwa, wspierając naszych klientów w rozwoju biznesu i osiąganiu sukcesów.

Jako autoryzowany dealer renomowanych marek, takich jak DAF, Irizar, TATRA, Lamberet, Yanmar, Piaggio a także John Deere, Kramer, Monosem, SIP, Bednar, SaMASZ, zapewniamy najwyższą jakość obsługi, nowoczesne rozwiązania technologiczne oraz fachowe doradztwo na każdym etapie współpracy.

Działamy w 22 oddziałach w całej Polsce, a nasz zespół to ponad 700 osób, które codziennie dbają o to, by nasi klienci mogli korzystać z niezawodnych maszyn i pojazdów. Stawiamy na rozwój i innowacje, aby dostarczać rozwiązania, które odpowiadają na realne potrzeby naszych klientów i wprowadzają w przyszłość efektywnych rozwiązań.

Name: Otoproject Group
Description:
OTOPROJECT Group is a leading Indonesian company specializing in the sale of automotive accessories for four-wheeled vehicles. Headquartered in Jakarta, we are rapidly expanding, driven by a team of dedicated, professional, and energetic individuals.

Founded in 2009, OTOPROJECT started as a small 3m x 3m shop with just two employees at the Central Jakarta Automotive Exchange. Through dedication and hard work, we have grown into a prominent player in Indonesia's automotive industry, now operating multiple garages across the nation. Today, we proudly employ +200 professionals and serve approximately 2,000 customers across 37 provinces, from Aceh to Papua.

Our unwavering commitment to innovation and quality empowers us to deliver exceptional products and services that elevate the driving experience. We constantly adapt to market demands, offering reliable automotive solutions and maintaining strong relationships with our customers.

Our Vision is being one of the best automotive companies in Asia by providing innovation, best services, and good values to all stakeholders

Our Mission is to Elevate Driving Experience for active People in active world through innovative and reliable automotive solution

Our core values—Agile, Unity, Trustworthy, and Outstanding (AUTO)— serve as the pillars supporting our operational processes. OTOPROJECT Group remains committed to consistently delivering the best products and services to our customers

Name: Pelloni Auto S.p.A.
Description:

Nel corso del tempo acquisisce nuovi Marchi e stipula accordi con le principali case locatrici per andare incontro alle rinnovate esigenze della Clientela sempre più attenta all'innovazione e alla sostenibilità.
Attualmente Pelloni Auto S.p.A. opera su tutta la provincia di Modena con 4 punti vendita a Modena, Sassuolo e Carpi offrendo un servizio completo di mobilità, che segue il cliente durante tutto il ciclo operativo del veicolo con servizi su misura.
A ciò si aggiunge l'assistenza tecnica altamente specializzata, un magazzino continuamente rifornito che fornisce giornalmente ricambi e accessori in tutta Italia.
Questo ha portato la Pelloni Auto ad essere un punto di riferimento molto importante per i clienti, creando un altissimo grado di fedeltà che ci rende orgogliosi del lavoro svolto.

Name: Bocar Germany
Description:
Bocar Germany has been a legally independent unit of Bocar Group Mexico for more than 40 years. In addition to a Sales & Engineering Office in Leinfelden-Echterdingen, a unique Technology Center in Schramberg-Waldmössingen also belongs to Bocar Germany. 

Our services are specialized in processes in aluminum die casting, gravity die casting as well as plastic injection molding. In addition, we develop and test products until they are ready for series production. Innovative technologies are tested for their suitability for series production and further optimized, and fundamental studies are carried out on the die casting process and its product application.

Today, over 100 employees work successfully with passion and determination for our customers in a constantly changing industry.

Name: Groupe Fert Recyclage
Description:
Fort de son maillage géographique stratégique dans le sud de la France, Fert Recyclage collecte, recycle et valorise tout type de véhicules hors d’usage, et produit des pièces de réemploi.

Le Groupe est organisé sur 14 sites qui s’étendent sur 25 hectares, et compte plus de 200 salariés qui traitent chaque année plus de 30 000 véhicules : autos, motos, machines agricoles, poids-lourds et engins de travaux public.

Acteur de l’économie circulaire, Fert Recyclage est engagé dans une démarche de développement durable. La production de PIEC (pièces issues de l’économie circulaire), au cœur d’enjeux écologiques et écologiques, est au centre de la stratégie FERT Recyclage qui veut permettre la réparation de tout type de véhicules grâce à la pièce de réemploi.

Name: Excel Repuestos - El Salvador
Description:
Excel Repuestos El Salvador, o también conocida como Repuestos DIDEA, es parte del Grupo EXCEL, el cual fue fundado en 1919 por Bartolomé Poma. Con presencia en El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Nicaragua y Panamá, es el conglomerado automotriz líder en la región Centroamericana.
Excel Repuestos El Salvador es distribuidor autorizado de partes originales para vehículos de las marcas Toyota, Chevrolet, Kia, BMW, Hino y Fuso. También se dedica a la venta y distribución de repuestos equivalentes, llantas, baterías, lubricantes, accesorios para vehículos, lavadoras Alkota y Montacargas Toyota.
Actualmente cuenta con 12 sucursales a nivel nacional y atiende a todo tipo de clientes, desde personas particulares, talleres, cooperativas, empresas, mayoristas, entidades de gobierno, hasta flotas de compañías multinacionales. 
Además de atención presencial en las sucursales, también contamos con TELEREPUESTOS; un centro de contacto con clientes a través de teléfono (2275-1133), Whatsapp, Messenger, LiveChat, e-mail y Redes sociales, el cual es complementado con servicio de entrega a domicilio.

Quality Assurance: Meticulous vehicle inspection
Transparency: Honest and integrity-driven transactions
Flexibility: Handling inventory from small quantities to large batches

Our extensive inventory includes a diverse range of vehicles from top brands such as BMW, Audi, Mercedes-Benz, Volkswagen, Nissan, and more. We offer Petrol, Diesel, Hybrid and Electric.

We believe in win-win operations, personal relations, and long-term partnerships. Our goal is to help professional car dealers expand their inventory efficiently and profitably.

Whether you're looking to become a supplier, transporter, or client, we invite you to connect with us. Feel free to call or mail us or create your personal account on our website and check our stock.

Unlike traditional franchises, Battery Corp’s co-operative structure allows members to retain independence while benefiting from shared resources, collective decision-making, and enhanced negotiation power. This innovative approach enables Battery Corp to provide superior value to its members and customers, fostering growth, sustainability, and competitive strength within the market.

Description:

From raw TPU synthesis to advanced coating and precision cutting, every process takes place under one roof — powered by the world's most advanced casting and coating technology.

This complete industrial chain allows us to maintain independent control over TPU quality, ensuring unmatched durability, optical clarity, and consistency.
Our mission is to redefine automotive protection through innovation, precision, and reliability — delivering films trusted by professionals worldwide.

Name: PartsXchange
Description:
Supply genuine parts at a discounted cost
We have set up a simple business-to-business application whereby Bodyshop's can list their parts for sale and purchase new and used genuine parts from other accredited Bodyshop's, VRA approved green parts & main dealer obsolete stock.

Parts are listed using the quick and simple app, each item can be listed within 90 seconds including an image or by simply uploading a batch of parts from a csv file.
A part would be listed for sale at a pre-determined cost along with postage value.

PartsXchange's automated collection and delivery service will notify the collection agent to collect the item for delivery, which makes selling parts hassle free! 

We are a member of the NBRA and ABP and offer compliance around our industry standard. 

We are a bespoke selling site unlike mainstream selling sites that offers provenance of each part purchased.

Name: Exquisite Auto

GO FAR, GO TOGETHER

Name: APF Autoparts
Description:
APF Autoparts was founded 26 years ago. Initially, the company's focus was on the distribution of parts of Asian car brands, but over the years the company has grown into a true household name in the automotive industry. Bodywork companies and independent garages from all over the world buy their auto parts here. With operations in more than 50 countries, APF Autoparts has profiled itself as a true global player.

APF Autoparts offers a wide range of 15 million parts, with 72 brands of original equipment manufacturer (OEM) parts and 73 brands of original equipment supplied (OES) parts. It is a range that is constantly evolving to meet all possible customer needs. From the new, high-tech building along the N42 in Zottegem, APF coordinates its main activities. Here, the company also plans to expand its warehouse so that it can respond even better to customer needs. By combining innovative IT infrastructure and the know-how of the APF search team, APF Autoparts can guarantee an "immediately right" - rate of almost 100%.

Name: West Africa Automotive Show

West Africa Automotive Show is your only opportunity to access the key decision makers across the thriving West African Automotive industry. Name: Maas-De Koning
Description:
Waar we voor staan

Maas-De Koning is dealer voor de merken Volkswagen, Audi, SEAT, Škoda, CUPRA en Volkswagen Bedrijfswagens. Wij bieden verkoop van nieuwe auto’s, occasions, onderhoud, APK, lease, verhuur en schadeherstel. U kunt ons vinden in de regio Rijnmond en het Groene Hart. Van Krimpen aan den IJssel tot Uithoorn is er altijd een Maas-De Koning locatie bij u in de buurt. Onze vestigingen liggen dicht bij Rotterdam, Den Haag, Leiden, Amsterdam en Utrecht, maar net buiten de drukte van de stad, altijd goed en gemakkelijk bereikbaar.

Bij Maas-De Koning kennen we onze klanten. Van naam zeker, maar we weten ook waar behoefte aan is. We kunnen makkelijk schakelen met onze klanten en om maar in de mobiliteitstaal te blijven, beter sturen naar oplossingen. Want daarvoor moet je kennis hebben, maar ook een beetje kennissen zijn.

We zijn een combinatie van twee familiebedrijven en dat merk je. Dat merk je aan de betrokkenheid, aan het inleven en aan het meedenken. Kortom we weten goed wat onze klanten letterlijk en figuurlijk beweegt. Of dat nou gaat over leasing, elektrificatie of bijvoorbeeld schade. Onze dealerbedrijven zijn erop gericht om aan de vraag van vandaag maar ook aan die van morgen te kunnen voldoen. En daar zijn we trouw in. Immers al meer dan 50 jaar. En onze klanten zijn weer trouw aan ons, sommigen zelfs even zo lang.

Met Maas-De Koning zijn we startklaar voor wat de toekomst brengt en vraagt. Onze klanten zijn in beweging. Nieuwe behoeftes vragen om nieuwe oplossingen. En wij kunnen dat bieden. Tegelijkertijd verandert er heel weinig. We doen er alles aan om ervoor te zorgen dat iedereen ons vakmanschap en onze service blijft waarderen. Want wees nou eerlijk, iedereen wil toch zo’n goede buur.

Maas-De Koning
Weet wat u beweegt

İlerleyen dönemde Ford Otosan yedek parça tedariğini bünyesine katması ile Türkiye genelinde sektörün güvenilir markalarından biri haline geldi.

Ürün gamı ve hizmet alanı her geçen gün genişleyen Forka Otomotiv, müşterilerinin yedek parça tedariği ve lojistik ihtiyaçlarına anında cevap verebilmek adına İstanbul Kocasinan’daki tam donanımlı yerleşkesine taşındı. Teknolojik kapasitesi yüksek modern yerleşkesinde Kalite Yönetim Sistemi belgesi ISO 9001:2008 sahibi oldu. 

Ford Otosan yedek parça ve FMY ürün grubu tedariği, lojistik destek ve danışmanlık hizmeti veren marka, 2024 yılında Atılgan Şirketler Topluluğu'nun bünyesine dahil olarak Renault marka araçların yedek parça tedariğini üstlendi. 

Bugün, dünyaca bilinen Ford ve Renault marka otomotivlerin Türkiye’deki yedek parça, lojistik ve danışmanlık hizmetlerini müşterilerine ulaştıran Forka Otomotiv, sınırlarını genişleterek yoluna devam etmektedir.

Name: BAS Parts & Tyres
Description:
BAS Parts & Tyres is specialized in new and used truck parts and tyres. 

BAS Parts is the go-to supplier for used parts for Volvo, DAF, Renault and Mercedes trucks. The used parts provide a reasonably priced alternative to new parts and make it possible to lower the cost of repairing trucks. BAS Parts has a broad stock, from smaller replacement parts to complete cabins, gearboxes, engines and differentials. We even have a in-house re-manufacturing facility for gearboxes.

Besides used parts, we also offer a range of new aftermarket parts. All items are recorded in the system under the last known orginal part number in order to easily find the right parts and retrieve inventory levels. 

BAS Tyres has a large amount of commercial tyres on stock, around 15.000 of them. We are a reliable wholesaler of truck, trailer, OTR, van and agri tyres.
Besides selling large amounts of tyres we also have 7 service points in the Netherlands and Germany. Here we mount and/or repair tyres. Due to our wholesale nature, we can offer great prices.

BAS Parts & Tyres is part of BAS Holding. Interested in a job at BAS?

Looking ahead, Yike will continue to uphold its development philosophy and strategy, deepen its expertise in the automotive parts industry, and consistently enhance its core competitiveness. We sincerely welcome partnerships with domestic and international collaborators to jointly create a brighter future.

De carros antigos aos últimos lançamentos, sejam modelos nacionais ou importados, a Paccini conta com mais de 13.000 produtos que atendem aproximadamente 93% da frota circulante no país.


Sobre a nossa história

Iniciamos nossas atividades em 1982 na zona norte da cidade de São Paulo como uma oficina, atuando na manutenção de radiadores de linha pesada. Ao longo dos anos evoluímos até nos tornarmos uma distribuidora de autopeças que hoje é referência nacional em peças para arrefecimento e climatização.

Atualmente a Paccini atende todo o Brasil através de suas 6 unidades em São Paulo Capital/SP, Americana/SP, Contagem/MG, Curitiba/PR, Palhoça/SC, e Porto Alegre/RS.

Graças ao apoio dos parceiros, colaboradores e clientes, a Paccini se orgulha em ser reconhecida como uma das maiores distribuidoras do segmento no País.

A Paccini é uma das empresas de sucesso do Grupo Paccini.

NOSSO PROPÓSITO

Suprir as peças de reposição em tempo hábil para facilitar a mobilidade.


NOSSA VISÃO

Conquistar o território nacional em todas as categorias de produtos comercializadas pelo Grupo Paccini até 2027.

Para guiar nossa trajetória, elencamos 4 pilares que falam muito sobre o nosso jeito de agir.

Name: AUTOLUCE SRL
Description:
Siamo nati a Milano nel 1960 e nel corso di questi 60 anni siamo diventati un punto di riferimento per tutte le autofficine.

Da sempre attivi nel settore della distribuzione di ricambi auto multimarca, dei servizi e delle attrezzature per le officine, continuiamo a impegnarci per rendere i nostri clienti autoriparatori sempre più affidabili e competitivi.

Oggi Autoluce Milano è socio fondatore di Groupauto Italia (Gruppo leader a livello internazionale nella distribuzione Aftermarket), è Bosch Concessionario, è Rivenditore Autorizzato Magneti Marelli e cliente diretto di tutti i principali componentisti di primo impianto.

Abbiamo creato un network di autofficine operanti su tutto il territorio Lombardo, il cui scopo è quello di agevolare l’incontro tra meccanici e automobilisti.

In tutti questi anni, la passione per il nostro lavoro, il costante miglioramento delle dinamiche distributive e  un management sempre attento a rispondere alle esigenze del mercato hanno portato a grandi cambiamenti e dinamiche di crescita;  non abbiamo mai smesso di essere vicini ai nostri clienti, maturando una grande esperienza che ci ha aiutato ad affinare un modello vincente.

La nostra è una storia basata sui valori del lavoro, della collaborazione, dell’innovazione e della fedeltà, che in tutti questi anni ci ha permesso di far evolvere le vostre officine, formare i vostri figli, informatizzare le vostre aziende, in una sfida continua con il futuro, una sfida da vincere insieme.

Name: Ape Ryder
Description:
Passionate about both cycling and preserving our planet! We strive to make a positive impact on the world around us through sustainable transportation and eco-friendly practices.

Sustainable Solutions: We actively promote and encourage the use of e-bikes as an eco-friendly alternative to cars for commuting and short-distance travel. By reducing carbon emissions and promoting a healthier lifestyle, we believe we can create a more sustainable future.

Eco-Friendly Lifestyle: Beyond cycling, we embrace a holistic approach to sustainability in our everyday life. From practicing recycling and reducing waste to supporting local and organic products, we are committed to minimizing our ecological footprint.

Community Engagement: We actively engage with local environmental organizations such as Seatrees and participate in community events centered around conservation and green initiatives. Together, we can foster a stronger sense of environmental stewardship and inspire others to join the movement.

Passion for Nature:  We believe it's crucial to protect and preserve our natural resources for future generations, which drives us to advocate for sustainable policies and promote environmental awareness. Partner of @Seatrees for reforesting the oceans.

Name: J BIL
Description:
Vi på J BIL erbjuder bilglädje hela vägen, från ditt första bilköp till ditt besök i verkstaden. Som auktoriserad återförsäljare för Peugeot, Citroën, Opel, DS Automobiles och Mitsubishi Motors ger vi dig trygghet och kvalitet i varje kilometer.

Hos våra anläggningar hittar du även ett brett utbud av prisvärda och kvalitetssäkrade begagnade bilar. Kan du inte besöka oss på plats? Då finns vår onlinetjänst clickndrive.se, där du enkelt köper begagnade bilar med hemleverans inom 48 timmar.

I våra auktoriserade verkstäder möts du av tekniker med tillgång till de senaste diagnosinstrumenten, uppdaterad programvara och specialverktyg. Helt enkelt allt som krävs för ett professionellt arbete.

J BIL finns på fem platser i Stockholm: Väsby, Haninge, Sätra, Täby och Vällingby. Vi finns även i Lund, Norrtälje och på flera platser i Göteborg: Frölunda, Tagene och Utängarna (skadecenter).

Välkommen in till oss på J BIL, oavsett om du söker service, reparation eller din nästa drömbil.
