Name: Tradex France - UAE
Description:
Involved in Automotive distribution and International Trading since 2001, TRADEX FRANCE, part of MOVIDIA GROUP, is one of the French leading company of Spare Parts & Vehicles Export.

On Spare Parts business, TRADEX FRANCE offers its customers a wide range of products, from Manufacturer’s Spare Parts, Equipment Spare Parts as well as its own brands (Tradex, Tygra By Tradex …). 

On Vehicle business, TRADEX FRANCE, a partner of the world's leading manufacturers (European and Asian), offers a large multi-brand catalogue fully adapted to the specific needs of its customers, whether selling new or used vehicles (fuel, hybrid or electric vehicles).

TRADEX FRANCE has its own logistics solutions in the Paris Area (France) with almost 10,000 m2 of warehousing and 7,000 m2 of car storage facilities.

Originally based in Paris, France, TRADEX FRANCE opened its offices in Dubaï, UAE (@TRADEX FRANCE – UAE), in 2022 in order to meet its customers' logistics requirements as effectively as possible.

With a multicultural team based on both countries, and more than 100 employees, TRADEX FRANCE supports its customers all around the world (more than 50 countries) offering them the right products at the best prices, with a tailor-made logistics solution.

Description:
Automotive Business Solutions (ABS) is the premier administrator of warranty solutions in the automotive aftermarket. Our core programs include nationwide parts & labor repair warranties for national accounts and their affiliated automotive repair facilities, nationwide road hazard programs for national accounts and tire dealers, and component specific warranties (batteries, brakes, etc.).

Established in 2001, ABS is nationally recognized for its superior customer service and for the fastest, most effective claims payment in the industry. While our ASE Certified technicians provide unsurpassed, expert claims adjudication, our clients appreciate the fact that we pay claims in minutes – not hours, days, or weeks.

We possess a unique combination of experience and expert skills that is difficult to find in any other company – that, along with the fact that we simplify processes and take a common sense approach to warranty administration, sets us apart from other administrators and allows us to provide the best value in the industry.

Name: Brakecrafters
Description:
Since its inception in 2013, Brakecrafters has evolved from a small storefront in Cave Creek, Arizona to a recognized e-commerce platform for all motorcycle braking requirements. We have made our mark in the industry through our vast variety of high-quality kits and products. This, coupled with our commitment to superior customer service, has propelled brakecrafters.com to become one of the fastest-growing sites for motorcycle enthusiasts across the nation.

As we have continuously evolved to cater to our customer's needs, our growth trajectory led us to outgrow our initial Arizona facility. In our pursuit of expansion, we sought a larger facility that could accommodate an increased inventory and a growing team to ensure the continued quality of service that our customers have come to expect.

In our quest, we found the perfect match in Troy, Ohio. Our new facility, strategically located in the heartland of America, offers us the advantage of improved distribution channels throughout the country. This new, expansive space has allowed us to widen our product offerings without compromising our dedication to delivering top customer service in the industry.

For us, the future looks like a vast, open road just waiting to be explored. We at Brakecrafters are thrilled about what lies ahead and invite you to join us on this exhilarating journey.

Description:

We have a legacy of over 60 years in the world of trucks, NPR group were pioneers of commercial vehicle finance and then diversified to automobile dealerships 40 years back. Name: Kalibre Alüminyum
Description:
Kalibre Holding,1978’den bugüne gelecek nesillere daha sürdürülebilir bir çalışma ortamı bırakabilmek için dünyaya olan etkisinin farkında ve bilincinde olarak doğru adımlar atmayı görev bilmektedir. Her zaman inovasyon ve sürekli gelişim ilkesinden yola çıkarak, teknolojinin gelişmesiyle birlikte, yeni tip araçların daha hafif olması gerekliliği sonucu, alüminyum parça kullanımının yaygınlaşmasının ardından ortaya çıkan pazar ihtiyacına yönelik olarak 2016 yılında Kalibre Alüminyum tesisini hayata geçirmiştir.Kalibre Alüminyum, kuruluşundan itibaren pazardaki talep artışı doğrultusunda kendini sürekli geliştirerek, müşteri ihtiyaçlarına uygun üretime önem vermekte, bu yönde gerçekleşen teknolojik gelişmeleri yakından takip etmektedir. Sürdürülebilir bir üretim için Holding, Alüminyum Döküm Tesisi’nin de temelini atmış, yenilikçi bakış açısını ve kararlı ilerleyişini sürdürerek çevre ve topluma verilen yüksek değerin ardından, Türkiye ekonomisine katkıda bulunan uygulamaları başarı ile sürdürmektedir.


To leave a more sustainable working and living environment for future generations, Kalibre Holding has taken the proper steps since 1978 by being aware of its impact on the world. With the effect of ever-developing technology, the need for new vehicles to become lighter appears, and the use of aluminum parts becomes widespread. Based on the principle of constant innovation and continuous development, Kalibre actualized its Aluminum plant in 2016 to fulfill the market needs. Since its establishment, Kalibre Aluminum has improved itself in line with the increase in demand of the market by minding a production that meets the customers' needs and keeping abreast of technological developments in the field. Kalibre Holding maintains its innovative perspective and steady progress to hold sustainable production and founded the Aluminum Casting Plant. Besides the value it attributes to the environment and society, it also continues its practices to contribute Turkish economy.

Name: FORD SURSEE
Description:
Die CENTRALGARAGE SURSEE AG ist ein waschechtes Familienunternehmen. Seit 1930 ist die Sicherstellung der Mobilität, der Mittelpunkt des täglichen Wirkens. Der innere Antrieb jedes Mitarbeiters ist es, den Interessenten und Kunden, ein positives Erlebnis und die optimale Lösung für deren Herausforderungen zu kreieren.

Die CENTRALGARAGE SURSEE AG bürgt mit ihrem Namen für ein lösungsorientiertes Handeln, Qualität bei Beratung und Arbeit, sowie Ehrlichkeit und Transparenz. 

Seit über 70 Jahren konzentriert sich die CENTRALGARAGE SURSEE AG voll und ganz auf die Marke FORD!

Der Verkauf von europäischen und amerikanischen FORD-Modellen (Personenwagen + Nutzfahrzeuge) wird mit viel Begeisterung und Herzblut gelebt. 
Der Verkauf von Neuwagen & Gebrauchtwagen basiert auf den Grundlagen von Angebot und Nachfrage und ist Vertrauenssache! 

Das Herzstück des Betriebs ist die Werkstatt mit den bestens ausgebildeten Mitarbeitern und den nötigen Werkzeugen. Wartung, Diagnose und Reparatur gehören zur Kernkompetenz des Werkstatt-Teams. 

Auch nach dem Kauf eines FORD, ist es das oberste Gebot, die Kunden mit ihren Fahrzeugen professionell und fair zu bedienen. 

Um all dies gewährleisten zu können, bildet die CENTRALGARAGE SURSEE AG angehende Berufsleute aus. Automobil-Mechatroniker oder sogar Diagnostiker sind stetig in Ausbildung und garantieren, dass die Hochtechnologie-Ford-Modelle der nahen Zukunft bei der CENTRALGARAGE SURSEE AG in besten Händen sind!

CENTRALGARAGE SURSEE AG und FORD 
…. ein unschlagbares Team.

Name: Skuba Benelux
Description:
SKUBA GROUP (www.skuba.nl) – een van de grootste distributeurs van reserveonderdelen voor vrachtwagens en trailers in Europa. Gedurende 30 jaar van activiteit heeft de groep het bedrijf in 16 Europese landen ontwikkeld met meer dan 1100 werknemers, wiens professionaliteit en competentie SKUBA GROUP hielpen om het betrouwbare en professionele imago van het bedrijf bij onze klanten te bereiken: distributeurs van reserveonderdelen, vrachtwagenwerkplaatsen, transportbedrijven en officiële truck dealers.
De belangrijkste werkingsprincipes van SKUBA GROUP zijn de levering van een breed assortiment reserveonderdelen, variërend van origineel tot alternatief, tegen een aantrekkelijke prijs en snelle leveringen. Onder onze 200 vaste wereldwijde leveranciers bevinden zich bekende wereldreuzen. De Groep streeft ernaar haar klanten een breed scala aan reserveonderdelen te leveren, zodat deze 100 procent tevreden zijn.
SKUBA Benelux B.V. (www.skuba.biz) is een dochteronderneming van UAB SKUBA, dat in 2021 is opgericht. SKUBA Benelux B.V. betreedt de Benelux-markt met als doel om de komende jaren een van de Topspelers te worden. Om deze reden is Skuba Benelux op zoek naar nieuwe mensen die zich willen aansluiten bij een van de grootste distributeurs in Europa en deel willen uitmaken van ons team.

Name: AD Serca
Description:
En 1958, hace 66 años, fue fundada REPUESTOS SERCA, una pequeña tienda dedicada a la venta de recambios para el automóvil, situada en el centro de Alicante, con una plantilla de 6 empleados, una bicicleta y un Citroën 2CV como únicos medios de distribución.

Con el transcurrir de los años, REPUESTOS SERCA se fue afianzando en el mercado y pasó a formar parte del grupo AD PARTS en España, siendo socio fundador del mismo.

Año tras año, la red de sucursales de REPUESTOS SERCA se ha ido ampliando, llegando a tener en la actualidad 26 tiendas mas el centro logístico situado en Alicante, contando con más de 300 empleados y 200 vehículos, ocupando una superficie de más de 40.000 m2.

Desde nuestros orígenes, la filosofía de REPUESTOS SERCA ha contado con dos valores fundamentales: la atención al cliente y su satisfacción. Hoy, con la experiencia que nos aporta una trayectoria de 60 años, estos valores han convertido a REPUESTOS SERCA en un referente en el sector de la distribución del recambio.

Name: OK Distribuidora Automotiva
Description:
Nossa história teve início há 39 anos, na cidade de Taquara-RS, em setembro de 1986. De origem familiar e com princípios de valorização do ser humano, trabalhamos dia a dia para que nossos clientes tenham excelência no atendimento, através de produtos e serviços que entreguem solução, rapidez e segurança. 

Líder de mercado na região do Vale do Paranhana, nos tornamos referência no segmento automotivo por oferecer um portfólio completo e variado de marcas e produtos, com foco na distribuição e venda por atacado, além de oferecermos atendimento especializado. Com diversidade no perfil de atendimento e uma estratégia moderna de posicionamento de mercado, atingimos cidades de todo o Rio Grande do Sul. Nosso time conta com centenas de colaboradores, lotados nas nossas unidades de Taquara, Osório, Novo Hamburgo, Canoas e Torres. Nosso sistema de logística é moderno, contamos com uma ampla cobertura de atendimento através de frota própria e parceria com as melhores transportadoras, que viabilizam uma entrega sempre nos melhores prazos do mercado.

Sem perder nossa essência e nossa cultura, implantamos, nos últimos anos, um novo modelo de gestão, dedicado no crescimento com segurança e garantindo sustentabilidade do negócio. Nosso olhar para o futuro nos direcionou para o desenvolvimento de novos e melhores serviços para nossos clientes. Por isso, investimos numa equipe própria de tecnologia, que desenvolve projetos de inovação, como nossa plataforma de e-commerce OK+, que cresce com bastante solidez, oferecendo diversos benefícios para o dia a dia dos negócios e faz parte da rotina de compra de nossos clientes.

Description:
Grupo Bartolome somos uno de los mayores grupos de automoción en España. Adicionalmente, contamos con gbocasion.com, un portal dedicado a la comercialización de vehículos de ocasión y con nuestra Gestoría Bartolomé, empresa especializada en seguros de todo tipo, productos financieros de ahorro e inversión. matriculaciones, transferencias y gestiones de tramitación de documentaciones vehículos.

Hemos recorrido un largo camino desde que en 1961 nuestros fundadores D. Bernardo Ginés Bartolomé Sanz y Dña. Sagrario Sanz Miguel iniciaron su andadura con un pequeño taller como punto de la RED RENAULT, como Agente en la localidad de Colmenar Viejo. 

En todo este tiempo, la dimensión de nuestra compañía ha cambiado, pero siempre hemos mantenido inalterable la idea y los valores que nos han llevado hasta el día de hoy: nuestros clientes son el centro de todo cuanto hacemos.

Buscar la mejora continua como esencia y generar ideas creativas e innovadoras en todos los ámbitos de nuestras empresas y para nuestros clientes, a través de tres pilares: nuestro equipo humano un valor de nuestra compañía, la mejora de medios técnicos de última generación y la integridad como compromiso hacia nuestros clientes.

Grupo Bartolome introduce en toda la gestión criterios de Responsabilidad Social como garantía para su competitividad, la seguridad y el desarrollo de su personal para la mejora constante de todos los proyectos con un alto nivel de calidad y el mínimo impacto medioambiental.

Name: VBD Parts
Description:
VBD Parts nasce con l’obiettivo di offrire alle officine e alle carrozzerie un riferimento moderno, competente e affidabile per la fornitura di ricambi automotive. Il nostro modello si basa su una distribuzione integrata che comprende ricambi originali Mopar per i veicoli Stellantis, componenti aftermarket provenienti da partner diretti e una selezione crescente di prodotti a marchio proprietario.
Dal nostro hub logistico in provincia di Brescia serviamo direttamente il Nord Italia con fino a 3 cut-off giornalieri, mentre il resto del Paese è raggiunto grazie ai vettori più affidabili. Il magazzino, evoluto e supportato da tecnologie verticali avanzate, offre oltre 50.000 referenze in pronta consegna, garantendo rapidità e precisione nella gestione delle richieste.

Accanto alla distribuzione, investiamo nella costruzione di relazioni solide con i produttori e nell’offerta di servizi utili alla crescita delle officine: formazione tecnica, supporto dedicato, strumenti digitali e un approccio orientato alla qualità e alla continuità operativa.

Il nostro ecommerce ricambi auto rappresenta l'estensione naturale di questo ecosistema. Attraverso un’unica piattaforma è possibile consultare il catalogo completo dei partner diretti, verificare disponibilità e compatibilità dei ricambi, acquistare in autonomia e con semplicità, integrando il proprio lavoro quotidiano con uno strumento pensato per ridurre i tempi, minimizzare gli errori e migliorare la programmazione degli interventi.

Ogni funzionalità - dalla ricerca per targa ai suggerimenti di componenti correlati - è progettata per facilitare le attività dell’officina, rendendo la scelta del ricambio più rapida e informata.

VBD Parts è questo: persone, competenze, tecnologia e una visione chiara. Essere al fianco degli operatori del settore, accompagnandoli in un mercato che evolve e offrendo strumenti concreti per affrontare al meglio ogni sfida.

Name: Autobacs India
Description:
Welcome to Autobacs India – Your Ultimate Destination for Car Enthusiasts!

At Autobacs India, we are more than just a car accessories store; we are your partners in enhancing, customizing and maintaining your beloved vehicles. With a passion for automobiles and a commitment to excellence, we have established ourselves as a one-stop shop for all your automotive needs.

Our diverse range of high-quality aftermarket products is carefully curated to cater to every car enthusiast's desires. From performance upgrades and stylish modifications to cutting-edge electronics and interior comforts, we offer an extensive selection that allows you to truly make your vehicle your own.

But that's not all – our expertise extends beyond just products. Our skilled technicians are dedicated to providing top-notch vehicle detailing, ensuring that your car not only performs at its best but also turns heads with its pristine appearance. Whether it's a thorough interior cleaning, a paint correction, or a protective ceramic coating, our detailing services guarantee a showroom-worthy finish.

When it comes to maintenance and servicing, Autobacs India stands out as a trusted partner. Our experienced mechanics are equipped to handle a wide array of services, from routine oil changes and brake inspections to complex engine diagnostics and repairs. Your vehicle's health and longevity are our top priorities.

As passionate car enthusiasts, we understand the thrill and pride that come with owning a vehicle. That's why Autobacs India is dedicated to delivering a seamless shopping experience, unparalleled expertise, and the highest quality products and services. Whether you're a seasoned car enthusiast or a first-time car owner, join us in our journey to elevate your driving experience to new heights.

Explore Autobacs India today and unlock a world of automotive possibilities. Your journey towards automotive excellence starts here!

Description: Firma OPOLTRANS jest jednym z największych w Polsce dystrybutorem części zamiennych i materiałów eksploatacyjnych do pojazdów użytkowych. Główna siedziba firmy wraz z magazynem centralnym mieści się w Opolu (Brzezie). Ogromny wybór części udogadnia zamówienia, a flota samochodowa zapewnia codzienne dostawy części zamiennych zgodnie z wymaganiami klientów pod wskazany adres. Firma kładzie duży nacisk na ekologię, dlatego też we flocie zaczęły pojawiać się dostawcze auta elektryczne, a nasze oddziały wyposażamy w panele fotowoltaiczne, banki energii oraz pompy ciepła. Sieć hurtowni rozmieszczona w dużych miastach Polski pozwala na szeroki obszar działania, a dobrze wyszkoleni handlowcy zapewniają profesjonalną obsługę klientów.

Trigano a deux activités :
- les véhicules de loisirs (plus de 90 % des ventes cette année) – caravanes, camping-cars,
résidences mobiles et leurs accessoires.
- les équipements de loisirs – remorques, équipement du jardin et matériel de camping.

Après son entrée en bourse en 1998 suivie d’acquisitions principalement dans le secteur du camping-car, Trigano s’est hissé au rang de leader européen du véhicule de loisirs.

We mainly specialized in high science and technology

Name: Driven Distribution Group
Description:
Powering Excellence in Automotive Aftermarket Distribution. 

Driven Distribution Group is a leader in the automotive aftermarket distribution industry, bringing together a powerhouse of brands dedicated to innovation, integrity, and strategic partnerships. As a parent company, we empower our brands with the tools, technology, and expertise they need to excel in an ever-changing market. Our goal is to help each brand deliver best-in-class customer service and unmatched value to their customers.

We transform challenges into opportunities for growth and long-term success. By offering strategic support and fostering collaboration, we enable our brands to streamline operations, drive innovation, and build strong customer relationships.

Our Mission
At Driven Distribution Group, we are committed to powering excellence in the automotive aftermarket distribution industry. Through innovation, support, and strategic leadership, we help our brands stay ahead of industry trends and become the "First Call" for their customers.

Why Partner with Driven Distribution Group?
+ Operational Support: We provide tools and resources to help brands improve efficiency, scale operations, and attract top talent.
+ Industry Expertise: With decades of experience, we offer insights and best practices that strengthen our brands' market positions.
+ Innovation & Growth: We foster a culture of continuous improvement, helping brands expand and adapt to a dynamic marketplace.
+ Collaborative Partnerships: We emphasize transparency and teamwork, working together to solve challenges and drive success.
+ Enhanced Buying Power & Technology: Our collective buying power and cutting-edge technologies help our brands deliver superior results and stay competitive.

We lead the way in automotive aftermarket distribution, driving progress, building trust, and fueling growth. Join us to be be part of a community that drives brands forward.

Name: Alfa Scorpii
Description:
Alfa Scorpii telah Berkecimpung didunia bisnis otomotif selama lebih dari 30 tahun sebagai main dealer sepeda motor merk YAMAHA di 4 propinsi, yakni NAD, Sumatra Utara, Riau Daratan, dan Riau Kepulauan. Tepat pada tanggal 25 Agustus 1987. Alfa Scorpii mulai beroperasi dengan kantor di jalan HM Yamin Medan. Alfa Scorpii mengukuhkan tekad untuk mengharumkan nama besar YAMAHA yang sempat absen 10 tahun dari dunia otomotif Indonesia. 5 tahun bukan jangka waktu yang pendek untuk memberi fondasi perusahaan ini. Bagaikan filosofi tumbuhan bambu, Alfa Scorpii membangun akar yang kuat dengan membangun sistem manajemen yang kokoh. Fleksibel namun kuat seperti batang-batang bambu yang elastis tapi tidak mudah patah.

Seiring perkembangan dari tahun ke tahun, Alfa Scorpii terus maju dan berkembang dan memiliki kantor pusat yang berada di jalan H. Adam Malik No. 34 Medan dan memiliki lebih dari 3000 karyawan serta lebih dari 60 cabang yang tersebar di wilayah Alfa Scorpii.

Name: Ribatti Veicoli Industriali
Description:
Per la famiglia Ribatti la passione per i Camion nasce nel lontano 1958, grazie all’intraprendenza del nonno Michele Ribatti nel commercio dei veicoli industriali. 
Figlio di un commerciante di paglia e fieno che, diventato uomo, decide di dedicarsi alla compravendita di veicoli usati pesanti.

Negli anni ‘70 la realtà si consolida con Antonio Ribatti, figlio di Michele, che muove i primi passi nel campo dell’imprenditoria e dà vita alla Ribatti Veicoli Industriali, crescendo insieme all’azienda e facendo germogliare ciò che suo padre aveva seminato. 

La terza generazione Ribatti è oggi già attiva con Michele, Francesca e Luca, che già da qualche tempo lavorano attivamente nell’organizzazione pugliese. 

Una realtà solida, storica e riconosciuta in tutto il settore dell’automotive, portata avanti con l’impegno degli oltre 40 professionisti che la compongono: venditori professionali, consulenti dei servizi finanziari, meccanici specializzati, master driver e così via. 

Tale realtà si rende affidabile anche grazie all’assistenza e disponibilità di una fitta rete di officine autorizzate lungo tutto il territorio della Puglia e del Molise. 

Oggi la Ribatti Veicoli Industriali copre tutti i segmenti dei trasporti pesanti:

- Concessionaria Scania per le regioni Puglia e Molise. (>14.5 ton)
- Concessionaria Isuzu per la Puglia. (< 14 ton)
- Concessionaria Piaggio per la provincia BAT e Foggia. (< 3 ton) 
- Concessionaria Lamberet per la Puglia (semirimorchi refrigerati). 
- Concessionaria Kogel (rimorchi e semirimorchi). 

Ribatti Veicoli Industriali, Personalizza ciò che ami!

Name: Açsa Otomotiv
Description:
Uzun yıllara dayanan otomotiv sektöründeki tecrübesini 1996 yılından beri araç ısıtma sistemleri konusundaki faaliyetleri ile birleştirmiştir. Açsa, 2001 yılında Eberspächer motordan bağımsız araç ısıtma sistemleri Türkiye temsilciliğini alarak bu köklü firmanın Türkiye’deki adresi olmuştur. Türkiye genelinde 80 civarındaki yetkili servis ağı ve İstanbul‘daki merkez servisiyle Eberspächer ısıtma sistemi kullanıcılarına servis sağlamaktadır. Açsa hem OEM (Fabrika Montaj) hem de Aftermarket (Araca sonradan montaj)’e ürün sağlayıcı olarak önemli otomotiv firmalarıyla birlikte çalışmaktadır. 

Teknoloji harikası Eberspächer araç ısıtma sistemleri yanında İtalyan IndelB araç klima sistemleri (Sleeping well) ile IndelB araç buzdolaplarının Türkiye temsilciliği de Açsa Otomotiv tarafından yürütülmektedir. Ayrıca, çok soğuk bölgelerde dizel yakıtın donmasını önleyen Articfox dizel yakıt hattı ve yakıt deposu ısıtma sistemlerini de Açsa tarafından Türkiye pazarına sunulmaktadır. Eberspächer markası ile markete sunulan Ebercool motordan bağımsız klima sistemleri Açsa’nın ürün yelpazesindedir.

Dirna Bergstorm'un Eberspächer markasıyla (Cooltronic, Duratronic) ve henüz Eberspächer markası olmaksızın (Bycool) sunduğu elektrikli klima grubu da Açsa tarafından Türkiye piyasasına sunulmaktadır. 

Açsa için her şeyden önce kaliteli ürün satmak, sattığı ürünün arkasında durmak, sattıktan sonra bu ürünlere gerekli servisi profesyonelce sağlamak ve daha da önemlisi güven ve samimiyet esastır.

Entrepro est là pour vous accompagner dans vos projets.

Pourquoi choisir Entrepro ?

Rejoignez la communauté des professionnels de l’automobile qui nous font déjà confiance et laissez-nous vous accompagner avec passion et professionnalisme dans toutes vos opérations.

Name: Dejonckheere Group
Description:
Al van jongs af aan gepassioneerd door auto's, richtten Leen en Christophe in 2005 Dejonckheere group op, een familiebedrijf dat zich richt op de premium automarkt.

Met prestigieuze merken zoals 𝐁𝐌𝐖, 𝐌𝐈𝐍𝐈, 𝐉𝐚𝐠𝐮𝐚𝐫 en 𝐋𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐑𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫 zijn wij uitgegroeid tot een toonaangevende speler in de premiumsector in onze regio.

Ons doel is om veel meer te bieden dan enkel een auto. Wij streven ernaar om een 𝐮𝐧𝐢𝐞𝐤𝐞 𝐤𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 te creëren, gebaseerd op 𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐰𝐞𝐧, 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐨𝐨𝐧𝐥𝐢𝐣𝐤𝐞 𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞 en 𝐧𝐚𝐛𝐢𝐣𝐡𝐞𝐢𝐝.

Met onze vestigingen in 𝐑𝐨𝐞𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐚𝐫𝐞, 𝐁𝐫𝐮𝐠𝐠𝐞, 𝐃𝐨𝐨𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐤 𝐞𝐧 𝐊𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐣𝐤, combineren we innovatie met familiale traditie om de beste service te garanderen.

Dankzij 𝐑𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐒𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 bieden we ook flexibele mobiliteitsoplossingen aan. Ervaar de Dejonckheere-aanpak en beleef het verschil!

---

Passionnés par l'automobile depuis toujours, Leen et Christophe ont fondé le Groupe Dejonckheere en 2005, une entreprise familiale dédiée à l'univers des véhicules premium. 

Représentant des marques prestigieuses telles que 𝐁𝐌𝐖, 𝐌𝐈𝐍𝐈, 𝐉𝐚𝐠𝐮𝐚𝐫 et 𝐋𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐑𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫, nous nous sommes imposés comme un acteur majeur du secteur premium dans notre région. 

Notre objectif est d'offrir bien plus qu’une voiture. Nous souhaitons offrir une 𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐞́𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐜𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐮𝐧𝐢𝐪𝐮𝐞 basée sur la 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐟𝐢𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞, le 𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐞́ et la 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐱𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐭𝐞́.

Avec nos concessions à 𝐑𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐞𝐫𝐬, 𝐁𝐫𝐮𝐠𝐞𝐬, 𝐓𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐧𝐚𝐢 et 𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐢, nous combinons innovation et tradition familiale pour garantir un service de qualité. 

Grâce à 𝐑𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐒𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬, nous proposons également des solutions de mobilité flexibles. Découvrez l’approche Dejonckheere et vivez la différence !

Name: Autobase Brescia Srl
Description:
Autobase da 36 anni si preoccupa di selezionare i migliori marchi automobilistici ed i migliori servizi di mobilità automobilistica per i propri clienti a Brescia. Autobase nasce come concessionaria Renault: un marchio ed un dealer solidi e affidabili che negli anni hanno regalato grandi soddisfazioni ai propri clienti.
Nel 2010 Autobase ha sentito il bisogno e la voglia di rinnovarsi, selezionando nuovi marchi da proporre alla propria clientela, lasciando  immutati lo spirito ed il knowhow che negli anni hanno reso Autobase un punto di riferimento  a Brescia, per la vendita e l'assistenza.
Hyundai e Mazda, due Marchi relativamente nuovi per il mercato Europeo, italiano e Bresciano in particolare. Due Marchi dalle grandi ambizioni, come solo 2 popoli come il Coreano, Hyundai, ed il Giapponese, Mazda, sanno avere.
Oggi, oltre che essere rappresentante dei Marchi citati, Autobase ha allargato i propri orizzonti, seguendo le nuove sfide del mercato automobilistico e della mobilità a 360°. Autobase Mobility Store, emanazione diretta di Ald, società leader del noleggio a lungo termine, ne è la prova.
Oggi siamo in grado di offrire ai nostri clienti tutto ciò che riguarda il mondo auto e moto. In questa stagione di grandi cambiamenti offriamo il noleggio a lungo termine, a differenza del mercato attuale, come pacchetto completo con un unico interlocutore, NOI!
OFFERTA, CONSEGNA, ASSISTENZA sino ALLA RICONSEGNA! Nessuno come noi!

I Nostri consulenti commerciali sono costantemente aggiornati sui prodotti e sulle offerte possibili, oltre che sulle promozioni in atto. Il consulente commerciale di Autobase è un vero consulente, non un venditore o commesso. Vi accompagnerà durante la vostra decisione cercando di offrirvi il prodotto, il contratto ed i servizi con il miglior rapporto qualità prezzo.

Name: Auto Electric Service Ltd.
Description:
Auto Electric Service Ltd. is Southern Saskatchewan’s largest locally owned and operated automotive parts warehouse.  We began doing business in Regina in 1943 and have remained a local owner operated business. The experience we have gained in each of our almost 80 years of business will assist us in continuing to provide our customers with the very best customer service in the province.

We service the automotive retail and wholesale markets, as well as the autobody, agriculture and industrial markets with stores in five Saskatchewan locations.

In 1948 our first branch was established in Yorkton; followed by Estevan, established in 1957; and Weyburn, established in 1962. In 1975 Mainline Fleet Service was established in Regina to service our fleet and industrial markets.

Driven to enhance the success and safety of our retail, automotive and light industrial clients in Southern Saskatchewan, Auto Electric Servuce Ltd. has the knowledgeable staff, quality products, and value added services you need.

We are a member of Auto Value, an auto parts buying group, which is one of the largest automotive parts distribution associations in North America. Auto Value traces its roots back to the earliest days of program groups in the automotive aftermarket, founded in 1976. 

To strengthen our ability to serve industrial markets in 2019 we joined the Industrial & Safety Division of AD. AD is a member-owned organization, passionate about bringing growth-oriented independent distributors and best-in-class supplier partners together with the purpose to outperform the market and to stay ahead of the competition. AD is North America’s largest marketing/buying group for construction and industrial supplies.

In partnering with AD we are able to leverage unique economies of scale that give us competitive pricing, access to a wide variety of goods and top tier suppliers and other program benefits that rival those of large chains.

Name: Eureco
Description:
Eureco Italia srl è distributore ufficiale per l’Italia di veicoli elettrici, comunemente chiamati golf car e utility car, anche omologati per circolazione su strada.
I marchi di cui Eureco è distributore autorizzato sono Club Car (made in U.S.A.) Garia (Made in Denmark) riconosciuti come marchi leader del settore in termini di efficienza e di valore duraturo.

È un’azienda giovane e dinamica che, in breve tempo e grazie alla tenacia del proprio staff, si è distinta per la sua professionalità e competenza in ambito elettrico.
Eureco nasce nel 2012 da una passione per il gioco del golf e dalla necessità di individuare nuove opportunità commerciali in ambito green e della mobilità sostenibile.
Noi di Eureco abbiamo iniziato da anni a promuovere questo mercato, proponendo golf car e utility car con elevate prestazioni tecniche.
L’innovazione fondamentale è la totale assenza di emissioni e la silenziosità dei veicoli elettrici.
Oltre al classico uso nei golf club o campi da golf per i più appassionati al gioco, vengono impiegati nei villaggi turistici e resort per il trasporti ospiti e bagagli, per servizi di pulizia e di manutenzione del verde, come bar mobile e catering per gli ospiti.
Risultano essere molto utili anche nei porti turistici e nelle darsene, come anche nel settore aeroportuale per ridurre i tempi di percorrenza della vigilanza in caso di emergenza.
Trovano impiego anche presso le aziende agricole e vinicole, ma soprattutto nel settore industriale grazie a speciali allestimenti, che si adattano alle esigenze del lavoro di cui sono ausilio fondamentale.
Nel settore pubblico, le golf car più richieste sono quelle omologate, ideali per circolare su strada e utilizzate per accedere nelle aree pedonali o nei centri storici con aree a traffico limitato.

Parlare di e-mobility oggi, non è più un qualcosa di astratto perché la “rivoluzione green” è ormai un dato di fatto, non ci resta che viverla.

Chi ci sceglie sposa anche la nostra filosofia eco-sostenibile.

Name: SEEAG
Description:
With more than 30 years of experience, SEEAG has built a powerful legacy in the automotive markets of South-Eastern Europe — and is now expanding its expertise across the Nordic and Baltic regions. Our story is one of continuous growth, driven by a deep understanding of diverse markets, evolving regulations, and local consumer behavior.

SEEAG is a group of companies with a long tradition of representing and developing automotive brands. Over the years, we have paved the way for names such as Chrysler-Jeep-Dodge, SAAB, Kia, Volvo Cars, Geely Auto, KGM, SsangYong Motor, Lynk & Co, Farizon, and, most recently, Zeekr — joining our portfolio in 2025 as part of our continued strategic collaboration with the Geely Group.

Founded in 1991 with the import of Chrysler-Jeep, SEEAG has consistently been among the pioneers introducing new global brands to Europe — from the first Korean entrants in the 1990s to the new generation of premium electric and connected vehicles today.

We operate through dedicated regional headquarters in Ljubljana and Copenhagen, supported by offices in Dubai and a global team of experts. Our in-house competencies include IT development, marketing and communications, sales and technical training, and parts logistics, ensuring full-spectrum operational support for our partners.

At SEEAG, we don’t just represent brands — we build them. Our mission is to connect automotive innovation with European consumers through knowledge, agility, and passion.

Name: Automagenta srl
Description:
Automagenta è concessionaria ufficiale per i Brand Citroën, DS Automobiles, KIA, Opel, Peugeot e Leapmotor per le province di Milano, Novara e Vercelli. 

Giunta alla terza generazione di imprenditori, Automagenta conta oggi su 5 Sedi (Magenta, Abbiategrasso, Cornaredo, Novara, Vercelli) e rappresenta uno dei principali dealer di riferimento dei Brand Citroën, DS Automobiles, KIA, Opel e Peugeot sui territori dell'Hinterland Ovest di Milano e nelle province di Novara e Vercelli. 

Automagenta nasce a Magenta nel 1969 da un'intuizione del Sig. Corno Egidio, che decide di puntare tra i primi in Italia sulla costituzione di una concessionaria esclusiva del marchio francese Citroën, spinto dalla passione per le iconiche DS e 2CV.  

Nel corso degli anni ha ampliato la propria offerta con nuove sedi a ampliando il proprio portafoglio brand anche a DS (2015), KIA (2019), Opel e Peugeot (2023) e ultima arrivata Leapmotor (2024).

Name: Pirelli Tyres Australia
Description:
Pirelli was founded in Milan in 1872 and today stands as a global brand known for its cutting edge technology, high-end production excellence and passion for innovation that draws heavily on its Italian roots. 
With its 5 regions (EMEA, APAC, NA, LATAM, RUSSIA & NORDICS), 19 production plants in 12 countries and a commercial presence in over 160, Pirelli has around 31,500 employees and had a turnover in 2018 of about 5.2 billion Euros. Pirelli is a Pure Consumer Tyre Company, producing tyres and services related for cars, motorcycles and bicycles, and has a particular focus on the High Value tyre market. 
Pirelli’s technological excellence is also nourished by the innovation and competencies derived from sporting competitions, in which it has been active for over 110 years. At present, the company participates in over 460 car and motorcycle sport events and since 2011 it has been the exclusive tyre supplier to the Formula One World Championship. Such a strong presence in motorsport enables Pirelli to generate avant-garde solutions that are then transferred tyre ranges for the Consumer market, ensuring the maximum levels of performance and safety.
All of this has grown from a strong commitment to research and development based on an “Open Innovation” model. In 2018, Pirelli’s investment in R&D equaled 6.1% of its revenues from high value products, one of the highest levels among the world’s major tyre producers. Pirelli boasts over 1,900 people engaged in R&D located at its Milan headquarters and 12 local technology centres and a portfolio of 6,500 patents.
The Pirelli brand is known around the world as an icon of technology and excellence. Represented by the “capital P” logo for more than a century, the Pirelli name stands for a premium, high-end style with an Italian heritage all underlined by its distinctive position as a supplier to luxury car manufacturers.

Name: Chicago Parts & Sound Enterprises
Description:
Chicago Parts & Sound (CPS) was founded in 1978 to provide value added products and services to car dealerships.

Since 1978, Chicago Parts and Sound has been helping car dealerships improve profitability by providing value added products and services. This in turn allows dealerships to achieve high levels of customer satisfaction. CPS has developed a unique business in driving the sale of OEM accessories through franchised dealers. This success has resulted in CPS achieving a greater relationship with Ford Motor Company as an exclusive distributor and representative of Ford’s Genuine and Licensed Accessories.

CPS is no longer just a parts distributor, we also provide a solid and dependable service. In fact, providing a quality service is our top priority. We are equipped and experienced to take care of our customers via our fleet of over 70 delivery vehicles and over 220 employees. Plus, we have 24-7 on-line support along with extended service hours staffed with experienced consultants .

In the end, everything we do is to ensure happy, profitable customers. Our business succeeds when you succeed.

Mission Statement

Going Beyond Parts. One Partnership at a time.

Vision Statement

Beyond having the right parts at the right place and price, CPS provides our clients with relationship-based Automotive Supply Warehouse experience.

Wij blijven graag in contact met onze klanten. Daarom horen we het graag als u suggesties, tips, vragen of opmerkingen heeft.

Met vriendelijke groet,

team FLEVO Mobiel

Description:

Name: Al Ras Auto A/C Spare Parts Trading
Description:
Welcome to Alras Auto A/C Spare Parts, the premier destination for all your automotive air conditioning needs since 1996. As a trusted partner in the industry, we have built affiliations with leading manufacturers from around the globe, including the USA, Singapore, Taiwan, Malaysia, Japan, Korea, Thailand, and India. Our advanced logistics ensure seamless delivery across the Middle East, distinguishing us as industry leaders. From compressors, condensers, and evaporators to valves, filters, and accessories, Alras is your comprehensive solution. Backed by a skilled team and the region's largest inventory, we provide high-quality products across various price ranges.

Our mission is to simplify your selection process with the right parts, brands, and prices, along with precise installation and service. With 18 strategically located branches across the Middle East, including Bahrain, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE, Alras delivers seamless service wherever you are.

At Alras Auto A/C Spare Parts, customer satisfaction is our priority. Whether you're a retailer, wholesaler, or service center, count on us for timely solutions tailored to your needs. Discover why industry professionals across the region choose Alras. Connect with us today for your automotive air conditioning spare parts needs.

When you think auto AC, think Alras!

Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in de verkoop van jong gebruikte auto’s – zorgvuldig geselecteerd en met aandacht klaargemaakt. Geen snelle praatjes, geen poespas. Elke auto in onze showroom is met zorg ingekocht en voorbereid. Of het nu gaat om een sportieve hatchback, een comfortabele gezinsauto of een luxe SUV – wij geloven dat jouw volgende auto meer moet zijn dan alleen vervoer. Het moet kloppen. Qua gevoel, kwaliteit én prijs.

SPD Automotive is gevestigd in Dokkum en richt zich op Noord-Nederland, maar onze klanten komen uit het hele land. Waarom? Omdat we zeggen wat we doen, en doen wat we beloven. Persoonlijk advies, eerlijke prijzen en heldere communicatie maken bij ons het verschil.

Zoek je een betrouwbare auto met een service zoals je die eigenlijk overal zou willen? Dan ben je bij SPD aan het juiste adres.

Name: Alcoholslot Auto
Description:
Alcoholslot Auto zet zich in voor veiliger verkeer in Nederland. Ons doel: voorkomen dat mensen onder invloed achter het stuur stappen. Dat doen we met alcoholsloten – slimme apparaten die alleen het voertuig starten na een blaastest. Ze zijn inzetbaar voor zowel particulieren als bedrijven en vormen een krachtige gedragsinterventie om rijden onder invloed te voorkomen.

Waarom?
- In ongeveer 1 op de 4 dodelijke verkeersongevallen in de EU speelt alcohol een rol.
- Tot wel 2% van alle kilometers wordt gereden met een te hoog alcoholpromillage - dat lijkt weinig, maar de gevolgen zijn enorm!
- Bij een alcoholpromillage van 0,5‰ of meer is het risico op een ongeluk al 1,4 keer zo groot.
- Bij 1,0‰ stijgt dat risico naar bijna 5 keer zo groot.
- En bij 1,5‰ is de kans op een ongeluk zelfs 20 keer hoger

Voor wie veilig en verantwoord wil rijden, bieden we professionele alcoholsloten – geschikt voor zowel particulieren als bedrijven. Bedrijven krijgen daarbij de mogelijkheid tot live-inzicht in testresultaten en gebruiksdata. Daarnaast leveren we complete oplossingen voor fleetmanagement. Denk onder andere aan:

- GPS-tracking voor realtime inzicht in voertuiglocatie en ritgeschiedenis
- Fleetmaintence - voor tijdig en proactief onderhoud om stilstand te voorkomen
- Rijstijlmonitoring om onveilig of inefficiënt rijgedrag te signaleren
- Brandstofbeheer om verspilling en diefstal te voorkomen
- Tachograafdownloads op afstand

Via ons online dasboard krijgen wagenparkbeheerders overzicht en controle over hun hele vloot. En dat alles zonder hoge kosten of langdurige contracten.

Wij geloven in praktische oplossingen voor maatschappelijke problemen. Daarom combineren we preventie (alcoholsloten) met efficiënt wagenparkbeheer (fleetmanagement). Dat maakt ons uniek in Nederland.

Meer weten of samenwerken? Neem contact met ons op. Vraag een demo aan of sluit je aan via ons affiliateprogramma.

Website: alcoholslotauto.nl
E-mail: info@alcoholslotauto.nl
App: +31(0)617067602

Name: Belcar Caminhões
Description:
Em 1983, nasceu a Belcar Caminhões e Ônibus, instalada na Avenida Anhanguera. A empresa formalizou um contrato de concessão com a rede Auto Latina (fusão das fábricas Volkswagen e Ford), tornando-se uma revenda autorizada de caminhões e máquinas. Desde então acompanha o crescimento do mercado de caminhões da marca VW destacando-se como a maior concessionária regional de Caminhões e Máquinas da rede no Brasil.

Em junho de 1988, a empresa inaugurou sua sede própria, numa área de 25 mil metros quadrados, dos quais, quase a metade em área construída. Nas novas instalações, a empresa ficou estrategicamente localizada na BR 153 e ao mesmo tempo a 20 minutos do centro da cidade.

Outro marco importante na história da empresa foi em 30 de setembro de 1999, quando recebeu o certificado ISO 9001 concedido pela TÜV da Alemanha (órgão habilitador da Norma ISO) tornando-se a primeira concessionária de caminhões da Região Centro-Oeste a obter tal certificação.

Em 16 de Outubro de 2003, a Belcar Caminhões escolheu Itumbiara para ser a primeira cidade goiana a receber uma filial da empresa. A decisão foi tomada devido à importância desta cidade, que ocupa lugar de destaque no desenvolvimento do nosso estado. A filial possui uma área total de 44.000 metros quadrados. Com esta nova unidade a Belcar passou atender a 41 cidades ao redor de Itumbiara, com o mesmo padrão de qualidade da matriz, com conexão on-line e totalmente informatizada, agilizando consultas e procedimentos.

Em 2012 a empresa foi habilitada para comercializar caminhões MAN passando a fazer parte de uma equação bem-sucedida: mais de 250 anos de tradição e confiança do grupo MAN somados à expertise da engenharia brasileira e relacionamento próximo aos clientes Volkswagen. A concessionária passou a atender a um novo segmento de clientes que necessitam da linha extrapesada.

Name: Volvo Car Korea
Description:
볼보자동차를 수입, 국내 판매 및 마케팅을 하는 현지 법인 본사입니다.
 
1927 년에 설립된 볼보자동차는 오늘날 가장 명하고 존경 받는 자동차 브랜드 중 하나입니다. 현재 전세계 100개 이상의 국가에서 판매되고 있으며, 스톡홀름 나스닥(Nasdaq Stockholm) 거래소에 상장되어 “VOLCAR B”라는 종목(ticker)으로 거래되고 있습니다.
 
볼보자동차는 고객에게 개인적이고 지속 가능하며, 안전한 방법으로 이동할 수 있는 자를 제공하는 것으로 목표로 합니다. 이는 2030년까지 전기차 제조업체로 전환하고 탄소 발자국을 지속적으로 감소시켜나가고자 하는 약속으로 2040년까지 기후 중립 회사가 되겠다는 야심을 반영하고 있습니다.
 
볼보자동차그룹은 2023년 전년 대비 15% 성장한 708,716대의 글로벌 판매를 기록했습니다. 볼보자동차의 본사를 포함한 제품 개발, 마케팅 및 운영 관리 기능은 모두 스웨덴 예테보리(Gothenburg)에 위치해 있으며 스웨덴 예테보리, 벨기에 겐트, 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 등에 생산 시설을 갖추고 있습니다.

Description:
L'entusiasmo che ci lega al mondo dell'automobile è una storia che dura ormai da 70 anni. Milano è la nostra casa, è qui che abbiamo messo la prima pietra per realizzare quello che oggi è tra i più conosciuti spazi espositivi per auto della città. Oltre 8.000m² di superficie coperta per rendere unica la scoperta dei marchi esteri più apprezzati in Italia: Opel, Hyundai, Dr ed Evo.

La scelta di un prodotto di qualità. Tutti i marchi che commercializziamo hanno fatto la storia dell'automobile e oggi producono vetture innovative, sicure, proiettate verso un futuro eco-sostenibile e soprattutto in grado di accontentare anche le richieste più esigenti.

In ogni auto che vendiamo e assistiamo mettiamo parte di noi. Il nostro impegno per coinvolgerti in una scelta importante: l'acquisto di un veicolo nuovo o usato. La nostra competenza per garantirti sempre la massima sicurezza nella manutenzione e nella riparazione di qualsiasi autovettura.

L'auto tra le invenzioni forse la più geniale, forse la più longeva. Un mezzo che ancora oggi suscita emozione e interesse, un mezzo che è parte essenziale della vita di ogni giorno. Per questo siamo fieri di essere come un piccolo ingranaggio in un motore, un passaggio importante quello di consegnare un sogno e di rendere la vita di un lavoratore, di una madre, di una nonna, di un giovane o più in generale di una famiglia più comoda, migliore!
Gerli Auto dal 1962 a Milano.

Name: Autohauslager Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Autohauslager Sp. z o.o. jest stabilną i dynamicznie rozwijającą się firmą na rynku. Specjalizujemy się w kompleksowym handlu hurtowym i detalicznym samochodami na całym świecie. Nasza zdolność finansowa 
pozwala nam na przeprowadzanie transakcji jako godny zaufania partner. Dzięki temu nasi 
partnerzy kontraktowi mogą zmobilizować przepływ gotówki, zmniejszyć swoje zapasy lub wygenerować pożądany 
zysk i udział w rynku. 

Dysponujemy wykwalifikowanymi pracownikami oraz siecią współpracujących 
dealerów. Dzięki tym zasobom każde powierzone nam zlecenie realizujemy sprawnie, 
kompleksowo i z najwyższą starannością. Wieloletnie doświadczenie w branży zdobyte w 
trakcie zrealizowanych transakcji przekłada się na naszą rzetelność w działaniu. Miarą naszego 
sukcesu jest stabilna pozycja rynkowa Autohauslager Sp. z o.o. oraz liczne grono stałych 
kontrahentów. Zaufali nam najlepsi.

Wieloletnie doświadczenie i zaangażowanie naszej kadry pozwoliło nam się rozwinąć i 
stać się rzetelnym i wiarygodnym partnerem w dziedzinie kupna i sprzedaży samochodów. Przekłada się to 
na dogłębne zrozumienie potrzeb naszych klientów oraz doskonałą znajomość branży 
. 

Przez lata wypracowaliśmy szereg praktyk, które gwarantują skuteczność 
i kompleksowość naszych działań, co ma bezpośredni wpływ na zadowolenie naszych 
klientów. Dotychczasowy sukces nieustannie motywuje nas do doskonalenia usług, rozwijania 
działalności i podejmowania nowych wyzwań, aby być pionierem na rynku kupna i sprzedaży samochodów.
Do każdej usługi podchodzimy indywidualnie. Personalizujemy nasze działania, aby 
przedstawić jak najlepszą ofertę, a nasi specjaliści szczegółowo analizują każde zlecenie. Współpracujemy 
tylko ze sprawdzonymi i odpowiedzialnymi kontrahentami.

Name: My Auto Store
Description:
Based in Camden NJ, My Auto Store is one of the country’s largest automobile recyclers and your go-to source for recycled original equipment manufacturer (OEM) auto parts – any year, any make, and any model. Whether you order from us online, by phone, or at our walk-in store in West Deptford, NJ, our parts pros are on-hand to provide you with the right parts in time, every time. 

My Auto Store process starts with the inspection and inventory of the vehicle. We use proprietary software to determine the best quality parts and catalog the items into our database. We then remove any and all hazardous items such as fluids, gas, tires, and catalytic converters among other hazardous items. All hazardous items are recycled through recycling centers specifically designed for hazardous material around the country. At this point, the car is dismantled and only the highest quality, OEM parts are kept in our inventory with the rest being recycled. Once all the items are removed the car is then crushed and “shredded”. This material is then sorted between ferrous and non-ferrous metal and all non-metal (plastics, rubber, carpet, etc.) are removed at this time. 

My Auto Store is involved in the whole process: from vehicle acquisition to extracting used auto parts. We strive to operate an environmentally friendly business that always delivers to customers in a timely manner. Our ultimate goal is to revolutionize the way people buy used parts by making it a safe and easy online experience rather than going to your local junkyard. That is the My Auto Store Difference!

Der hohe Qualitätsanspruch nach DIN EN ISO, über 60 Jahre Branchenerfahrung im Fahrzeugbau, zahlreiche Unbedenklichkeitsbescheinigungen sowie Zertifikate namhafter Fahrzeughersteller und das gute Preisleistungsverhältnis machen den Betrieb zum bevorzugten Partner.

Kontinuierlich wird das umfangreiche Produktportfolio auf branchenspezifische Anforderungen erweitert. Optional kann jeder Auf- und Ausbau mit vielseitigem Schoon Zubehör ausgestattet werden.

Der Kunde erhält bundesweit hervorragende Unterstützung und Hilfe durch die Vertriebs- und Servicestützpunkte und eigene Außendienstmitarbeiter. Dabei legt Schoon Fahrzeugsysteme als zertifizierter Partner von Volkswagen Nutzfahrzeuge, Mercedes-Benz, MAN, Opel sowie Renault viel Wert auf starke Zusammenarbeit mit diesen und anderen Fahrzeugherstellern. Das Ergebnis sind kundenspezifische Fahrzeuge, die Langlebigkeit und Funktionalität vereinen.

Name: auction4you GmbH
Description:
360° Automotive Remarketing! auction4you ist ein online Auktionshaus. Wir befassen uns mit der Vermarktung von Gebrauchtfahrzeugen hauptsächlich durch online Auktionen. Jede Woche finden ca. 4 bis 6 Auktionen statt. Wir bieten verschiedene junge Fahrzeuge von unterschiedlichen Marken. Unsere Kunden sind Autohändler aus ganz Europa.

Als Marktplatz bietet auction4you dem Kfz-Handel, Flottenbetreibern, Leasing- und Finanzgesellschaften, Herstellern und Importeuren optimale, transparente und revisionssichere Verkaufskanäle für den schnellen An- und Verkauf von gebrauchten Fahrzeugen zum tagesaktuellen Marktpreis.

Im Mittelpunkt unseres Handels stehen Sicherheit, Geschwindigkeit und Transparenz. Durch unsere optimalen Prozesse (ISO 9001:2008 zertifiziert) und höchste Professionalität bieten wir Ihnen den optimalen Marktplatz zum Verkauf Ihres Gebrauchtwagens.

Name: BuyParts24
Description:
BuyParts24 is the first & largest auto parts digital distributor in UAE. Our mission is to revolutionize auto parts distribution in the region and enable OEM, Aftermarket and TBA brands to seamlessly connect with garages and workshops across UAE & beyond.
 
Reliability is at the heart of the #BuyParts24 mission. Whether it's ensuring:
A) Fast deliveries,
B) Maintaining the availability of products and crucial brands for our customers,
C) Delivering consistent customer support.
 
As a next-generation digital distributor, we provide auto parts brand partners with unmatched capabilities:

1) Single multi-brand platform to connect their brand to 5000+ workshops across UAE.
2) An omni-channel sales model and a data-driven express delivery supply chain to reach the entire workshop universe in the UAE.
3) Customized data & marketing solutions to enhance market share with greater control.
4) A combination of inventory & Just in Time (JIT) to ensure right service levels for right job type.

Our satisfied customers make the mission fulfilling and worthwhile. Join us on this journey.
 
Follow us & stay tuned for more updates as we continue our path of growth and innovation.

Name: LKQ Belgium
Description:
LKQ Belgium maakt deel uit van LKQ Benelux-France. LKQ Benelux-France, onderdeel van LKQ Europe, is met haar bedrijven LKQ Netherlands, LKQ Belgium, LKQ France, CarSys, VanEsch en IPAR actief op de Nederlandse, Belgische en Franse markt. Met toegang tot meer dan 245.000 referenties op voorraad, beschikbaar via 110 vestigingen, maken de 3.700 medewerkers van LKQ Benelux-France de levering van tienduizenden producten aan autobedrijven in de hele regio dagelijks tot een feit.

LKQ Benelux-France biedt producten en diensten aan uit vier divisies - parts, paint, tools & equipment en services - en beschikt over een gebruiksvriendelijk bestelplatform vol technische informatie. Een uitgebreid opleidingsaanbod en ondersteunende garageconcepten maken het pakket compleet.

Name: Alliance Automotive Group Benelux
Description: AAG speelt een belangrijke rol in de logistieke toeleveringsketen van auto- en bedrijfswagenonderdelen in verschillende Europese markten. Door aandacht te schenken aan zowel autonome als externe groei, heeft AAG het werkgebied kunnen uitbreiden tot meer dan de helft van de Europese markt voor aftermarketproducten. Na de overname van AAG door Genuine Parts Company (GPC) in 2017, is het nu een onderdeel van het grootste automotive onderdelenbedrijf ter wereld.

Name: CORPORACIÓN JIMÉNEZ MAÑA
Description:
Corporación Jiménez Maña, con más de 85 años de historia, es un grupo de empresas familiar líder en la distribución de recambios de vehículos. Desde su fundación en 1936, ha demostrado una gran capacidad de adaptación y crecimiento, ampliando sus actividades dentro y fuera del sector de la movilidad, consolidándose como un grupo empresarial con múltiples líneas de negocio. 

La corporación está formada por diversas empresas especializadas en distintos ámbitos, desde recambios de automóviles y maquinaria, vehículo industrial, material de obra pública o recambio de bicicletas hasta soluciones logísticas y asesoría laboral online. Este enfoque diversificado permite a Corporación Jiménez Maña ofrecer una amplia gama de servicios, adaptándose a las necesidades de sus clientes y manteniendo un fuerte compromiso con la excelencia y la innovación.

Hoy, la corporación cuenta con más de 900 empleados y tiene presencia en toda Andalucía Occidental, Málaga, Barcelona y Madrid, con planes de expansión en marcha. 


Nuestra misión, que da sentido a la existencia de nuestra empresa, es la contribución y el servicio a los grupos de interés y, con este fin, nos proponemos:

- Contribuir al crecimiento de nuestros clientes en una relación de confianza.
- Potenciar el desarrollo personal y profesional de nuestros empleados.
- Generar beneficio a los accionistas.
- Y establecer una relación sólida y de confianza con los proveedores.

Name: Turkmen Automotive Inc.
Description:
Turkmen Automotive Inc. is an Ashgabat-based automotive parts distributor and wholesale store chain with focus on trucks, excavators and other machinery. Representing world-class brands of Europe, Turkey and China, we offer high-quality items at our 5 stores across Ashgabat
We offer OEM and aftermarket spare parts for KAMAZ, MAZ, Ford Trucks (FORD OTOSAN,), Volvo, MAN, SHACMAN, SINOTRUK HOWO (China), JCB, SDLG, XCMG and other machineries in Turkmenistan.

Name: CAS Auto
Description:
Founded in 1985, the CAS Auto Group has worked for over three decades building relationships with partners, customers and suppliers.

Formerly known as College Auto Sales, today, the CAS Auto Group is the premiere global vehicle remarketer, acquiring and selling individual cars and entire fleets of new, distressed or damaged car inventories from manufacturers & major insurance companies, as well as individuals. The CAS Auto Group is made of three brands, CAS Miami, CAS Auto and CarBrain.com.

Name: PartsPoint
Description:
Uw autobedrijf is uw leven. Mooier kunnen wij het niet treffen, want bij ons is dit niet anders. Bij PartsPoint is automotive ons leven. Of we nu uit de bloedlijn van de u welbekende Brezan, Staadegaard TC of Dabeko vandaan
komen, in die bloedlijnen stroomt seconde na seconde automotive door de aderen. We helpen met een ongelooflijk breed en diep assortiment aan producten.

Bij PartsPoint helpen wij u om universeel te zijn, te blijven of te worden. We ondersteunen onze klanten – het wordt steeds belangrijker – met ICT, met logistiek, voorraad, marketing, garageformules en met schappen vol aan kennis en ervaring.

Name: Autocolombiana
Description:
Autocolombiana, fundada en 2015, es una empresa del Grupo Autogermana dedicada a la importación de marcas premium en el sector de movilidad y aventura. La empresa trae consigo todo el respaldo y tradición que da el hacer parte de un grupo con la experiencia e historia del Grupo Autogermana en Colombia, quienes por más de 40 años han sido representantes de un gran número de marcas internacionales, con los mejores estándares de calidad, respaldo y satisfacción de clientes.

Autocolombiana es importadora oficial para Colombia de marcas como KTM, Husqvarna, GASGAS, MV Agusta, Polaris, CFMOTO, BMC, FOCUS, Cervélo, Rapha, REV'IT!, Rizoma, Touratech, Akrapovič, CFMOTO, entre otras.

Name: Cars2click
Description:
Cars2click is an AI-Powered Cross-Border Car Trading Company revolutionizing the B2B used car market in Europe.

Established in 2019 in Sweden, Cars2click connects OEMs, car dealers, rental companies, and fleet managers through advanced AI tools like GEOpricing and GEOmatch, which help find the best used cars across 23+ European countries and match them with buyers quickly.

By eliminating traditional auctions, Cars2click ensures faster, more profitable transactions.

Through Cars2click.com, Europe’s 1st AI-Powered B2B Online Car Store, dealers access exclusive deals, seamless cross-border trading, and fast delivery, with expert support throughout the process. 

With a focus on efficiency and profitability, Cars2click helps dealers restock their inventory and grow their businesses.

Name: Porsche Centrum Rotterdam
Description:
Bij Porsche Centrum Rotterdam draait alles om beleving. Een Porsche is niet alleen een auto, maar een gevoel van vrijheid, vakmanschap en pure passie.

Ons team staat klaar om je te begeleiden in elke stap van jouw Porsche-reis. Of je nu de nieuwste modellen wilt ontdekken, interesse hebt in onze jong gebruikte Porsche Approved-collectie of je Porsche laat onderhouden door onze ervaren technici: je kunt altijd rekenen op expertise, transparantie en persoonlijke aandacht.

In onze Destination Porsche aan de Schuttevaerweg 16 in Rotterdam ben je welkom in een omgeving die de wereld van Porsche ademt. Hier komen design, innovatie en gastvrijheid samen precies zoals je dat van ons mag verwachten.

Wees welkom bij Porsche Centrum Rotterdam. Jouw Porsche, onze passie.

Ed van der Lans
General Manager Porsche Centrum Rotterdam
Ed.van.der.lans@porschecentrumrotterdam.nl

Name: DAL Motors
Description:
DAL Motors is Sudan’s leading automotive company and the official dealer for Mercedes-Benz Actros, Daimler, KIA, Mitsubishi, and Fuso.

Since 1994, we’ve built a legacy of trust, quality, and customer-centric service across the country.

Our offerings include:
	•	New vehicle sales across a wide range of passenger and commercial vehicles
	•	After-sales services, maintenance, and certified parts
	•	Leasing solutions for individuals and businesses
	•	Fleet solutions and corporate vehicle programs

Backed by decades of experience and a passion for mobility, DAL Motors continues to lead the way in transforming Sudan’s transportation landscape.

Name: Elite International Motors LLC
Description:
Here at Elite International Motors, we understand how challenging it is to find genuine Jaguar and Land Rover spare parts within the automotive market. Due to the proliferation of counterfeit products in the region, we stock a wide variety of OEM (Original Equipment Manufactured) and high-quality aftermarket spare parts together with accessories that are designed to perfectly fit your business needs.

Our reputation for competitive pricing has led us to achieve a strong presence and solid name in both the local and international markets. We have developed strong partnerships worldwide and generated a huge database enabling us to sell through more channels such as wholesale, individual clients, import and export.

Through our extensive knowledge and years of experience, we have gained a strong foothold in the automotive market and are now one of the leading specialists and one-stop-shops in the UAE that you can count on. With our highly experienced team and smooth logistics and shipping system, we assure to deliver your parts swiftly and hassle-free.

Name: EUROREPAR by Stellantis
Description:
EUROREPAR by Stellantis is a multi-brand automotive parts supplier for vehicles of 3 years and older, offering a comprehensive range of over 17,000 references for maintenance and repair from 60 different part families.  

Designed for vehicles aged 3 years and older, our products combine quality, performance, and competitive pricing to meet the needs of professionals and drivers worldwide. 

- Global Presence: Available in 100+ countries. 
- Quality & Reliability: All parts from 60 families are rigorously tested by our engineers and quality experts and comply with applicable standards and regulations for each family.
- 2-Year Warranty: Guaranteed against manufacturing and material defects
- Counterfeit Protection: Secure labels on packaging to ensure authenticity. 
- Efficient Distribution: Our Distrigo Hub network ensures seamless availability. 

EUROREPAR by Stellantis is the smart choice for aftermarket automotive parts, providing the best balance between quality and price for a reliable driving experience.

Name: Mercedes-Benz Korea
Description: Mercedes-Benz Korea Ltd. (President & CEO Thomas Klein) was founded in January 2003 as a local subsidiary of Mercedes-Benz AG. In the spirit of its founding fathers Carl Benz, "The love of inventing never dies" and Gottlieb Daimler, "The best or nothing", Mercedes-Benz Korea offers customers a diverse selection of cutting-edge products and differentiated services at 63 showrooms and 75 service centers across the country. Contributing to Korean society with long-term endeavors to fulfill its corporate social responsibility on a sustainable scale, Mercedes-Benz Korea, in partnership with 11 authorized dealer companies, is actively engaged in its corporate social responsibility program, 'Mercedes-Benz Promise'.

Name: Doyen Auto
Description:
As a leading European player on the auto-parts market, we owe our success strong and unifying values we all share, as well as an innovative vision of our industry, focused on performance.

Doyen is targeted at after-market operators: wholesale distributors of spare parts, smaller wholesalers, original equipment manufacturers listed as suppliers, and all professional working in the car repair business.

Our position has led us to choose strategic locations, both to maximise our responsiveness to our customers and also to boost and develop our own network. Our six warehouses in Europe with a storage area of over 56,000 m2 mean we can offer over 110,000 different articles on a permanent basis - with a service rate of 97.5%!

Name: Ghassan Aboud Auto Spare Parts
Description:
Ghassan Aboud spare parts is a market leader with 28 years of international experience in the field of auto spare parts. 
A leading re-exporter for Genuine and aftermarket Parts to over 100 countries, located in JAFZA Dubai and mainland Dubai.

Our operation has a well-maintained stock of more than 20,000+ items including most of the global auto brands. Customized packing and documentation, excellent logistics support, and an efficient sales team make us one of the leading re-exporters of auto parts in the world.

Name: Transtek Turkey Otomotiv
Description:
Transtek Turkey Otomotiv is an integrator of knowledge and technology in the field of transportation, and automotive industry . Based on years of extensive experience and understanding of the current and future challenges of the global and local industry, TRANSTEK offers full service solutions together with complete transport business consultancy. 

TRANSTEK benefits from a wealth of its business partners’ global training and knowledge resources and combines its own state-of-the-art knowledge of Information Technology with the best solutions for automating business processes, which are offered by carefully chosen partners. TRANSTEK is the exclusive agent for these partners in Turkey and the MENA region. 

Excellence and innovation are the driving forces of our company in order to meet the high demands of the rapidly changing market. 

 We deliver complete systems of on-board vehicle information, on-board diagnostics and fleet monitoring, traveler information in the vehicle, at stops, via the Internet and smartphones, video surveillance, Passenger counting system, driver guidance, voice and text communication between vehicles and the traffic management, reports module, etc.

 Transtek combines complementary skills in electronics, mechanics and composite to provide ever more innovative solutions for cost reduction, heightened safety and improved comfort.

Name: CARAT Systementwicklungs-und Marketing GmbH & Co.KG
Description:
Herzlich willkommen bei CARAT Automotive - Ihrem starken und kompetenten Partner im Fahrzeugteilehandel.
CARAT Automotive - eine der größten deutschen Einkaufskooperationen im Autoteilegroßhandel - bietet ihren Partnern und Kunden ein Vollsortiment in gewohnter Markenqualität in den Bereichen KFZ-Teile, Diagnosegeräte, Werkzeug und Werkstattausrüstung. Darüber hinaus hält sie ein breites Spektrum an Dienstleistungen bereit.

Starke Konzentrationsprozesse haben den Fahrzeugteilehandel zuletzt nachhaltig verändert. Mittelständische Groß- und Einzelhändler, die wettbewerbsfähig bleiben wollen, bauen deshalb auf die Stärken der CARAT. Als einheitlich handelnde Gruppe schafft sie es erfolgreich, sich gegen die starken Konzentrationsprozesse im Fahrzeugteilehandel zu behaupten. Demokratische Entscheidungsprozesse sorgen dafür, dass die Interessen der CARAT-Gesellschafter sowie die der Werkstattkunden berücksichtigt werden.
In Summe ist die CARAT damit der ideale Partner für alle mittelständischen Betriebe im Fahrzeug-Aftermarket.

Name: Groupauto Türkiye
Description:
2025 yılı itibarıyla, Groupauto Türkiye, 151 satış noktası, 397.000 m² depolama alanı, 650'nin üzerinde satış temsilcisi ve 3.400'in üzerinde çalışanı ile 30 iş ortağıyla faaliyet göstermektedir. 70 ülkede aktif olarak faaliyet gösteren GroupAuto International’ın kurucu hissedarı olarak, OSS Derneği’nin ve Türkiye Otomotiv Endüstrisinin aktif bir üyesiyiz. Amacımız, iş ortaklarımızın araç bakım ve onarım yapan tüm sürücü ve profesyonel kullanıcılara, araç üretici ağlarına alternatif ve rekabetçi hizmetler sunmasını desteklemektir.

Groupauto Türkiye, binek, hafif ticari ve ağır vasıta araçların yedek parça ve ilgili hizmetleri konusunda lider bir ticaret grubudur. Merkezi satın alma, lojistik ve ilgili hizmetler, 30 iş ortağı firmanın grubun satın alma gücünden, lojistik hizmetlerinden, faturalama hizmetlerinden ve verimli pazarlama ve satış desteklerinden yararlanmasını sağlamaktadır.
As of 2025, Groupauto Turkey operates with 30 business partners, 151 sales points, 397,000 m² of storage space, over 650 sales representatives, and more than 3,400 employees. As a founding shareholder of GroupAuto International, which is actively present in 70 countries, we are an active member of the OSS Association and the Turkish Automotive Industry. Our goal is to support our business partners in providing alternative and competitive services to vehicle manufacturer networks for all drivers and professional users engaged in vehicle maintenance and repair.

Groupauto Turkey is a leading trade group specializing in spare parts and related services for passenger cars, light commercial vehicles, and heavy-duty trucks. Centralized procurement, logistics, and related services enable 30 partner companies to benefit from the group's purchasing power, logistics services, billing services, and efficient marketing and sales support.

DISTRIGO Parts Distribution is a one-stop solution for all-makes automotive repairers. 

With our 360° approach, we provide a comprehensive range of products and services. 

Our mission is to meet every repairer’s aftersales needs worldwide, offering the right part, at the right price, on time—every time, regardless of vehicle make or age.

- 360° product range – Original Parts, Eurorepar, Circular Economy, Supplier Ranges
- Powerful logistics – Fast and reliable supply chain
- Dedicated customer service – Expert support at every step

Description:
PT OTORAJA NETWORK INDONESIA

In striving towards the vision, OTORAJA creates fair and transparent ecosystem for motorcycle workshops and their customers by promoting and enabling well-qualified services.

Name: Slattery Asset Advisory & Slattery Auctions and Valuations
Description:
Slattery Asset Advisory and Slattery Auctions and Valuations is a proudly Australian-owned, family-run business. We are the leading provider of premium asset advisory and remarketing services in Australia and Asia Pacific and have a reputation for providing responsive customer service and dynamic commercial solutions. 

A highly experienced team supports the Board, with many years professional industry experience between them. Together with the board they bring not only profound experience across each asset class but also expertise from a range of professions including The Australian Army, Insolvency, Marketing, Law, IT and Finance.

International banks and insolvency practices rely on our services. We have longstanding trusted client relationships with, among others, Westpac Group, NAB, CBA, ANZ as well as many major insolvency firms. We also service major blue chip corporates and government including the Department of Defence and statutory owned corporations.

We offer a national service for our clients operating in all states and territories. High-quality assets ensure our auctions are well-attended and financially successful. We hold over 50 national car and truck and machinery auctions per month across our auction facilities in Newcastle, Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Mackay, Perth, Karratha, Adelaide and Canberra in addition to numerous onsite and online auctions. However our thinking, projects and strategic advice extend beyond Australia’s boundaries. 

Our business in new territories is growing rapidly with client asset sales in New Zealand, PNG, Fiji and SE Asia. The Asia Pacific region is a key growth area for the future. 

We are perfectly positioned to deliver robust financial returns and attentive business services to all clients.

Name: Petroautos, S.A.
Description: Empresa panameña, representante de la marca Hyundai en Panamá. Líder en el sector automotriz, reconocida por sus altos índices de satisfacción, comprometida, con sus clientes y colaboradores.  Ofrece una amplia gama de productos y servicios de calidad mundial, con un equipo altamente motivado y capacitado, que utiliza tecnología de punta y una red de facilidades a nivel nacional para brindar una atención personalizada que garantiza la plena satisfacción de nuestros clientes, generando una optima rentabilidad.

Name: Mitsubishi Motors Myanmar MMCM
Description:
MM Cars Myanmar Limited (MMCM), the automotive unit of Yoma Strategic Holdings is the distributor of Mitsubishi passenger cars in Myanmar. MM Cars Myanmar Limited (MMCM), we serve as the official distributor of Mitsubishi Motors automobiles and we are the representative company of Mitsubishi Motors in the servicing and distribution of passenger vehicles and light commercial vehicles in Myanmar.

#MItsubishiMotorsMyanmar #MitsubishiMotorsMandalay

Name: KSI Auto Parts
Description: For over 30 years, the KSI Group has been an industry leader for quality replacement auto body parts with a reputation for superior customer service.  Established in 1984, the KSI Group has expanded its territory to 25 locations servicing 15 states and growing.

Name: Varco Spa
Description:
Varco Spa is the Ford Dealership for Milan and its province since 1965 and is present at
- VARCO FordStore in Via dell'Innominato 2, Milan; 
- VARCO Ford Milan Center, Via Melzi d'Eril 3, Milan; 
- VARCO Corsico, in Via Milano, Corsico (MI); 
- VARCO Auto and Transit Center, in via Manzoni 2, Rozzano (MI) 

The company is made up of a team of over fifty people with the utmost competence and professionalism in the automotive sector who have guaranteed for over 50 years a safe reference for motorists in Milan and its province. 
Varco Spa is constantly looking for INNOVATION to improve all sales and service processes in order to meet the evolving needs of the Ford Customer more and more. 
The company carries out its activities in the following sectors: 
- Sale of New Ford Cars and Ford Commercial Vehicles 
- Financial and insurance services for car purchase 
- Assistance, Bodywork Service, Tire Service and Sale of Original Ford Accessories & Parts - Guaranteed Used Car Sale Ford and the best brands.

Name: Alternative Autoparts
Description:
ALTERNATIVE AUTOPARTS est un groupement de distributeurs indépendants au service de ses 194 distributeurs indépendants adhérents dans le domaine de la pièce détachée automobile. Nous sommes nés d’une vision : remettre les distributeurs au cœur de toutes les décisions, en leur garantissant leur indépendance et en mutualisant leur force. Le groupe est également membre de NEXUS Automotive International et partenaire du groupement de carrosserie – peinture CENTAURE


Notre groupement est constitué autour :
-	Une centrale de référencement :
Nous travaillons avec plus de 170 partenaires fournisseurs afin d’obtenir des tarifs communs et avantageux pour l’ensemble de nos adhérents quels que soient le volume de leur commande, leur taille ou leur localisation.
Nous avons développé notre propre marque de distribution Novalt, offrant une alternative aux marques Premium et destinée aux automobilistes recherchant le meilleur rapport qualité/prix.

-	Des plateformes de stockage
Nous bénéficions d’une plateforme nationale et de onze plateformes régionales, reparties sur toute la France et qui stockent plus de 290 000 références.

-	Des Relais Techniques
Les Relais Techniques Alternative Autoparts sont des professionnels avertis évoluant exclusivement dans le secteur de la distribution de pièces automobiles dites « techniques » (gestion moteur notamment). Ils possèdent les ressources humaines et l’équipement nécessaire pour effectuer diagnostics et réparations sur l’environnement moteur, font partager leur expertise et viennent en support des adhérents Alternative Autoparts pour les prestations techniques.

-	Un réseau de garages
Nous offrons la possibilité à nos adhérents Alternative Autoparts de développer leur réseau, en TECHNICAR SERVICES. Ce concept résolument tourné vers l’expertise technique est constitué aujourd’hui de 200 garages implantés partout en France.

Name: SKY MOTORS COMPANY CM
Description:
Bienvenue chez SKY MOTORS COMPANY, l'horizon de l'automobile au Cameroun évolue avec nous. Implantés au cœur de la terre africaine, nous nous élevons comme le phare de l'excellence automobile.
Nous sommes fiers de vous présenter une expérience de conduite exceptionnelle à travers notre gamme exclusive de véhicules de renom, comprenant les élégants JETOUR, les robustes HOWO, les et les fiables JMC. Chaque modèle que nous proposons incarne l'alliance parfaite entre technologie avancée, design élégant et performance inégalée.

Chez Sky Motors, nous transcendons les frontières de l'ordinaire. Notre passion pour l'innovation, la qualité de notre équipe et notre service client redéfinit l'industrie automobile au Cameroun. Notre engagement envers la satisfaction client va au-delà de la vente, nous sommes vos partenaires dans chaque kilomètre parcouru. 

Rejoignez nous dans cette aventure automobile où chaque trajet devient une expérience mémorable. Explorez notre sélection soigneusement choisie, découvrez la puissance de la diversité et laissez SKY MOTORS COMPANY  être le guide de vos voyages inoubliables. 
Bien plus qu'une concession, nous sommes votre partenaire pour un avenir sur la route, où le ciel n'est pas la limite, mais le début de nouvelles possibilités.

Name: BRMobility
Description:
A BRMobility é referência no Brasil em mobilidade elétrica corporativa, desenvolvendo soluções para operações de segurança pública e privada, logística e grandes ambientes operacionais.

Com 10 anos de atuação, a empresa construiu uma trajetória sólida no mercado brasileiro, sendo reconhecida pelo mais completo portfólio de diciclos elétricos do país. Desde 2015, nossas soluções estão presentes em operações estratégicas em todo o Brasil, apoiando atividades em shopping centers, aeroportos, condomínios, parques industriais, estacionamentos e operações policiais, sempre com foco em eficiência, segurança e presença institucional.

Os diciclos elétricos são amplamente utilizados em operações que exigem agilidade, ampla visibilidade e mobilidade em ambientes internos e externos. A operação silenciosa, aliada à ausência de emissões e ao excelente campo de visão do operador, contribui para uma atuação mais eficiente, segura e bem percebida pela população, inclusive em cenários de alta complexidade.

A atuação da BRMobility vai além do fornecimento de veículos. Entregamos soluções completas, que envolvem a locação de diciclos elétricos para garantir a continuidade operacional, serviços de manutenção com logística e engenharia especializada em cobertura nacional, além de treinamento e certificação de operadores, promovendo maior segurança, eficiência e tranquilidade na gestão das operações. Complementarmente, oferecemos alternativas de mídia móvel, permitindo que nossos clientes agreguem valor às suas operações por meio de publicidade exclusiva integrada aos veículos.

Guiada por um atendimento próximo e personalizado, a BRMobility atua como parceira estratégica de seus clientes, desenvolvendo soluções sob medida e construindo relacionamentos de longo prazo, sempre orientados à excelência operacional, inovação e resultados consistentes.


Visite nosso site: www.brmobility.com.br

Name: Grupo GEC

Somos un grupo empresarial especializado en brindar soluciones automotrices de venta, compra y renta de vehículos a través de nuestras diferentes líneas comerciales. Nos caracterizamos por nuestra innovación, cercanía y respaldo a lo largo de 34 años de experiencia.

Promoviendo la autenticidad con ideas que generen un cambio positivo dentro y fuera de nuestras empresas.

 Lo que hacemos

 Posicionamos marcas de legado nicaragüense como Autolote El Chele y Ec Rent a Car.
