Name: CIG Motors Co., Ltd
Description:
CIG Motors Co., Ltd is the representative of GAC Motor in Nigeria. It began
its operations in 2013 following a pact signed with Guangzhou Group
Automobile Group Co., (GAC Motor) to establish and manage
distribution networks in Nigeria and subsequently Africa.

CIG Motors Co., Ltd started with the introduction of 2 major models;
the GA3 Saloon and GS5 SUV models of GAC Motor; with a subsequent
introduction of 3 more models in 2016 and 2017. As at date, CIG Motors
has introduced 6 GAC Motor models into the Nigerian market; GA3,
GA3S, GS3, GS4 and the Standard Luxury SUV GS8 (which is the flagship
model). CIG Motors Co., Ltd recently introduced the Mini Space Bus GN8
and intends to cover the Nigerian market with the world’s best in terms
of automobiles.

CIG Motors Co., Ltd recently signed another landmark technical assembly
agreement with a new partner, Jiangxi Jiangling Motors Import and
Export Co., Ltd, thereby extending it’s vehicle models to include all
commercial vehicles and cars of GAC, ZNA, Dongfeng (DFAC) and
JMC brands.

The company holds its brands in very high esteem and makes very
conscious investments behind the master brand and a focused
communication investment in the value proposition packages.

Name: Albina Alarabi
Description:
- Our company, with a rich history, is one of the top suppliers of truck parts in Saudi Arabia. In 1978, the first high-quality German MAN truck parts business was established in Jeddah.

Name: FIGIEFA - Automotive Aftermarket Distributors
Description:
Founded in 1956, FIGIEFA is the international federation and political representative of independent automotive aftermarket distributors towards EU and international institutions. Its members, 19 national trade associations from 18 countries, and 5 international trade groups (ITGs) represent retailers and wholesalers of automotive replacement parts and components and their associated repair chains.

FIGIEFA represents the interests of its members towards European and international institutions. Its role is to monitor and accompany the design of legislation with the aim to maintain free and effective competition in the market for vehicle replacement parts, servicing and repair, as well as to defend motorist consumers’ right to have their vehicles serviced, maintained and repaired at a workshop of their choice.

FIGIEFA is a trade federation and a stakeholders’ representation accredited to the European institutions and holds consultative roster status at the United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) with membership to the World Forum for Harmonization of Vehicle Regulations (UN-ECE-WP29).

FIGIEFA is also a proud member of the Alliance for the Freedom of Car Repair
(AFCAR) and the Forum on Automotive Aftermarket Sustainability (FAAS).

#WeKeepEuropeMoving #RightToRepair

Name: Grupo Aoki - Concessionário Mercedes-Benz
Description:
A AOKI Concessionária Mercedes-Benz, começou sua trajetória em 1959, quando a fábrica da Mercedes-Benz tinha apenas 3 anos de instalação no Brasil.

Fundada pelo Sr. Paulo Ryo Nakagawa. Motorista de caminhão, filho de família de Imigrante Japonês. Focado em estabelecer como uma empresa forte e confiável.

Teve muito sucesso que perdura até hoje. O grupo AOKI, continua sendo liderado pelo seu Fundador Paulo Ryo Nakagawa e seus filhos Sérgio Nakagawa e Claudio Nakagawa. É reconhecido como uma das maiores e mais tradicionais concessionárias Mercedes-Benz do país.

Nosso diferencial
Buscamos sempre pelo melhor atendimento e pela excelência na prestação de serviços e fornecimento de produtos para atender a linha de veículos comercias Mercedes-Benz, além de serviços adicionais para todas as marcas de veículos comerciais.

O Concessionário ainda conta com serviços de venda e televenda de peças automotivas, chassis, comercialização de pneus, atendimento para manutenção preventiva e corretiva, entrega técnica, veículos para test-drive.

A AOKI investe no desenvolvimento dos seus colaboradores porque acredita que, enquanto treinam e se desenvolvem, crescem como pessoas e como profissionais. Aprimoram-se cada vez mais para enfrentar os desafios do mundo moderno e competitivo, ao mesmo tempo em que contribuem para o crescimento contínuo dos negócios da empresa.

Vale destacar que nos últimos 10 anos fomos uma das mais premiadas pela qualidade e excelência no programa Starclass Mercedes-Benz. Consolidando assim, uma das mais bem sucedidas empresas do setor e se destaca como uma das principais concessionárias Mercedes-Benz, focada na satisfação contínua dos seus clientes, e na valorização dos seus colaboradores.

Na Oriental, lideramos o mercado em serviços de compra, venda e manutenção externa de veículos Honda, honrando assim a preferência dos consumidores.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: APEC AUTO
Description:
APEC AUTO is a convenient service and logistics platform for bulk customers of auto parts and suppliers. We help members of the industry to collaborate more effectively. The process optimization and advancing your business - are our main concern.

Our service for Buyers:
- The best price offers on the famous world OEM and aftermarket brands.
- Wide range of suppliers around the world.
- Partner warehouses around the world for fast delivery.

Our service for Suppliers:
- Drawing of customer attention to your product range.
- Quick transmission of price-lists and order management.
- Promotion of the supplier for the key audience in the relevant region.

More than 15 years our service guarantees wholesale supply of OEM and aftermarket auto spare parts to the Middle East, Europe, Asia, North America, etc.

With the headquarters in UAE, Dubai, Jebel Ali Free Zone, which is one of the biggest logistic and industrial areas in the Middle East, we provide all types of intermodal connections: oversea, overland, over the air - in case of necessity.

APEC AUTO has strong and long-standing relationships with lots of suppliers of genuine and aftermarket auto spare parts worldwide and guarantees the proper quality and originality of all the items. Our service provides wide range of auto spare parts for Japanese, European, Korean, Chinese and American cars from leading manufacturers.

Our advantages:
- We cooperate with reliable partners and guarantee the proper quality of goods on our service platform.
- We are ready for an open dialogue with all users of our service.
- Сlient-oriented approach is our priority.
- Individual conditions with regular users of the service are discussible.
- Our managers provide full support to each user.
- A user-friendly interface and easy search for parts will help you find any item by article number.

Name: AVAG Holding SE
Description: AVAG Holding SE is one of the leading car dealer groups with locations in Germany, Austria, Slovenia, Croatia, Poland and Hungary. The headquarter is based in Augsburg/Germany.

Name: Autosud LTDA.
Description: Autosud, más de 30 años al servicio de los bolivianos trayendo soluciones automotrices de calidad con las mejores marcas de vehículos de uso personal y de trabajo.

Name: MENAMOTORS
Description:
MENAMOTORS is the go-to solution provider for all your automotive needs. As a leading wholesaler of new passenger and commercial vehicles, we pride ourselves on our strong partnerships with top-tier automotive brands, and our unwavering commitment to delivering professional, first-rate service to independent car dealers, resellers, and fleet operators.

Our extensive range of products includes passenger vehicles, tropicalized pickups, commercial vehicles, electric vehicles, and specially modified vehicles for various purposes. With MENAMOTORS, you can trust that our in-house logistics department provides comprehensive logistics solutions, covering storage, shipping documents, inspections handling, and special formatting, so you can focus on what really matters.

Name: Global Automotive Group
Description:
Global Automotive Group is een internationale organisatie, gespecialiseerd in de distributie van autobanden en wielen voor de B2B-markt. Met diverse bedrijven verspreid over Europa leveren wij niet alleen producten voor personenauto’s, maar bieden we ook een breed assortiment aan fiets-, motor- en truckbanden. Daarnaast omvat ons assortiment TPMS-sensoren, sneeuwkettingen en reservekits.

Global Automotive Group is opgericht om de leiding en organisatie van onze bedrijven te verenigen. Vanuit een gezamenlijke visie, strategie en beleid werken we efficiënt en doelgericht aan oplossingen die aansluiten bij de behoeften van onze klanten in de bandensector. Wij zijn “your partner in tyre & wheel solutions”!

Werken bij één van de bedrijven van Global Automotive Group betekent onderdeel zijn van een professionele organisatie waarbij alle afdelingen naadloos op elkaar aansluiten en tot in de perfectie moeten samenwerken om, samen met onze klanten, maximaal rendement te genereren op alle bedrijfsonderdelen. Geen eenvoudige opgave maar wel een uitdaging op niveau. Voor deze uitdagingen zijn wij op zoek naar professionals in hun eigen vakgebied die niet alleen van ons willen leren maar ook zelf ‘kennis en kunde’ inbrengen.

Ben jij zo’n professional en durf je de uitdaging aan? Wacht dan niet te lang en kijk bij onze actuele vacatures voor de functiebeschrijvingen en solliciteer direct!

Name: TRPARTS
Description: As an independent company, TRPARTS LTD is well-placed to supply the most innovative AM brand products and excellent-quality OE parts for automotive applications at competitive export prices. All the while, we work tirelessly to develop and improve our range, prices and services. During the last years, we have significantly expanded our database, which now boasts more than 300 premium brands for our customers to choose from. Our ability to offer such an unmatched range of premium Aftermarket car parts and genuine auto parts, combined with our dedication to customer satisfaction, has ensured that we have posted double-digit growth from the beginning of our activity.

Name: AMERIGO GLOBAL PARTS
Description:
Since 1972, AMERIGO GLOBAL PARTS leads automotive spare parts exportation market. Thanks to its experience, the company now expended its distribution network to over 70 countries, becoming the first French independent car parts exporter.

AUTOMOTOR operates through its different offices around the world. Its committed sales team guide their partners and customers in their national and international automotive spare parts development, supported by a global marketing and communication department operating off and online. With their knowledge of global exportation, logistical, customs and financial constraints specific to each country, the sales administration team supports its partners until the parts are delivered. AUTOMOTOR owns large storage areas, an immediate ordering process, stock availability and a fast shipment policy. The company offers to its clients, and based on its distribution agreements, car manufacturers parts, OE manufacturers parts and its top tier own car parts brand available on TecDoc, ETAI and E-RELIABLE.

Name: Dal Barco S.r.l.
Description: Operiamo nel settore automobilistico da oltre 40 anni a San Bonifacio (VR). Siamo rivenditori e service partner per i marchi Volkswagen, Volkswagen Veicoli Commerciali, Audi, Seat, Skoda e Cupra. Trattiamo inoltre il ritiro e la rivendita di auto usate.

Name: Alliance Automotive Group Germany
Description:
Die Alliance Automotive Group (AAG) zählt zu den größten europäischen Handelsunternehmen für Kfz-/Autoersatzteile im Independent Aftermarket (IAM) - agierend in Großbritannien, Irland, Frankreich, Polen, Belgien, Niederlande, Spanien, Portugal und Deutschland mit einem Umsatz von über 3,5 Milliarden Euro und 17.000 Mitarbeiter:innen. Eingebunden in die Genuine Parts Company (GPC) aus den USA ist unser europäisches Netzwerk Teil des größten Handelsnetzwerks für Autoteile weltweit.

Die Alliance Automotive Group Germany (AAGG) ist somit Teil eines der größten Handelsnetzwerke Europas. Als deutschlandweit einziger Händler von Hersteller-Originalteilen und IAM-Teilen mit 2.200 Mitarbeiter:innen an 89 Standorten steuern wir unseren Umsatzanteil von jährlich ca. 600 Millionen Euro bei. Dabei verfolgen wir ein klares Wachstumskonzept, welches unsere aktuell fünf Vertriebsgesellschaften - Busch, Coler, Knoll, Hennig, Voigt - in Zukunft unter einem Banner und einem Namen vereinen wird.

Die Alliance Automotive Service GmbH mit Sitz in Münster fungiert dabei als Headquarter und Shared Service Center für alle Vertriebsgesellschaften. Abteilungen wie die Buchhaltung, unsere Rechtsabteilung, Human Ressources, Vertriebsorganisation und viele weitere Bereiche decken wir hier zentral für alle Vertriebsgesellschaften ab.

Name: Hino Colombia
Description:
Representamos HINO, marca de buses y camiones del Grupo Toyota. Nuestros productos cuentan con tecnología japonesa y son ensamblados en el país en nuestra planta ubicada en Cota, Cundinamarca, bajo los más altos estándares de calidad. 

Con nuestra filosofía de Soporte Total, garantizamos un acompañamiento permanente a nuestros clientes, para que conozcan en detalle la mejor forma de operar su bus o camión, prolongar su vida útil y rentabilizar su negocio. 

Con nuestra tecnología HINO Connect, desarrollada con el fin de que los transportadores que operan vehículos HINO tengan a la mano información de valor para conocer en detalle el desempeño, el rendimiento y el hábito de conducción al cual es sometido el bus o camión, durante las rutinas de trabajo, optimizamos el rendimiento de su HINO.

Hacemos presencia en toda Colombia, con 21 vitrinas ubicadas en las principales ciudades: Barranquilla, Bogotá, Bucaramanga, Cali, Chía, Cartagena, Duitama, Florencia, Ibagué, Manizales, Medellín, Montería, Neiva, Pasto, Pereira, Tunja, Valledupar y Villavicencio.

Name: Azur Trucks - Ippolito Mobilités
Description:
Depuis 50 ans, Ippolito Mobilités fonde sa culture d’entreprise autour de cinq valeurs fondamentales : pérennité, proximité, performance, personnes et planète.

Conscient qu’un véhicule professionnel est avant tout un centre de profit, le Groupe développe ses activités afin de maîtriser la chaîne de valeur complète du véhicule tout en conservant l’autonomie et l’indépendance de chacune de ses branches. 

Avec plus de 40 points services en région PACA spécialisés dans la vente, la location, la réparation, l’entretien et le dépannage des poids lourds et des véhicules utilitaires, AZUR TRUCKS Groupe IPPOLITO s’efforce d’assurer une qualité de service et devenir ainsi le partenaire privilégié de ses clients.

Name: Dörr Group
Description: McLaren, Lamborghini, Lotus, Bugatti, Pagani, Pininfarina, Dallara and Aston Martin are the brands with which the Dörr Group makes car enthusiasts drive. This means that the more than 85-strong team around owner Rainer Dörr is one of the most diverse super sports car dealers in Germany. Since it was founded in Frankfurt am Main in 2011, the Dörr Group has expanded to Stuttgart, Munich, Berlin and Hockenheim and has created a starting place for used super sports cars with the Home of Speed by Dörr Group at the Hockenheimring. Motorsport is the Dörr Group's DNA. With the Dörr Driving School, the team enables amateurs to get started from karting into GT racing and get that racing feeling in their own super sports car. The Dörr Group is the only sales partner of McLaren Customer Racing in Germany and Kart Republic in D-A-CH and the Benelux countries. Dörr Motorsport is currently registered with two McLaren 570S GT4s in the ADAC GT4 Germany and another Lamborghini Huracán Evo in the GTC Race / Goodyear 60.

Name: EVERGREEN TIRE
Description:
EVERGREEN Tire is focusing on the tire industry, integrating tire product development, brand promotion, marketing management output, and professional tire service.


We established the business philosophy of creating value for customers and achieving win-win cooperation by continuously introducing new products that meet customer needs, integrating industry resources, innovating marketing models, and creating new core competitiveness.



Based on advanced technology, EVERGREEN is a brand dedicated to environmental protection and sustainable development.

Name: DJ Auto Parts Co Ltd
Description: The Partner, for Aftermarket Success in Saudi Arabia

Name: Bavaria Motors
Description:
Bavaria Motors NV

Purchase, sale and consignment sale of high-end exclusive and sportscars.

High-End cardetailing activities

Sale of cars Porsche, Ferrari, Aston Martin, Audi, BMW, Mercedes, Range Rover, Lamborghini, McLaren. 

Financing and Leasing of new and second hand cars.
 
Personalized search in 2 days 

Bavaria Motors has been created in 2005. The name Bavaria makes a reference to «Bavaria», an area situated in Southern Germany where we can find Audi and BMW. Other Brands like Porsche, Mercedes are to be found in the same region.

As independant specialists, we offer great advantages on all German brands.

All our cars are carefully selected. When dealing with us, you are assured to find the best conditions to buy your car. We secure a perfect state, a short and reliable delivery time and the right price for your car. Finally, our after-sales service is also at your disposal.

In addition to our important stock of cars, we propose a personalized search. Don’t hesitate! Contact us and we will find your dream car.

In conclusion, Bavaria Motors can handle the financing or leasing of your car. Contracts are carefully followed.

Name: Kaizen - A Casa da Autopeça
Description:
Somos a Kaizen - A Casa da Autopeça, uma das bandeiras do Grupo Bueno - um grupo formado por empresas diferentes com um propósito comum.

Atualmente, o Grupo Bueno é composto por quatro bandeiras:

- Pecista: Focada exclusivamente em vendas de grandes volumes no atacado;

- Kaizen - A Casa da Autopeça: Um atacarejo focado em venda para mecânicos e consumidores finais;

- G10: Marca de autopeças com foco em elétrica e químicos;

- Portal: Uma solução de e-commerce para mecânicos.


O nosso Grupo nasceu com a Pecista, em 1994, a partir do sonho e da visão empreendedora do Sr. Mário Sérgio Bueno, que começou vendendo peças no porta-malas de seu carro.

Em 2019 inauguramos a Kaizen - A Casa da Autopeça e hoje já contamos com cinco unidades em funcionamento: Asa Norte, Ceilândia, Gama, SOF Sul e Planaltina-DF.

E não vamos parar por aí! Brasília foi apenas o começo e em 2024 vamos cruzar mais uma barreira e seguir rumo ao Brasil!

Queremos estar no país inteiro, transformando o segmento de autopeças. Isso porque nossa cultura prega um serviço de excelência, buscando sempre trazer inovações e aumentando a proposta de valor para os nossos clientes.

Vamos fazer história juntos!

Name: Spares AutoExpress
Description:
Welcome to Spares AutoExpress, your one-stop-shop for all your automobile needs, located in the heart of Maseru, Lesotho. We are proud to serve our local community, providing a wide range of high-quality automobile essentials. Our commitment is to keep your vehicle running smoothly and looking great, with our extensive selection of service kits, brake system, engine spares, lighting accessories, lubricants, and car accessories. 

At Spares AutoExpress, we are more than just a retail store. We are a trusted distributor, seller, and reseller of top-notch automobile products. Our product range is carefully grouped into five main categories: Service Kits, engine spares, lubricants, brake system, lighting accessories. This categorisation ensures that you can easily find exactly what you need to keep your vehicle in top condition. 

Whether you're looking for service kits, to maintain your vehicle's performance, engine spears to gear up or replace worn-out parts, lubricants to keep all these parts well oiled, lighting accessories to enhance visibility, or car accessories to personalise your ride, Spares AutoExpress has got you covered. We are dedicated to providing our customers with the best products at competitive prices. So, come and visit us in Maseru, and let Spares AutoExpress take care of all your automobile needs!

Name: Super Dolphin Trading Co LLC
Description:
Super Dolphin Trading is a trusted source for premium aftermarket replacement parts serving Volvo & Scania trucks, buses, off-road machinery, and marine engines. As the sole distributor of SLP parts in the UAE and a supplier of leading global brands, we offer a comprehensive portfolio backed by proven quality and performance.

Our range includes critical components like engine parts, suspension systems, brake and transmission components, and more—ensuring customers have access to reliable solutions for their fleets and equipment.

We focus on building long-term partnerships by delivering quality products, technical expertise, and customer-centric support. Super Dolphin Trading is the go-to partner for businesses seeking high-quality parts that keep their operations running smoothly.

Name: PIASSA DZ
Description:
Chez Piassa, nous réinventons le marché algérien des pièces automobiles et de carrosserie en connectant, digitalisant et simplifiant chaque étape du processus.

Notre mission est simple : permettre aux automobilistes, garagistes et distributeurs de trouver rapidement la bonne pièce, au bon prix, avec une expérience fluide et fiable.

 Pour les clients : grâce à notre application mobile, vous pouvez publier une recherche de pièce en quelques secondes. Les vendeurs spécialisés reçoivent votre demande en temps réel et vous proposent leurs meilleures offres. Vous comparez, choisissez et commandez en toute confiance.

 Pour les vendeurs : Piassa est bien plus qu’une place de marché. C’est un outil SaaS intelligent (SIMON – Sales & Inventory Management Online) qui vous aide à gérer votre stock, vos ventes et vos commandes en ligne. Vous bénéficiez d’une vitrine digitale, d’un POS moderne et d’un canal de vente actif 24/7.

 Notre promesse : simplifier la chaîne de valeur, de la recherche de pièce à la livraison, grâce à des partenaires logistiques fiables et à des solutions de paiement sécurisées.

 Avec Piassa, nous construisons l’écosystème digital de l’automobile en Algérie :

Une app intuitive pour les clients,

Une solution SaaS performante pour les vendeurs,

Des services intégrés (paiement, logistique, assurance, data),

Et une vision : transformer un marché traditionnel en une expérience connectée, transparente et accessible à tous.


 Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure et découvrez comment Piassa devient le réflexe digital de l’automobile en Algérie.

Name: Gruppo PWP
Description: PWP S.r.l. Centro Porsche Firenze - Centro Porsche Pescara - Centro Porsche Approved & Service Arezzo. Dal 1989 siamo al servizio degli appassionati del marchio di Stoccarda in Toscana e dal 2022 anche in Abruzzo e Molise. Il nostro staff altamente qualificato è a vostra disposizione per soddisfare tutte le esigenze di acquisto di vetture Porsche, nuove e usate, e offrirvi un eccellente servizio di assistenza anche grazie a un fornitissimo magazzino ricambi e accessori originali Porsche. Il Gruppo PWP da gennaio 2026 fa parte di Eurocar Italia Srl controllata al 100% da Porsche Holding Gmbh.

Name: Nikkyo Co., Ltd
Description: Nikkyo Car's primary business is exporting second-hand Japanese vehicles, trucks & forklifts to countries around the world. Nikkyo consists of highly trained professionals, working together as a team to help export vehicles for our customers.

Name: Autoland AG
Description:
Seit über vier Jahrzehnten steht der Name Autoland für Verlässlichkeit und höchste Qualität. Mit Hauptsitz im sachsen-anhaltinischen Brehna bei Leipzig/Halle ist Autoland heute das größte herstellerunabhängige Automobilhandelsunternehmen Deutschlands – gewachsen aus Überzeugung, geführt mit Leidenschaft und angetrieben von kompromissloser Kundenorientierung.

Gegründet 1978 von Wilfried Wilhelm Anclam, wird das Unternehmen bis heute vom Gründer selbst, als Inhaber und Vorstandsvorsitzender, geleitet – mit unternehmerischem Weitblick, Bodenständigkeit und einem klaren Werteverständnis. Diese Prinzipien bilden das Fundament unseres Erfolgs und prägen die Unternehmenskultur, in der mittlerweile über 1.500 engagierte Mitarbeitende an 36 Standorten in 10 Bundesländern tätig sind.

Unsere Kundinnen und Kunden profitieren von einer Auswahl aus über 15.000 sofort verfügbaren Fahrzeugen – Neuwagen, Jahreswagen und sorgfältig geprüfte Gebrauchtwagen. Mit attraktiven Preisvorteilen auf Neuwagen bis 30% günstiger, auf Jahreswagen bis 40% günstiger, sowie für Gebrauchtwagen mit Bestpreisgarantie verbinden wir Qualität mit besten Konditionen – transparent, fair und verlässlich.

Im Jahr 2025 konnten wir über 58.000 Kundinnen und Kunden in ganz Deutschland beim Kauf ihres Wunschfahrzeugs begleiten – vom ersten Beratungsgespräch bis zur Schlüsselübergabe. Das Vertrauen unserer Kundinnen und Kunden ist für uns der größte Antrieb. Wahrer Erfolg entsteht dort, wo Vertrauen wächst—wenn unsere Kundinnen und Kunden sich gehört, verstanden und bestens beraten fühlen. Dieses Vertrauen zu verdienen ist für uns nicht nur ein Anspruch, sondern eine Herzenssache.

Name: Automotores Inka
Description:
Automotores Inka es una empresa que lleva varios años en el mercado, especializado en venta de vehículos de las marcas más comerciales del Perú.

Asimismo, cuenta con talleres multimarca en 4 ciudades diferentes que atienden la posventa de todos sus clientes.

Name: EXADIS
Description:
EXADIS est un opérateur national, spécialiste de la logistique-amont sur le marché de la rechange automobile indépendante multimarque depuis 2006. Son actionnariat se compose de participations de Renault Group, du Groupement des Concessionnaires Renault, et de Mobivia. 

Avec près de 150 personnes dont 30 en « front-office » : commerciaux terrain, techliners, téléconseillers, marketers, EXADIS est un logisticien-commerçant, proche de ses clients avec 8 plateformes de proximité, totalement interconnectées. 

Exadis est membre de Nexus France.

Name: QUADIS Autolica
Description:
QUADIS Autolica es uno de los concesionarios Mercedes-Benz más veteranos a nivel nacional. Empezó su actividad hace más de 90 años y pasó a ser el primer Concesionario de la marca en España por lo que atesora una tradición y experiencia Mercedes-Benz única en nuestro país. 

QUADIS Autolica dispone de 18 centros gracias a la unión de grandes concesionarios como son Cars Barcelona, MB Motors y Autolica, pertenecientes al Grupo QUADIS (la mayor red de concesionarios y talleres autorizados de España)

Nos dedicamos a la Venta y Postventa (taller y recambios) de vehículos Mercedes-Benz (turismos y vehículos industriales), AMG, Smart y FUSO.

Name: GNG Automobile
Description:
GNG Automobile AG – Ihr Partner für Mobilität

Seit über 75 Jahren steht GNG Automobile für erstklassigen Service und persönliche Beratung rund um VW, Audi, SEAT, CUPRA und VW Nutzfahrzeuge.

Unser Team begleitet Privat- und Geschäftskund:innen bei allen Fragen zur Neu- und Gebrauchtwagenwahl, Finanzierung, Service und Mobilitätslösungen.

 Offizieller Markenpartner 
 Werkstatt mit modernster Technik
 Persönlicher Service mit Herz

Besuchen Sie uns an unserem Standort in 9200 Gossau, Langfeldstrasse 10 oder online unterhttps://www.gng.ch/de

Name: INSTADRIVE
Description:
INSTADRIVE ist ein Dienstleistungsunternehmen, das seinen Kunden ein Sorglos-Paket zur Anschaffung von Elektroautos zur Verfügung stellt.

Sie können markenübergreifend alle E-Autos online konfigurieren, bestellen und direkt liefern lassen. Im sogenannten Elektroauto Langzeit-Abo bekommen Sie schließlich Ihr Wunschauto inklusive 
 Vollkasko-Versicherung
 Service & Wartung inkl. Verschleißteile
 Hauptuntersuchen (in AT §57a Untersuchung)
 Kfz-Steuer
 24/7 Unfall- & Pannenhilfe
 Reifen
 Heimladestation und
 Förderungsabwicklung
 in AT: Vignette
zu einer attraktiven monatlichen Rate.

Das Beste daran: Sie nutzen dieses Mobilitätsangebot solange Sie möchten und müssen sich während der Laufzeit um nichts mehr kümmern. Profitieren Sie von der raschen Verfügbarkeit der Fahrzeuge, der einfachen Abwicklung, den guten Konditionen und seien Sie noch dazu klimafreundlich unterwegs.

„Wir haben uns mit der Gründung von INSTADRIVE zum Ziel gesetzt, den Automobilvertrieb zu revolutionieren und Elektromobilität für Private und Unternehmen einfach und leistbar zu machen. Wir möchten jeder und jedem den Umstieg auf emissionsfreie, klimafreundliche Mobilität so einfach wie möglich gestalten!“
Philipp Halla und Andreas Mutter, Gründer & Geschäftsführer von INSTADRIVE 

So funktioniert die Mobilität der Zukunft. Nachhaltig, einfach und günstig! Jetzt einsteigen und mit INSTADRIVE vollelektrisch losfahren! EASING die einfachste Art ein E-Auto zu fahren.

Name: BikeWo
Description:
BikeWo is India’s No. 1 Electric Vehicle Multi-Brand Showrooms.  

Our aim is to spread the idea of electric two-wheeler usage to provide our customers a cost-effective transportation solution along with inculcating pollution free travel for our planet.

Name: FEDA
Description:
Organisation professionnelle représentant la filière aval de l'automobile, la Fédération de la Distribution Automobile (FEDA) porte depuis plus de cinquante ans la voix des distributeurs indépendants de pièces détachées automobiles et poids lourds (35 000 emplois dans plus de 1 300 entrepôts, sites logistiques et points de vente).

Par leur maillage du territoire, les adhérents de la FEDA contribuent grandement aux mobilités du quotidien.

L'action de la FEDA est relayée au niveau européen par le réseau FIGIEFA avec lequel elle collabore étroitement.

Name: Autodistribution International (ADI)
Description:
ADI, short for Autodistribution International, is the international head office of a leading European group of distributors of automotive replacement parts for motor vehicles.  The group counts more than 3000 AD distribution outlets in 40 countries in Europe, northern Africa and Central Asia.  Its core business is the distribution of original replacement parts (purchased directly from premium OE components manufacturers through international agreements) to any professional repair shop. Additionally the group provides professional garage customers with all services that support the traditional car repair and maintenance business, such as technical support and training, catalogue solutions and technical data, IT solutions, marketing programs and network concepts. 

Since its creation in 1970, ADI is a major driving force in automotive parts distribution in Europe.

Through its joint venture 1Parts (www.1parts.net), ADI extends its footprint beyond the European continent, seeking to harmonize automotive business solutions on a global scale.

Name: Demon Tweeks
Description:
The world’s leading retailer of high performance equipment and accessories for motorsport competitors, car tuners and motorcycle enthusiasts. 

For over 50 years we have focused entirely on these exciting, high octane and innovative markets, developing an unrivalled product portfolio and an exceptional level of expertise.

Check out our entire range of products by clicking below:

MOTORSPORT - https://www.demon-tweeks.com/uk/motorsport/

PERFORMANCE - https://www.demon-tweeks.com/uk/performance/

MOTORCYCLE - https://www.demon-tweeks.com/uk/motorcycle/

You can also visit our sister company here!

TWEEKS CYCLES - https://www.tweekscycles.com/

Name: IKA Germany
Description:
When every part has to fit, we take care that it does – from the part to the solution.

We believe in a repairable future: vehicles and industrial equipment deserve spare parts you can rely on. Our motivation: part, service, solution.

We deliver the part: always available and in the highest quality. We offer the service that supports our partners – from technical advice and training to customized solutions. And we create the solution by testing and simulating every detail and ensuring that everything fits.

As a family business, we work in partnership with customers who take quality seriously in over 70 countries, while also promoting the right to repair and open access to information in the spare parts market.

Behind the name GEBE stands a promise – part, service, solution, since 1906.

Name: DannyWorld | All About Auto
Description:
DannyWorld Auto (DW) is a trusted supplier dedicated to high-quality tools, equipment, and spare parts for the automotive industry.
Currently, We focus on EV Workshop Products and Tailored Products Solutions to our customers.

Name: Ápia Veículos
Description:
Há mais de sessenta anos no mercado com bandeira Volkswagen do Brasil, a Ápia foi fundada na cidade de Rio Claro e ganhou o maior desempenho a partir de 1989, quando um novo grupo acionário assumiu a direção da empresa, sob comando do Diretor-Presidente Sr. Sergio Cyrino da Silva, e atualmente dirigido pelo seu filho, o Diretor Marcelo Cyrino da Silva.


A Ápia dentro do seu conceito empreendedorismo abriu o seu leque de ampliação investindo em outras regiões fora dos domínios de Rio Claro, a primeira aquisição foi em abril de 1999 com a concessionária Santa Cândida, que passou para Ápia Araras. Depois, em outubro de 2002 adquiriu a concessionária Arauto, que passou a ser a Ápia Araraquara. Na sequência vieram a Ápia Matão, Ápia Leme e Ápia Pirassununga, formando o Grupo Ápia, atualmente com cinco concessionárias


Volkswagen.


O Grupo Ápia tem o compromisso de modernidade e qualidade em tudo que faz nas áreas de vendas de veículos novos e venda de veículos seminovos, vendas corporativas, peças, acessórios e prestação de serviços e áreas de apoio, e para isso conta com o empenho e dedicação de todos seus funcionários

Name: KUSLA Rapid Manufacturing
Description:
Located in Suzhou, China, KUSLA is a leading prototyping company specializing in rapid prototyping for Automotive lighting and low-volume manufacturing of plastic and metal parts.  Our comprehensive services cover the entire product development journey, from prototype to production.

Asimismo, ofrecemos una amplia variedad de herramientas y equipos para talleres, uniformes y accesorios tanto para bomberos como para trabajadores en altura. No nos detenemos aquí; también nos involucramos en el suministro de materiales aislantes utilizados en el bobinado de motores.

Nos enorgullece destacarnos en estas diversas áreas de interés y nos comprometemos a ofrecer productos y servicios de la más alta calidad en cada uno de estos sectores. Nuestro objetivo principal es satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes, manteniendo los estándares de excelencia que nos han caracterizado a lo largo de nuestra trayectoria.

Name: STRAPPINI SPA
Description:
Strappini, protagonista dei trasporti

La ditta Strappini nasce a Foligno, in provincia di Perugia, nel gennaio 1942, come azienda individuale, ad opera del fondatore Silvestro Strappini.

Inizialmente l’azienda svolge attività di officina meccanica e commercio autoveicoli usati; successivamente l’attività viene trasferita a Spello (PG) e da azienda individuale si trasforma in società a responsabilità limitata, con la denominazione Strappini S.r.l.

Dal 1974 da il via all’attività di vendita di veicoli industriali e nel 1980 acquisisce il mandato IVECO. Opera nelle province di Viterbo, Terni e Rieti; svolgendo attività di vendita veicoli nuovi IVECO, vendita veicoli Usati multi marca, attività di Officina e Magazzino Ricambi.

La sede legale è situata ad Orte (VT) - Località Caldare (di fronte al casello autostradale), su di un vasto complesso immobiliare di circa 25.000 mq, di cui 5.000 coperti. Moderna e tecnologicamente avanzata; la sede è dotata di un'Officina meccanica ubicata su di una superficie di 3.600 mq, fornita delle più moderne tecnologie, di un valido Centro Diagnostico, di un Daily Service Crono e  una zona adibita alla cura del vostro Daily. 

La STRAPPINI  S.p.A. svolge la sua attività inoltre nella filiale di Terni, in via del Maglio n  7. 
A Spello, (PG)  è presente con un importante Centro USATO  per la vendita multimarca di veicoli Industriali, con un vasto assortimento di autoveicoli, in perfette condizioni. 
 
Parte integrante della nostra squadra sono le 10 Officine Autorizzate IVECO che costituiscono  la   Rete Assistenziale  presente sul territorio, Officine che svolgono la loro attività  con  la stessa nostra professionalità e competenza.

In data 3 Aprile 2007 la Società ha operato la trasformazione della propria natura giuridica da S.r.l. a S.p.A.

Dal 1 Luglio 2013 la Strappini S.p.A. è stata nominata Concessionaria Iveco anche per la provincia di L'Aquila.

Name: Manzotti Automobili
Description:
Un concessionario costruito sulla filosofia del movimento

Parlare di automobili significa parlare di movimento. 
Se mettessimo in fila tutte le vetture fornite ai nostri clienti dal 1954 a oggi e ne disegnassimo il profilo con una matita, il risultato sarebbe una linea veloce che sale e scende nel tempo e scavalca le mode di oltre sei decenni e due generazioni. Su quella linea, per Manzotti Automobili, non c’è mai stato un tratto omogeneo: abbiamo ascoltato attentamente gli stimoli della tecnologia, le esigenze dei consumatori, le innovazioni ecologiche, la passione per i motori, che confidiamo non cambi mai. Ci siamo adeguati e abbiamo trasformato il nostro mestiere in un servizio e, nonostante i grandi cambiamenti, siamo convinti che l’automobile sia rimasta il miglior mezzo con cui attraversare lo spazio, ma anche e soprattutto il tempo: con la digitalizzazione e le nuove tecnologie, una vettura non è più soltanto un mezzo di trasporto, ma uno spazio dedicato al benessere, al tempo libero o alla professione. 

Seguiamo le eccellenze anche nelle curve più impegnative

Nel nostro campo, l’immobilità non è contemplata, perché il livello d’innovazione deve seguire gli standard delle eccellenze con cui collaboriamo. Non ci accontentiamo di fornire una consulenza all’acquisto di una vettura, ma assistiamo il cliente che l’ha scelta anche nelle fasi successive, in modo che il veicolo rappresenti l’esatta risposta alle sue necessità.

Name: spare247.com
Description:
Spare247.com came into development when professionals in the auto parts industry reflected on how to better serve the diverse stake holders in the marketplace.


Three major stakeholders were identified and our mission was to help them purchase parts easier.

The Car Owner – A typical car owner wants personalized attention and to feel confident that they are buying the right part for their car. They also require the convenience of delivery or pick-up from an accessible location.
The Garage – A garage needs a centralized system to save the multiple profiles of customers and their vehicle information. They also need a reliable and efficient system to order parts for their customers.
The Parts Importer – An importer wants a quick quotation of their auto parts at the best price and for those parts to be delivered seamlessly to their destination.

We at Spare247, have designed a platform that addresses the needs of our three main stakeholders so that everyone can have access to quality products which fulfil their requirements.

If you require any assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us directly.

Our aim is to make sure you get the right spare 24/7.

Description:
Changan, una de las principales marcas automotrices de China, tiene una historia que se remonta a 1862. Sin embargo, su incursión en la fabricación de automóviles comenzó en 1957, cuando inició la producción de vehículos bajo licencia de Suzuki y Ford. 
Con el paso de los años, Changan se ha consolidado como uno de los cuatro grandes fabricantes de automóviles chinos, destacándose por su diseño, tecnología y calidad. Y a nivel mundial estamos posicionados en el #13 de las marcas más vendidas.

En el año 2020 oficialmente llega a Venezuela Changan de la mano de APB Group. Esto nos permitió ofrecer una nueva alternativa automotriz a los venezolanos, caracterizada por vehículos modernos, eficientes y adaptados a las necesidades de cada uno de nuestros clientes. 

APB Group, por su parte, es un consorcio de reconocidos y exitosos empresarios Venezolanos, con amplia experiencia en la distribución y comercialización de vehículos en Venezuela, lo que ha sido fundamental para el éxito de Changan en este mercado.

Nuestra misión es ofrecer al mercado venezolano vehículos de alta calidad, tecnología de punta y un servicio postventa excepcional, y nuestra visión es ser líderes en el mercado venezolano.

Somos más que autos! Changan es el vehículo oficial de la Vinotinto.

Únete a nosotros en este emocionante viaje!

¿Quieres conocer más sobre Changan y la gama completa de vehículos y sus increíbles características?

Name: TRIO MOTORS D.O.O.
Description:
Kompanija Trio Motors je jedna od retkih firmi iz automobilske branše na našim prostorima koja može da se pohvali tradicijom poslovanja od čak 34 godine. Nastala kao mala porodična firma, kompanija se tokom godina razvila u jednog od lidera na polju ponude i prodaje rezervnih delova za japanska i južnokorejska vozila, a nešto kasnije i servisiranje istih.

Pune tri decenije, Trio Motors je posvećen pružanju profesionalne i pouzdane usluge, a tim zaposlenih je sastavljen od vrhunskih profesionalaca sa dugogodišnjim iskustvom u auto-industriji. Pored već pomenutih azijskih auto-brendova, Trio Motors je i jedan od lidera na polju ponude i ugradnje dodatne opreme za terenska i pikap vozila, sa naročitim naglaskom na specijalizovane off-road „mašine“.

Uz sve to, Trio Motors je zastupnik i poznatih svetskih brendova, kao što je SUBARU putnički program, ali i teretni program brenda ISUZU, u koja spadaju ne samo pikap modeli, već i laki i srednji kamioni do 14 tona bruto nosivosti. Takođe, za pomenute brendove, kompanija nudi i širok spektar dodatne opreme, sa obezbeđenom ugradnjom i neophodnim pratećim atestima, sve po sistemu „ključ u ruke“.

Istovremeno, nije zapostavljen ni segment dvotočkaša, te je tako Trio Motors i ovlašćeni uvoznik, prodavac i serviser za Kawasaki motocikle, kao i njihov prateći program koji uključuje ATV kvadove, SIDE X SIDE vozila i JET SKI plovila.

Od marta 2023. godine, Trio Motors se nalazi u sastavu OMR Grupe, u okviru koje već posluju kompanije poput British Motors, Globos osiguranje, AKS Fleet Solution, CVS, Bavaria Team, MiOS Mobility i druge.

Description:
We are India’s oldest distribution house for Hydraulics. We set up business in this field in 1986, long before selling hydraulic components and spares via a network became fashionable. With over 30 years in the field, we are a name to reckon with in hydraulics.

We understand the standards and norms followed by our customers in their manufacturing process. We identify the challenges they face in terms of efficiency, output and productivity. The HVK Engineer, from our locations at Chennai, Coimbatore, Bengaluru, Hospet, Hosur and representatives at Madurai and Puducheri, is a familiar face at all our customer locations. Today, HVK, with the wide product range that it brings with it, in addition to those that it designs and delivers, is a name to reckon with in its chosen field of Industrial Hydraulics.

Name: E. D. Automotive Srl
Description:
Welcome to E.D. Automotive Srl, your trusted partner for high-quality spare parts supply and hail damage repair. With years of experience in the industry, we are committed to providing excellent and personalized solutions to meet our customers’ needs.

E.D. Automotive Srl - Spare Parts Supply
We offer a wide range of spare parts for vehicles of all makes and models, including commercial vehicles and trucks. Our mission is to provide the best shopping experience, accompanying the customer at every stage: from finding the right part to shipping, and post-sale support.

We collaborate with leading Italian manufacturers and distributors to ensure the availability of slow-moving spare parts. We specialize in engines, manual and automatic transmissions, turbochargers, injection systems, steering components, air conditioning compressors, clutch kits, flywheels, starters, and alternators. We offer certified and guaranteed overhaul services. We deliver throughout Italy with fast shipping in 24/48 hours and, in major Italian cities, we offer multiple deliveries on the same day for greater convenience.

E.D. Automotive Srl - Hail Damage Repair
We specialize in repairing hail damage, using advanced techniques to restore your vehicle’s bodywork without compromising the original paint. Our specialization in cold working allows us to remove dents effectively without using paint, preserving the vehicle’s integrity.

Our technicians have over 15 years of experience gained in Italy and around the world, ensuring high-quality service and professionalism. Thanks to our international experience, we can handle any type of hail damage, offering personalized solutions for each customer.

Trust E.D. Automotive Srl for hail damage repair and discover the difference our experience and dedication can make for your vehicle.

Name: Megavia Motor Co. Inc.
Description:
Megavia Motor Co., Inc. (MMCI) was founded in 2010 with a singular goal: to provide Yamaha motorcycle enthusiasts with genuine spare parts and exceptional after-sales service. Our journey began with the launch of the flagship store, The 3S Shop, a one-stop destination for all things Yamaha, offering comprehensive services and high-quality products tailored to the needs of every rider.

The success of The 3S Shop set the foundation for MMCI's growth, and soon, we expanded our reach by opening more branches nationwide. Recognizing the increasing demand for reliable motorcycle solutions, MMCI took a significant leap in May 2013, entering the multi-brand motorcycle business. 

With a total of nine stores, MMCI continues to be at the forefront of the motorcycle industry, delivering top-tier products and services to riders across the nation. We are committed to providing genuine parts, ensuring safety and performance for all our customers, while our dedicated after-sales services keep motorcycles running smoothly long after the purchase.

At MMCI, customer satisfaction is paramount. We strive to offer a seamless experience through every step of the customer journey, from the moment a motorcycle enters our shop for maintenance to when a rider picks it up in peak condition. Our team of highly trained professionals is passionate about motorcycles and dedicated to meeting the evolving needs of our customers.

As we continue to grow, our focus remains on empowering mobility by offering unparalleled support, high-quality products, and expert services. Whether you're a Yamaha enthusiast or a fan of other top Japanese brands, MMCI is your trusted partner in keeping you on the road with confidence and style.

Megavia Motor Co., Inc. (MMCI) – Your Trusted Source for Genuine Parts, After-Sales Service, and Multi-Brand Motorcycle Solutions Since 2010.

Description:

Una storia torinese, con un'esperienza tramandata di padre in figlio, grazie alla quale abbiamo reso felici oltre 50.000 clienti che hanno trovato nella nostra realtà un partner affidabile in grado di seguirti in tutto quello che riguarda il pre e il post vendita. Perché acquistare un’auto è un momento importante. Perché chi acquista un’auto ha bisogno di fidarsi. Perché chi compra un’auto ha bisogno di confrontarsi con una realtà che garantisca la propria presenza anche dopo l’acquisto.

Il nostro auto salone nasce a Torino il 09 settembre 1985, giorno del compleanno del fondatore, che aveva già maturato una importante esperienza nel settore. Sin dagli inizi il tricolore, presente anche nel nostro logo, è stato uno degli elementi caratterizzanti, perchè crediamo nella bontà delle aziende italiane e nella loro innata capacità di saper creare un rapporto di empatia con i propri interlocutori.

Siamo orgogliosi anche di poterci avvalere della certificazione TUV UNI EN ISO 9001:2015, riconosciuta al sistema di vendita ed alla gestione dell’assistenza di vetture nuove ed usate, a testimonianza dell’impegno e della professionalità con cui ogni giorno svolgiamo il nostro lavoro, sempre con l’obiettivo di soddisfare le richieste dei nostri clienti.

Name: Lords Impex Pakistan
Description:

Our dedicated teams make sure each account is taken care of and provided with special attention as well as make the process of warranty claims as smooth as possible with adept persons looking at their case.

We ensure that all tires distributed by Lords Impex are complying with the relevant laws and regulations as well as internal requirements. We consistently try to improve the quality management systems to guarantee product safety, prevent road accidents occurring from faulty tires, and meet or exceed customer needs and expectations.

Our employees are appropriately skilled, trained and educated to maintain our quality standards and can remove faulty or defective tires from our sale networks.

Over the years we have built an extended sales network all over Greece, through which we distribute the tires to our customers, providing additional high-quality services. Name: Extradeon s.r.o.
Description:
Extradeon s.r.o. je přední česká společnost specializující se na vysoce kvalitní automobilové doplňky, s hlavním zaměřením na dojezdová kola a kryty pod motory. Společnost byla založena v roce 2020 s vášní pro automobily, s cílem nabídnout kvalitní alternativu k originálním dílům a přinést zákazníkům řešení, které poskytuje něco navíc.

Naše produkty:
 Dojezdová kola – Řidiči s našimi koly nemusí trávit hodiny čekáním na odtahové služby nebo mechaniky. Našim zákazníkům po celém světě jsme už ušetřili více než 1 000 hodin času.
 Kryty pod motorem – Poskytujeme ochranu důležitým komponentům vozidla před nepříznivými podmínkami a korozí. Naše kryty pomáhají prodloužit životnost motoru a snižují riziko nákladných oprav.

Naše filozofie:
V Extradeonu se zaměřujeme na poskytování komplexních řešení, která našim zákazníkům přinášejí pohodlí, bezpečnost a dlouhodobou hodnotu – mnohem víc než jen prodej náhradních dílů.

 Pro více informací nás kontaktujte přímo zde na LinkedIn nebo navštivte naši webovou stránku.

Name: Sortimo Hungary
Description:
Tökéletes rend a maximális hatékonyság érdekében!

"Ma megfelelni a holnap kihívásainak." - ezen elv mentén dolgozunk a Sortimo-nál nap mint nap. A Sortimo a járműberendezések, szervizautó állvány- és polcrendszerek területén világszerte piacvezető. Teljeskörű szolgáltatást nyújtunk Ügyfeleink számára, kezdve az egyéni vállalkozó szakemberektől, a szervizflottával rendelkező vállalatokon át egészen az autókereskedőkig. Személyre szabott, egyedülálló megoldásainkkal célunk, hogy Ügyfeleink munkáját egyszerűbbé, hatékonyabbá tegyük, ezáltal pénzt és időt megtakarítva számukra. A Sortimo International GmbH egyedülálló innovációs teljesítményének, továbbá a maximális Ügyfélfókusznak köszönhetően magabiztosan állíthatjuk, hogy legalább 3-5 évvel a piac előtt járunk megoldásainkkal, szolgáltatásainkkal. Jelszavunk az "Intelligens mobilitás" - ez különböztet meg minket.

A Sortimo International GmbH-t 1973-ban alapították, mely az azóta legendássá vált kék fémkoffereknek köszönhette kezdeti sikereit. A kofferekből idővel állványrendszerek, majd a legprofesszionálisabb állványrendszerek, kofferrendszerek (L-BOXX) gyártójává nőtte ki magát a vállalat. Magyarországon 2021 óta vagyunk jelen, ezalatt pedig többszáz elégedett Partnerrel, Sortimo Fanatikusokkal büszkélkedhetünk. Mindezt 6 fős csapatunkkal szolgáljuk ki, tehát nemcsak beszélünk a hatékonyságról, tudjuk is, mit jelent hatékonynak lenni. Célunk, hogy mindenki megtapasztalja azt, milyen a Sortimo Családhoz tartozni, ezáltal hatékonnyá téve a mindennapokat!

Name: Repuestos Doral Canarias
Description:
Repuestos Doral es una empresa de referencia en el sector del recambio libre en Canarias, dedicada a proporcionar soluciones integrales a talleres de reparación. Nuestro compromiso es dotar a nuestros clientes de tecnología avanzada, conocimiento especializado y productos de máxima calidad, para que puedan afrontar con éxito los desafíos del sector de la automoción.

Somos distribuidores oficiales del Grupo CGA y representantes de marcas líderes como Bosch, ATE, Valeo, Continental, Ferodo, Al-KO, Purflux, Sachs y Bahco, entre otras. Asimismo, contamos con la distribución exclusiva de los lubricantes Castrol en Canarias, fortaleciendo nuestra oferta con productos reconocidos a nivel internacional.

Repuestos Doral forma parte de Domingo Alonso Group, grupo empresarial líder en el ámbito de la automoción en Canarias, lo que nos permite operar con una visión estratégica y una sólida estructura empresarial.
Location: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Las Palmas

Name: R&J Strang Tyre Services
Description:
R&J Strang Tyre Services supply a huge range of tyres in a variety of sizes for various applications including car and van, truck, agricultural and earth-moving machines. We are committed to sourcing the right tyre at the right price for our customers and can provide tyre solutions to suit any budget.

The company was founded in 1994 by Robert and Jackie Strang in Blantyre where our first depot was established.  As our demand and reputation for supplying quality products and services grew so did our business and after moving to our current Head Office in Hamilton, we opened further depots in Broxburn, Irvine and Dundee growing in strength and offering a service that is unsurpassed in central Scotland. 

In 2019 R&J Strang became a subsidiary of the Continental Tyre Group. Supported by our new parent company we continue remain true to our family business values and provide honest reliable service to our customers just as we have for the last 26 years.   

Our fully equipped service vans and professional technicians ensure in the event of a roadside breakdown, you experience minimal downtime and a rapid response wherever the location. When choosing R&J Strang our customers are not only assured of tyres that meet their budget and fitment policy, but they will also benefit from fleet inspections, maintenance programs, repairs and a rapid breakdown service across the UK and mainland Europe via Conti360° Solutions.

We offer comprehensive free of charge tyre checks at our depots and a drive-in service for both car and van and commercial customers – for further information visit our website.

We look forward to finding the right tyre for you!

Name: BuyAftermarketParts

BuyAftermarketParts.com is a leading online supplier specializing in high-quality aftermarket parts for heavy equipment and machinery. We are dedicated to meeting the needs of businesses and individuals alike by providing an extensive range of parts at competitive prices.

Our easy-to-navigate platform allows customers to quickly find, compare, and purchase the parts they need, saving them time and money. From construction and agricultural machinery to heavy-duty trucks, we cover a wide variety of industrial sectors.

With a commitment to excellence, we strive to ensure customer satisfaction through our prompt delivery service, backed by a knowledgeable customer support team ready to assist with any inquiries. Our mission is to be the go-to source for all aftermarket part needs, providing customers with a seamless shopping experience from search to purchase. 

We understand the importance of reliability in heavy equipment, and that's why all our products undergo rigorous testing to meet industry standards. At BuyAftermarketParts.com, we believe in quality, affordability, and convenience.

Description:
AZ RICAMBI opera nel settore automotive ed è attiva a Sassari (SS) dal 2012 come punto di riferimento nel servizio di fornitura di ricambi per auto e veicoli industriali, attrezzature ed utensileria.

Forniamo i ricambi delle migliori marche attualmente disponibili sul mercato per autovetture private e automezzi industriali, garantendo precisione e affidabilità sia nella qualità che nel prezzo.

Presso la nostra sede offriamo un ampio assortimento di soluzioni innovative e tecnologiche per ogni esigenza, che vengono messe a disposizione dei nostri clienti tramite un magazzino di oltre 2000 mq che comprende oltre 50.000 articoli.

Siamo leader nel settore dei ricambi auto e truck, essendo in grado di supportare autoriparatori, autotrasportatori e automobilisti che desiderano accessori e componenti di qualità e all’avanguardia.

Ciò che ci caratterizza maggiormente è l’ampia disponibilità di prodotti presso la nostra sede, l’essere costantemente aggiornati per mantenere alto il livello qualitativo e garantire sempre prodotti automotive di ultimissima generazione.

Name: Continental Reifen Austria GmbH
Description:

Name: Auto Lines Australia
Description:

At Auto Lines, we prioritise customer satisfaction by providing expert guidance and exceptional service. Whether you're looking for advanced diagnostics or high-quality accessories, we are dedicated to helping you make the right choice for your vehicle’s needs.

Name: RoadMax

From high-performance cleaning agents to stylish accessories, RoadMax ensures your vehicle receives the attention it deserves. Committed to quality and an exceptional experience, we strive to make your journey with us as smooth as a well-maintained road. Discover the RoadMax difference and drive with confidence.

Name: DR-GROUP EC

Let´s Build a Brighter Future Together...

Name: Indiana Auto Auction
Description:
Welcome to Indiana Auto Auction! For nearly 20 years, our family-owned business has proudly served Indiana, Illinois, Ohio, and Southern Michigan continually expanding our operations to meet the needs of our valued customers. 

At Indiana Auto Auction, we are proud of our exceptional leadership and their unwavering commitment to customer service excellence. Our CEO's dedication to the industry is underscored by their role as the President of the National Auctioneers Association of America (NAAA), exemplifying our commitment to setting industry standards and delivering exceptional service to our clients. 

Indiana Auto Auction's commitment to excellence operates here  in Fort Wayne Indiana. We take pride in recognizing the achievements and efforts of our dedicated employees and leadership team. Our goal is to consistently deliver the best auction and customer experience each and every time. 

Consistency is key and with a keen focus on perfecting our craft, our attention to detail is evident in every department, from the mechanic shop to reconditioning, and throughout the auction process itself. We understand the value of time, and through our streamlined processes, we are able to offer over 1,000 cars weekly, providing a wide range of options for our customers. 

Join us at Indiana Auto Auction, where our passion for excellence drives us to exceed expectations and set new standards for the automotive auction industry. Experience the auction and our dedication to lasting relationships and we'll see you in the lanes!

Name: DK Garagebedrijf
Description:
DK Garagebedrijf is al sinds januari 2011 vanuit Beek en Donk, Noord-Brabant actief met klanten uit heel het land! 

Als 18-jarige startte Daan Kuypers een klein, beginnend garagebedrijf. Vanaf de start als monteur-eigenaar met slechts één brug heeft hij het bedrijf uitgebouwd naar een professioneel garagebedrijf voor auto-onderhoud, reparatie en in-, verkoop van auto’s. 

Inmiddels bestaat het team van DK-Garagebedrijf uit net geen 10 man, zijn er dagelijks 10 werkplaatsbruggen bezet en staan er circa 65 auto's te koop aangeboden! 

Het geheim achter deze groei? Heel eenvoudig; het vertrouwen van een uitgebreide kring tevreden klanten!

Name: Porsche Zentrum Lörrach
Description:
Wenn es um Porsche-Sportwagen in der Region geht, ist das Team in unserem Porsche Zentrum Lörrach die erste Adresse für alle Autofans und Liebhaber dieser legendären Marke. Mit viel Hingabe und Fachwissen steht unser Team den Kunden in allen Belangen rund um Porsche zur Seite. Das Porsche Zentrum Lörrach lädt Sie dazu ein, die Faszination Porsche in ihrer ganzen Pracht in der Fahrzeugausstellung zu erleben. „Tauchen Sie ein in die Welt der Sportwagenlegende und lassen Sie sich von der Schönheit und Kraft unserer Fahrzeuge verzaubern“. Hier haben Sie die Möglichkeit, ausgewählte Modelle hautnah zu betrachten und sich von Experten zu individuellen Konfigurationsmöglichkeiten beraten zu lassen. 

„Bei uns wird Kundenzufriedenheit großgeschrieben", erklärt Martina Gehri. „Unsere Leidenschaft für Porsche spiegelt sich in unserem Service und unserer Passion wider, unseren Kunden ein unvergleichliches Erlebnis zu bieten. Wir legen großen Wert darauf, dass Sie sich bei uns rundum wohl und gut beraten fühlen." Das Porsche Zentrum Lörrach verspricht eine einzigartige Kombination aus hochwertigen Fahrzeugen, erstklassigem Service und exzellenter Beratung

Name: Automotive Distribuzione Ricambi - ADR Srl
Description:
Competenza, contatto con il cliente e tanta voglia di fare sono gli ingredienti per il successo di ADR S.R.L. una realtà che opera da protagonista nel settore auto da oltre due decenni.

La base del nostro successo è conoscere i segreti del mercato in cui operiamo, poiché vivendolo in prima linea da protagonisti, vuol dire avere un ruolo importante.

ADR S.R.L. ha nel proprio DNA questa filosofia, questo modo di operare e di agire e per farlo pone la formazione e il servizio al centro della sua attività. 

L’azienda nasce nel 2001 a Roma e nel 2002 viene nominato Concessionario Bosch Automotive Aftermarket & Diagnostics.

Da Febbraio 2008 è socio di GROUPAUTO ITALIA, uno dei gruppi di distribuzione ricambi più importanti a livello europeo.

Name: LIFTBAY ITALIA
Description:
La nostra azienda è un leader nel settore della commercializzazione di ricambi per piattaforme aeree. Siamo specializzati nella fornitura di componenti di alta qualità per una vasta gamma di marchi.
LiftBay e anche fornitore di batterie e caricabatterie per golfcar e navette elettriche.

Collaboriamo con rinomati produttori di macchinari per garantire che i nostri ricambi siano conformi agli standard più elevati in termini di qualità e affidabilità. Offriamo una vasta selezione di ricambi originali e compatibili, compresi motori, cilindri idraulici, cavi, comandi elettronici, parti strutturali e molto altro ancora.

Il nostro team altamente competente e specializzato è in grado di offrire consulenza tecnica e supporto per aiutare i nostri clienti a identificare e selezionare i ricambi corretti per le loro piattaforme aeree. Siamo consapevoli dell'importanza della tempestività e dell'efficienza nella fornitura dei ricambi, pertanto ci impegniamo a garantire consegne rapide e affidabili.

La nostra reputazione è basata sulla qualità dei nostri prodotti, sulla nostra esperienza nel settore e sulla nostra attenzione al servizio clienti. Siamo orgogliosi di offrire soluzioni di ricambi convenienti e affidabili che aiutano le aziende a mantenere le loro piattaforme aeree in condizioni ottimali, riducendo i tempi di fermo macchina e aumentando la produttività complessiva.

Scegliendo i nostri ricambi per piattaforme aeree, i clienti possono contare su prodotti di alta qualità, servizio clienti eccellente e una partnership duratura con un'azienda affidabile nel settore.

Name: NAPA Deutschland
Description:
Die Kultmarke NAPA (National Automotive Parts Association) wurde 1925 in den USA gegründet. Das Ziel war von Anfang an klar: Autofahrern und -fahrerinnen qualitativ hochwertige, sichere und langlebige Produkte zu bieten. Mit hundert Jahren Erfahrung setzt NAPA inzwischen Maßstäbe in der Aftermarket-Branche.

Im Laufe der Jahre hat sich die Marke an verschiedene technologische Fortschritte und die wachsenden Anforderungen des Automobilmarktes angepasst. Heute ist NAPA weltweit für den umfangreichen Produktkatalog für Fahrzeuge aller Marken und Modelle bekannt und steht für Qualität und Zuverlässigkeit.

Im Jahr 2017 wurde die Alliance Automotive Group von der Genuine Parts Company (GPC), dem Eigentümer von NAPA, übernommen. In Deutschland bieten wir mittlerweile 16 NAPA-Produktgruppen an, darunter Schmierstoffe, Bremsen, Stoßdämpfer, Batterien und mehr.

Vor allem die Menschen sind ein grundlegender Teil der Entwicklung. Als großer Aftermarket-Händler sind wir uns bewusst, dass es an jedem und jeder einzelnen von uns liegt, die Automobilwelt positiv zu beeinflussen.

Description:
ITE Bus & Truck Ltd. as a subsidiary of ITK Holding Zrt. has been established in 2020 and responsible for sales and customer services tasks. As a result of the production of Inter Traction Electrics Ltd., the company provides high-value Mercedes-Benz REFORM buses and Mercedes-Benz Sprinter vehicles designed for individual customer needs. From April 2023, ITE Bus & Truck Kft. took over the general importer duties from Mercedes-Benz Hungária Kft. in relation to the truck business. Our company also responsible for sales tasks, customer service and spare parts supply, importer and wholesale distribution tasks related to Mercedes-Benz Trucks. The business policy of ITE Bus & Truck Ltd. is providing high-level and effective service for customers who choose one of the world's most valuable brand. 

From October 1, 2024, the entire team of Omnibus Hungária Kft., the general importer of Mercedes-Benz and Setra buses continued its operations as the bus division of ITE Bus & Truck Kft., as the Hungarian importer and official representative of Daimler Buses GmbH, a subsidiary of Daimler Truck AG.

ITE Bus & Truck Kft. now represents five brands in Hungary: in addition to Mercedes-Benz, it also represents Setra, FUSO, provides service through OMNIplus, as well as offering the BusStore brands.

The merge of Omnibus Hungária Kft. into ITE Bus & Truck Kft. marks the final step in the creation of a new representation structure that began less than two years ago. This structure is preferred by Daimler Truck AG as part of its global network development strategy, whereby the representation of its commercial vehicles in each country is handled by a single company.

Name: PRONTOAUTO
Description:
Prontoauto s.p.a. è concessionaria ufficiale di vendita e assistenza Fiat, Lancia, Fiat Professional, Abarth, Jeep, Alfa Romeo per la provincia di Udine. 
La storia di prontoauto comincia nel 1975 a collalto di tarcento, in provincia di udine, concessionaria all'epoca suddivisa in due realtà: prontoquattro e prontocarri. 
La prima come punto di riferimento di tutto il territorio per l'acquisto di autovetture e veicoli commerciali leggeri del marchio fiat, la seconda, vetrina dei camion iveco. 
Nel 1984 un nuovo passo per l'azienda: cambia strategia, si rinuncia al marchio iveco per dedicarsi soltanto all'auto e ai veicoli commerciali leggeri. Nel 2004 prontoauto acquisisce la concessionaria di vendita e assistenza lancia per udine e provincia. Nel 2011 è stato creati il deposito mirafiori motorvillage, uno spazio commerciale che racchiude le migliori offerte della galassia fiat. Nel deposito la clientela può trovare e acquistare oltre 150 vetture del parco aziendale fiat, fiat professional, alfa romeo e lancia: tutti i veicoli aziendali e chilometro zero che vengono acquistati direttamente dalla casa madre, certificatie con garanzia ufficiale fiat. Risale al 2012 l'acquisizione della sede secondaria di cervignano, grazie alla quale è stato ampliato pure il numero di centri assistenza. Una rete vendita sempre più capillare, che fa della presenza sul territorio uno dei maggiori punti di forza.

成立至今，在满足客户差异化需求的同时，已完成工厂标准化建设，形成覆盖全国的供应链平台，在敏捷体系的加持下，辐射东南亚及欧洲业务，通过多元化供应战略，打造风险免疫型生态体系，赋能全生命周期价值创造。目前，以长春、上海、常州、合肥四大研发中枢为技术引擎，联动东北，华北，华东，华南，西南几大智能制造集群，形成辐射全国的黄金产能布局。同时于泰国设立东南亚制造中心，延伸国际业务。在新能源转型浪潮中，坚持"双螺旋"发展模式：既保持与传统车企的战略协同，也凭着敏捷的市场反应，在新能源领域与国内外头部新能源企业合作，多次获得国内头部主机厂 “十佳供应商”，“卓越合作伙伴”，“捷出贡献奖”，“最佳实践伙伴”，“VC推进奖”，“合作共赢奖”等荣誉，成长为值得信赖的伙伴。

Name: ABIAN PAYS BASQUE
Description:
**Abian Pays Basque : votre partenaire d’aventure**  
Spécialisé dans les pick-ups, 4×4, vans, fourgons et équipements de bivouac, Abian Pays Basque vous accompagne dans le secteur du BAB (Bayonne, Anglet, Biarritz) et au-delà, jusqu’à Tarbes et Pau. En tant que concessionnaire principal d’Isuzu D-Max et spécialiste SAAB, notre équipe vous guide vers le véhicule idéal pour vos escapades.  

**Une expertise reconnue depuis 2007**  
Depuis sa création, Abian Pays Basque s’est imposé comme une référence, proposant une gamme variée de véhicules et d’équipements fiables, adaptés aux amateurs d’aventure et aux professionnels.  

**Équipements pour le bivouac**  
Passionnés par la nature ? Nous offrons des équipements de bivouac de qualité : tentes de toit, réchauds, stations électriques portables et accessoires outdoor. En collaboration avec des marques reconnues comme Front Runner, nous garantissons autonomie et confort lors de vos voyages.  

**Préparations sur mesure**  
Nos experts adaptent votre véhicule à vos besoins : tentes de toit robustes, systèmes d’eau, hardtops, rangements intégrés, etc. Chaque solution est conçue pour optimiser vos performances sur la route et en pleine nature.  

**Services complets et conseils personnalisés**  
En plus des véhicules et accessoires, nous proposons un atelier mécanique spécialisé et un stock complet de pièces détachées pour un entretien optimal. Besoin de conseils pour vos aventures ? Notre équipe vous guide dans le choix des équipements adaptés à vos projets.  

**Contactez-nous**  
Abian Pays Basque est là pour rendre chaque voyage unique et mémorable. Contactez-nous pour découvrir nos solutions sur mesure et vivre pleinement vos aventures !

Name: Catalano Group
Description:
Dal 1973, Catalano Group è un punto di riferimento per il mondo dell’automotive a Torino e provincia. Con oltre 50 anni di esperienza, il gruppo rappresenta alcuni tra i più importanti marchi internazionali come Renault, Alpine, Dacia, Nissan, Kia, Hyundai, DR, Ducati e Harley-Davidson, offrendo una gamma completa di veicoli nuovi, usati e a km 0.

Il nostro obiettivo è accompagnare ogni cliente nella scelta del veicolo più adatto alle proprie esigenze, garantendo affidabilità e fornendo una vasta capacità di soluzioni.

Oltre alla vendita, Catalano Group offre servizi post-vendita specializzati: officine autorizzate, manutenzione, assistenza tecnica e ricambi originali. Affianchiamo i clienti anche con soluzioni finanziarie e assicurative personalizzate, per rendere l’acquisto di un veicolo un’esperienza semplice e sicura.

Nelle soluzioni fornite da Catalano Group troverai anche le opzioni di noleggio a privati e aziende, e la vendita e assistenza per il mondo dei veicoli commerciali.

La nostra forza è la combinazione di tradizione e innovazione: radici solide nel territorio torinese, ma con uno sguardo costante al futuro della mobilità. Crediamo in un rapporto diretto e di fiducia con chi ci sceglie, e per questo lavoriamo ogni giorno per essere un partner affidabile per la mobilità delle persone e delle aziende.

Catalano Group è, dal 1973, una scelta sicura per l’acquisto e la cura di auto e moto a Torino e provincia.

Name: Flex Fleet Mobility PL
Description:
FFM jest ekspertem w zakresie leasingu samochodów, zarządzania flotą i wynajmu samochodów w Europie. Dzięki wieloletniemu doświadczeniu na rynku B2B doskonale zdajemy sobie sprawę, jak bardzo ważne jest, aby nasi klienci wiedzieli o nas wszystko. Zwłaszcza, gdy w grę wchodzą duże inwestycje oraz partnerstwa. Pozwól nam się przedstawić.

Flex Fleet Mobility to odpowiedź na rosnącą potrzebę elastyczności w mobilności. Nasi klienci wymagają jednocześnie jakości obsługi zgodnej z najwyższymi standardami. FFM oferuje zarówno elastyczność i jakość. Nasza firma stała się rewolucyjną platformą, w której podaż i popyt spotykają się każdego dnia. Korzystając z ogromnej europejskiej sieci, jesteśmy w stanie zawsze dostarczyć odpowiedni samochód we właściwym czasie i za odpowiednią cenę.

Nigdy więcej umów długoterminowych
Jako zespół z kilkudziesięcioletnim doświadczeniem w branży, coraz częściej spotykaliśmy się ze stwierdzeniem, że umowy długoterminowe w zmiennych warunkach rynkowych są nieaktualne. Dynamiczny rozwój po stronie naszych klientów wymaga elastycznego podejścia w kwestii zarządzania flotą. Ponieważ sami jesteśmy przedsiębiorcami, postanowiliśmy coś z tym zrobić.

Name: Schmitz Cargobull Magyarország Kft.
Description:
A „Schmitz pótkocsiktól” a kék elefántig és a jelenlegi „Schmitz Cargobull” logóig.

A nemzetközi rendszerek tekintetében a „Schmitz pótkocsik” számára új, kedvelt márkanevet kerestünk.
A német „pótkocsi” szó más nyelven nem érthető és az umlautos „ä” miatt nehéz kiejteni. Ezért ezt az érthető „Cargobull” műszóra cseréltük le. A „Cargo” a rakományt a „bull” a kék elefántot jelenti. 1998. decemberében a Schmitz-pótkocsik hivatalosan, nemzetközi szinten elfogadottan a Schmitz Cargobull márkanevet vette fel. Az elefánt szimbolizálja a teljesítményt, az erőt és az összetartozást. Pontosan ezek az értékek a jellemzik a Schmitz Cargobull termékeit és szolgáltatásait.
A Schmitz Cargobull az a vállalati érték, amit fejleszteni, ápolni és dokumentálni kell, hogy megkülönböztethessük magunkat a piacon és kapcsolatot építsünk ügyfeleink felé.

At GCS Africa, we know that smooth operations and minimal downtime are non-negotiable for golf courses, resorts, estates, and utility fleets across Africa. That’s why we’ve built our business around three commitments: reliability, speed, and trust.

What We Do
As your go-to supplier for high-quality golf cart spare parts, we offer a comprehensive selection, from OEM replacements to performance upgrades, for leading brands like Club Car, EZGO, Yamaha, Eagle, StarEV, Garia, Melex, and more. Whether you're managing a leisure facility, a transportation fleet, or private equipment, our parts ensure your carts operate at peak condition.

Fueling Your Advantage
- Fast, efficient shipping tailored to your needs, no matter your location
- Real-time order tracking, so you're always in the loop from dispatch to delivery
- Expert support via email and WhatsApp. Let us help you identify the exact part you need
- Simple, clear return policy: Unused parts in original packaging can be returned within 30 days. Refunds processed within 5–7 business days (customer covers logistics and customs)

Our Philosophy & Mission
We’re driven by a mission to empower golf cart owners across Africa. We do this by combining an extensive, quality-focused inventory with exceptional service and competitive pricing. 

We believe in building long-term partnerships with our customers and suppliers, one reliable, fast, durable solution at a time.

Reach out to explore how GCS Africa can become your trusted partner in golf cart maintenance and performance.

Em 2024, o Grupo deu um passo significativo em sua expansão, assumindo a concessão da Ford nas regiões de Três Lagoas, Paranaíba e Chapadão do Sul, consolidando ainda mais sua presença no Mato Grosso do Sul. Hoje, o Grupo AOKI administra um total de 9 concessionárias, sempre superando desafios, ampliando suas fronteiras e reforçando sua liderança no mercado automotivo.

A essência do Grupo AOKI está na busca constante pela excelência. Estamos comprometidos em oferecer um atendimento diferenciado, serviços de qualidade superior e produtos que atendem plenamente as demandas da linha de veículos Ford.

Um dos pilares do nosso sucesso é o desenvolvimento contínuo de nossos colaboradores. Acreditamos que, ao se fortalecerem como profissionais e seres humanos, eles contribuem diretamente para o progresso e o crescimento do Grupo. Por isso, investimos em programas de treinamento e capacitação, preparando nossa equipe para atuar em um mercado dinâmico e competitivo, enquanto impulsionam a evolução da empresa.
Location: Três Lagoas, Mato Grosso do Sul

Name: Descomplicarros
Description:
A Descomplicarros é uma renomada empresa do ramo de comércio e serviços automotivos. Seu principal objetivo é proporcionar uma experiência positiva aos clientes, baseada nos valores de confiança, segurança, rapidez, modernidade e versatilidade.

A empresa se destaca pela sua abordagem direta e simplificada, oferecendo soluções eficientes e rápidas para as necessidades automotivas dos clientes.

A confiança é um pilar fundamental da Descomplicarros, pois eles procuram estabelecer relacionamentos duradouros com seus clientes, baseados na transparência e na qualidade dos serviços prestados.

Em termos de segurança, a Descomplicarros se compromete a seguir rigorosos padrões de qualidade, contando com uma equipe altamente qualificada e treinada para lidar com qualquer tipo de serviço automotivo. Além disso, a empresa utiliza equipamentos modernos e de última geração, garantindo assim um trabalho de excelência.

A rapidez também é uma marca registrada da Descomplicarros, pois ela compreende a importância do tempo para os clientes. Por isso, a empresa se esforça para oferecer serviços ágeis e eficientes, visando sempre otimizar o tempo dos seus clientes.

A modernidade é um aspecto que permeia todas as operações da Descomplicarros, desde o atendimento até a execução dos serviços. A empresa utiliza as últimas tecnologias disponíveis no mercado automotivo, visando sempre atender às demandas mais atuais dos clientes.

Além disso, a versatilidade é outro ponto forte da Descomplicarros. A empresa oferece uma ampla gama de serviços automotivos, desde a venda de veículos até manutenção e reparos. Essa abordagem versátil garante que os clientes encontrem todas as soluções que precisam em um só lugar, facilitando assim suas experiências com o setor automotivo.

Wir bieten Ihnen Wöchentlich auf unseren Auto Auktionen über 10.000 Geprüfte Fahrzeuge aller Marken an unter anderem Volkswagen, Audi, BMW, Mercedes, Skoda, Seat, Ford, Peugeot, Renault, Citroen, Hyundai, Toyota, Mazda, Volvo und viele mehr aus Ländern wie Deutschland, Frankreich, Belgien, Niederlande, Dänemark, Schweden, Polen, Spanien, Italien etc.

Auf Wunsch bekommen Sie Ihr Fahrzeug direkt Zugestellt um auch hier Zeit für Sie zu sparen.

Wir sind ein Familienbetrieb und eine der wichtigsten Komponenten für uns ist Ihnen mit jedem Schritt behilflich zu sein, um das Bestmögliche für Sie rauszuholen!

Sie sind auf der Suche nach einem Speziellen Fahrzeug? Wir Importieren Ihr Wunschfahrzeug für Ihren Autohandel gerne auch auf Anfrage!
