Name: Automotive Contactdagen Limburg
Description:
Welkom bij de meest veelbelovende vakbeurs voor de automotive-sector in Limburg. Automotive Contactdagen Limburg brengt professionals uit de industrie samen voor een unieke en dynamische ervaring. Of je nu op zoek bent naar nieuwe zakelijke mogelijkheden, innovatieve technologieën wilt ontdekken of gewoon wilt netwerken met gelijkgestemde professionals, dit evenement mag je niet missen!
Waarom Automotive Contactdagen Limburg?
1. Innovatie in de spotlight: Ontdek de nieuwste trends en innovaties die de automotive-industrie transformeren. Van elektrische voertuigen tot connected car- technologieën, hier kun je de toekomst van mobiliteit ervaren.
2. Zakelijke kansen: Automotive Contactdagen Limburg biedt een uitgelezen kans om nieuwe partnerschappen en samenwerkingen aan te gaan. Ontmoet leveranciers, fabrikanten, distributeurs en andere belangrijke spelers in de sector om jouw zakelijk netwerk uit te breiden.
3. Kennisuitwisseling: Leer van experts en professionals die hun inzichten delen tijdens inspirerende seminars en presentaties. Vergroot je kennis op het gebied van technologie, duurzaamheid, marketing en meer.
4. Netwerkmogelijkheden: Ontmoet en verbind met professionals uit de automotive-branche. Wissel ideeën uit, deel ervaringen en bouw waardevolle relaties op die jouw carrière of bedrijf kunnen versterken.
5. Praktische oplossingen: Automotive Contactdagen Limburg biedt een breed scala aan producten en diensten die specifiek zijn afgestemd op de behoeften van de sector. Ontdek nieuwe tools, apparatuur en oplossingen die jouw bedrijfsactiviteiten kunnen verbeteren.
Mis deze uitgelezen kans niet om jouw kennis te vergroten, nieuwe partnerschappen aan te gaan en de nieuwste ontwikkelingen in de automotive-industrie te ontdekken. Kom naar Automotive Contactdagen Limburg en stap de toekomst van de mobiliteit binnen!

Digitizing Ladipo Market through Tech & Fintech: Scope

Name: Playmini Ltd
Description:
Playmini was founded in 1991 by Nick Paddy whose connection with the Mini came practically from the cradle. His father Graham Paddy worked for Downton Engineering the famous 60’s Mini tuning company, then and was one of the founding members of  Moss Europe another classic car company.

Nick met Mr. Yamagata owner of Sanwa Trading, probably the largest Mini parts & accessory  importers in Japan after seeing a Mini Nick had restored. He then suggested Nick came to Japan to see how  it was all done Japanese style. As Sanwa did not have a reliable UK supplier, they approached Nick to see if he could help them out.

So jumping at the chance Nick sold his car, ICE and all worldly possessions to start up Playmini supplying quality parts to Japan. The relationship has grown over the past nine years, Playmini becoming a major  player in the Japanese import market.

Name: Concessionaria De Lorenzi
Description:
“Quando nostro padre, nel 1958, decise di sposare la sfida di Citroën, marchio che ai tempi in Italia era quasi sconosciuto, fu un vero pioniere. L’appassionante e fortunata avventura nel mondo automobilistico cremonese venne condivisa da nostro padre con il sig. Giorgio Vincenzi. Nacque infatti la De Lorenzi e Vincenzi, poi trasformatasi nel 1989 in De Lorenzi Srl, quando con l’uscita del socio, entrammo in società io, che lavoravo in azienda dal 1983 e mio fratello Massimo, operativo dal 1986.

Nel 1991 viene inaugurata la nuova sede a Cremona, dove ci troviamo attualmente. Dopo anni in cui, con dedizione e impegno, ci siamo consolidati nella nostra città d’origine, nel 1971 abbiamo fatto il grande passo e aperto la filiale di Crema. A questa, è seguita l’apertura dell’officina di Bagnolo Cremasco.

Ma è proprio nella città di Cremona che nel 2019 abbiamo deciso di realizzare un progetto ambizioso e gratificante. Accogliendo infatti, nella nostra storica sede Citroën, Opel nel 2019 e Peugeot nel 2020, abbiamo creato la CASA PSA e siamo diventati un punto di riferimento per il settore automotive nella città e dintorni.

Inoltre, come ha fatto nostro padre negli anni passati diventando il pioniere del brand Citroen sul territorio cremonese, nel 2016 abbiamo intrapreso una nuova sfida per il territorio: sposare e diffondere la filosofia automobilistica della casa giapponese Honda. Da qui è nata una buona sinergia, che ci ha permesso di far conoscere e diffondere il marchio in tutta la provincia Cremonese e dintorni.

Il regalo di nostro padre è proprio questo: averci trasmesso dei valori impermeabili ed indissolubili a qualsiasi trasformazione o cambiamento, che ci permettono di continuare con orgoglio e coraggio una storia nata oltre 60 anni fa.”

Cesare e Massimo De Lorenzi

Name: RSA Deutschland GmbH
Description:
RSA Deutschland ist ein Tochterunternehmen der norwegischen RSA Group und wurde 2023 gegründet. RSA Deutschland hat seinen Sitz in Hamburg und vertreibt Maxus in Niedersachsen, Schleswig-Holstein, Bremen und Hamburg. 

RSA wurde 1936 mit dem Ziel gegründet, Busse zu versichern, zu finanzieren und zu kaufen, deren Ausrüstung zu standardisieren und optimale Bedingungen für die Beschaffung von Material für Busbesitzer zu gewährleisten. Mit dieser automobilen Historie, die bis ins Jahr 1936 zurückreicht, ist RSA ein traditionelles Unternehmen. Mobilität und Transport sind seit der Gründung Ausgangspunkt aller Unternehmensphasen.

1983 wurde RSA Importeur für Suzuki, und seitdem wuchs das Unternehmen zu einem kompletten Autolieferanten für Händler und Endkunden in den nordeuropäischen Regionen. Seit 2007 ist RSA auch Importeur für Pickups von Isuzu, ab 2019 auch für Maxus und ab 2020 auch für BYD. Für alle unsere Importmarken sind wir Marktführer in Europa, sowohl im Autoverkauf als auch im Aftermarket-Verkauf.

En plus de notre large gamme de produits, nous fournissons également des pièces de rechange d'origine et un service après-vente de qualité. Name: Mg Motos Honda
Description:
Em 2015, na região de Nanuque (MG), um empreendedor apaixonado por motocicletas e pela marca Honda teve uma visão. Ele imaginou um lugar onde os amantes de duas rodas pudessem encontrar não apenas máquinas incríveis, mas também uma comunidade vibrante e serviços excepcionais. Com essa visão em mente, ele abriu as portas da concessionária "Mg Motos Honda".

No início, a concessionária era modesta, com um pequeno showroom que exibia os mais recentes modelos de motocicletas Honda. A equipe consistia em poucos funcionários que compartilhavam a mesma paixão por motos e estavam determinados a oferecer um atendimento personalizado e caloroso a cada cliente que entrasse pela porta.

Com um atendimento excepcional e um foco contínuo na satisfação do cliente, a Mg Motos Honda logo começou a ganhar reputação na cidade. A equipe não apenas vendia motocicletas, mas também compartilhava histórias, dicas de pilotagem e organizava eventos comunitários para reunir os entusiastas locais. A concessionária não era apenas um lugar para comprar uma moto, era um ponto de encontro para todos que compartilhavam a mesma paixão.

Conforme os anos passaram, a Mg Motos Honda expandiu suas instalações. O showroom cresceu, e agora também oferecia uma ampla gama de acessórios, peças de reposição e equipamentos de segurança. Além disso, a concessionária estabeleceu uma oficina de serviço dedicada, com técnicos altamente treinados e equipamentos de última geração, garantindo que as motos dos clientes estivessem sempre em perfeitas condições.

A reputação da Concessionaria se espalhou para além das fronteiras do Vale do Aço. Amantes de motocicletas de cidades vizinhas começaram a fazer a viagem até lá para experimentar o atendimento caloroso e personalizado que a concessionária oferecia. O sucesso da Mg Motos não era apenas devido às motocicletas Honda de alta qualidade, mas também à cultura que eles criaram - uma cultura de comunidade, paixão e excelência.

Name: Saqer Ali Juma Auto Spare Parts Trading LLC
Description:
Saqer Ali Juma Auto Spare Parts is a trusted name in the UAE’s automotive industry, proudly serving customers since 1988. With over three decades of experience, we have built a strong reputation for providing high-quality, genuine, and reliable auto spare parts for a wide range of vehicles — from passenger cars to commercial fleets.

What sets us apart is our commitment to integrity, long-term customer relationships, and continuous innovation. We believe in combining traditional business values with modern efficiency — offering fast delivery, professional guidance, and personalized support to meet every automotive need.

With a dedicated team of professionals and a customer-first approach, we continue to expand our presence across the UAE and beyond, strengthening our legacy as one of the most reliable names in the spare parts industry.

At Saqer Ali Juma Auto Spare Parts, our journey since 1988 has been driven by passion, trust, and performance — keeping vehicles moving and customers satisfied, mile after mile.

Description:

Trading in used tractors until acquiring the Massey Ferguson dealership for the Isle of Anglesey and Gwynedd when the Gaerwen depot was opened in February 1996. In 2002 the area was extended to include the whole of the North Wales up to the Cheshire borders and the second depot was opened at Denbigh.

The Company developed over the years with the addition of other major agricultural franchises which today includes Massey Ferguson, JCB, Fendt, McHale, Pottinger and Bailey.

Today and still very much a family business, the depots are run by sons Gwynedd and Berwyn, offering a huge range of new machinery and equipment and one of the largest selection of used tractors, implements and plant in the area. The core business of buying and selling used tractors has remained a significant part of the business.

La nostra  esperienza è incentrata sulla consulenza e sull'offerta di soluzioni personalizzate per la gestione delle flotte aziendali, ma forniamo anche soluzioni individuali per liberi professionisti e privati.

 Cosa offriamo:

Noleggio a lungo termine: la nostra attività principale, con soluzioni su misura per aziende che desiderano ottimizzare la gestione delle flotte aziendali, ridurre i costi operativi e migliorare l’efficienza.

Compravendita di auto usate selezionate: proponiamo veicoli usati affidabili, garantiti e con un ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo.

Acquisto di auto nuove o km 0: grazie alla collaborazione con le principali concessionarie italiane, offro offerte esclusive per veicoli nuovi e a km 0, con l'obiettivo di portare sempre il miglior risultato al cliente.
Servizi assicurativi personalizzati: protezione su misura per veicoli aziendali e privati, per garantire una gestione senza imprevisti.

Con la nostra esperienza nel settore, comprendiamo le reali necessità di chi fa molti km ogni giorno e di chi ha bisogno di soluzioni pratiche, economiche e convenienti.

 Se la tua azienda ha bisogno di un partner affidabile per il noleggio a lungo termine o se sei un privato che cerca il veicolo giusto, posso aiutarti a trovare la soluzione più vantaggiosa e personalizzata.

• Serviços de Oficina Autorizada – Manutenções preventivas, revisões e reparos com equipe técnica especializada e equipamentos homologados pela Honda.
• Vendas de Acessórios e Boutique – Linha de acessórios originais e itens de lifestyle para quem vive o mundo das motos.
• Atendimento Pós-Venda – Suporte contínuo, com foco em satisfação, confiança e relacionamento duradouro com o cliente.

Com uma equipe comprometida, constante investimento em qualidade e estrutura, a Honda Moto Ideal segue sua missão de levar mobilidade, segurança e inovação para todo o Mato Grosso.

Het begon allemaal in 1957 , toen zijn vader een eerste garage opende. Vanaf 1984 was het bedrijf verantwoordelijk als lokale agent voor het gebied Sint Gillis-Elsene en vanaf 1993 als concessiehouder.

De jarenlange ervaring die Eric , samen met zijn broer , heeft opgedaan , heeft ertoe geleid dat dit familiebedrijf uitgroeide met afdeling carrosserie in Vorst, erkend door alle verzekeringsmaatschappijen en met een grote Ford concessie in Waver.

Met het oog op verdere evolutie en nieuwe uitdagingen, neemt Eric Vanspringel, samen met zijn zoon Joé Vanspringel , de garage van de familie Vandenbrande over, met heel veel enthousiasme.

Name: Axle co mechanical
Description:
At Axle Co Mechanical we are committed to giving you the highest quality service every time you visit. 

Originally SA Car & Tyre Clinic we rebranded in April 2018 as Axle Co Mechanical. 
Now a fully equipped modern mechanical workshop, we have incorporated the performance and restoration business with mechanical repairs to offer our customers a one stop shop for convenience. We now also offer performance modifications along with a full range of services for high-end exotic, European vehicles and hybrid electric.
 
We are RAA Approved, and only use top quality oils and parts to ensure reliability, safety and a faultless driving experience between services.
 
Our clients also enjoy free tyre and under bonnet checks between services for peace of mind. 
We offer capped price, warranty approved log book servicing, your choice of parts and same day service! 
 
Our safety reports and quality control policies are strict on every vehicle that comes in for service. This way nothing is missed and the reliability between services is maximised ensuring safe and happy driving every time!
 
Our fully equipped workshop not only caters for car maintenance and tyres but we also design, fit and build performance engines for streetcars, off-road vehicles or restorations. 
 
This includes performance suspension, engine - driveline performance and tyre upgrades for all makes and models. Performance services come with many Penrite oil choices depending on your application and build! 
 
Performance Ecu, custom wiring looms and dyno services also available for our clients.

The company is an importer and an official Canadian distributor for leading brands like Super Soco, Horwin, Kollter, Caofen, Tromox and more.

Due to the improved speed, maximized torque and increased energy density of the Lithium battery, the demand for electric motorcycles increased exponentially. All this encouraged almost all ICE motorcycle manufacturers to start production of electric ones. With all the experience with the two-wheel electric cycles, it was a natural transition for Greenwit to dedicate its business to high quality and a diverse range of the best of breed options for electric motorcycles. Today, Greenwit has quickly become the leader, gaining exclusivity with leading European and Asian manufacturers to bring these high-quality brands to the North American market.

The exponential growth of climate deterioration and growing concern for alternatives is now fueling the demand for electric options across all demographics – from the traditional gas rider, the car and/or bus commuter to the recreational rider. This encouraged the governments to adopt incentive programs to foster faster consumer adoption of clean alternatives to reduce urban congestion and reduce carbon footprint. The Canadian government is now offering rebates for the purchase of electric motorcycles and has adopted a policy to terminate the sales of ICE motorcycles by 2030. All these factors are driving a greater demand for consumers to switch to LEV for their daily commute

Name: Universe Parts
Description:
Universe Parts 2018 yılında İstanbul Eyüpsultan’da Türkiye otomotiv yedek parça tedarik sektöründe faaliyet göstermek üzere kuruldu.

2018 yılından itibaren sigorta, filo ve otomotiv şirketlerinin motor, aydınlatma ve kaporta gruplarında yedek parça tedariği konusunda çözüm ortağı olduk. Binek otomotiv ve ticari araç segmentine yönelik binlerce çeşit yedek parçayı ihtiyacı olan tedarikçilerle buluşturmaktayız.

Şirketimiz bünyesinde işinde uzman ve dinamik kadromuz ile uluslararası yedek parça üreticileri ve distribütörleri ve toptancıları ile iş ortaklığı yapmaktayız.

Sigorta şirketlerinin tamamına yakını, sigorta asistan firmaları, oto yedek parça üretici ve toptancılar, perakende firmalarına, parça ihtiyacı olan filo firmalarına yeni çözümler sunmayı ilke edindik.

Bünyemizde Aynadan, panjura, braketen, çamurluğa, kapıdan, fara, amblemden, bakalite, panelden , davlumbaza olmak üzere motor, kaporta ve aydınlatma grubunda geniş ürün yelpazesi ile müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına cevap vermek amacıyla İstanbulda bulunan lojistik merkezimizle hizmet vermekteyiz.

Universe Parts kaliteyi iş prensibi olarak edinmiş, dengeli fiyat politikası ile yedek parça tedariğinde kısa zamanda tercih edilen olmuştur.

Wyspecjalizowaliśmy się w szybkiej obsłudze klienta w zakresie doboru oraz sprzedaży części zamiennych do aut różnych marek, zarówno aut osobowych, dostawczych jak i ciężarowych. Naszą przewagą konkurencyjną jest szybkość realizacji zamówień, gwarancja jakości produktów oraz wyjątkowo szeroka oferta.

Działamy bardzo elastycznie, dostosowujemy się do wymagań naszych klientów. Wystarczy do nas zadzwonić lub napisać, a my na podstawie danych auta (numerze vin lub marki i modelu) dobierzemy właściwe części a następnie dostarczymy we wskazane miejsce na terenie Polski oraz Europy. 

Zapraszamy do stałej współpracy firmy posiadające własną flotę, warsztaty,  oraz mechaników garażowych. Proponujemy atrakcyjne modele współpracy.

Name: Yamaha Motor Europe N.V. Niederlassung Österreich
Description:
As the “Kando* creating company” our mission has been and will always be to offer new excitement and a more fulfilling life with innovative products and services all around the world, that not only touch people’s lives but also their hearts.

Empowered by a passion for innovation, Yamaha always strives to create exceptional value and experiences that enrich the lives of our customers. We want to move people not only physically but also into a more positive state of mind.

To express this in a few words: Yamaha #RevsYourHeart.

Yamaha Motor Europe N.V. (YME) was founded in 1968 and is the regional headquarters of the Yamaha Motor Company in Europe.

YME is responsible for the sales, marketing, and distribution of Yamaha Motor products, research & development, and manufacturing of parts, engines and European developed Yamaha Motor products (motorcycles, scooters and boats). 
Our range of products and services consist of motorcycles, scooters, outboard engines, WaveRunners, boats, YAM inflatables, water pumps, ATVs, Side-by-Side vehicles, snowmobiles, snow throwers, generators, golf carts, intelligent machinery, Yamaha branded apparel and accessories, Yamaha parts and YOU Services (e.g. financial services, extended warranty, maintenance).

YME is located at Schiphol-Rijk, the Netherlands. Also located at our Schiphol-Rijk HQ are:
•	Our Netherlands branch, responsible for the sales, marketing and distribution for the Dutch market. 
•	Our accessories and spare parts logistics centre, serving our network throughout Europe.


*Kando is a Japanese word for the simultaneous feelings of deep satisfaction and intense excitement that we experience when we encounter something of exceptional value.

Name: tiimii GmbH
Description:
Tiimii steht für ein Team von Profis, die mit 25 Jahren Branchenerfahrung individuelle und nachhaltige Mobilitätslösungen für unsere Kunden anbieten. Wichtig ist für uns eine persönliche Betreuung unserer Kunden mit einer leidenschaftlichen Professionalität. Die Zeiten und Begrifflichkeiten ändern sich stetig, doch der Wunsch nach flexiblen Mobilitätslösungen zu einem fest kalkulierten Preis stand schon immer im Fokus unserer Flottenkunden.

Mittlerweile sind die Möglichkeiten für neue Mobilitätslösungen immer spannender geworden. So können heute Modelle angeboten werden, die noch vor zwei Jahren undenkbar waren. Dies kann nur dann voll ausgeschöpft werden, wenn die Entscheidung frei von wirtschaftlichen Zwängen ist.  So hat zwar jede Branche für sich vieles im Portfolio. Oft können Leasinggesellschaften, Autovermieter, Aboanbieter und selbst Fuhrparkmanagementgesellschaften jedoch nicht frei alle am Markt bestehenden Möglichkeiten nutzen.

tiimii stellt sich dieser Herausforderung und kann das Bestmögliche für den Kunden anbieten. In den letzten zwei Jahren war das Bereitstellen von Fahrzeugen aufgrund von Lieferengpässen oft eine schwierige Situation. tiimii konnte in dieser Zeit alle Kunden und Neukunden mit den gewünschten Fahrzeugen versorgen. Mit unseren Branchenkenntnissen und unserem Netzwerk haben wir in dieser Zeit alle Herausforderungen für unsere Kunden gemeistert und darüber freuen wir uns sehr!

Name: Green Friction - Sustainable Friction Material Recycling
Description: Green Friction - Sustainable Friction Material Recycling - for over 25 years Green Friction is a registered trademark of RMS Raw Material Service. Engineering, Factory, Green Friction, Leverkusen, Recycling, Automotive, Aftermarket, OEM It is obvious that sustainable friction material recycling is becoming more and more important. Apart from the established decision factors product, price and quality, SUSTAINABILITY is now the fourth dimension, and CO2 equivalent (CO2eq) a powerful currency. Sustainable friction material recycling makes sense because: • it is a valuable raw material • it saves energy, CO2 and greenhouse gases • it fulfills OE and Aftermarket specifications • it decreases dependency on raw material supplies and the global supply chain • it saves procurement spending and disposal costs • it is what all stakeholders are asking for • Green marketing is THE competitive advantage of the future.

A partir de 2021, iniciamos o nosso sonho de oferecer essa mesma experiência e qualidade para todo o Brasil.

Nossa missão é servir bem nosso cliente, atender sua expectativa em relação ao que for relativo à qualidade dos produtos, variedade, disponibilidade, valor agregado e agilidade no atendimento.

Name: Tesolve - Customize your Tesla
Description:
Ab sofort haben Sie die Möglichkeit, Ihr Fahrzeug nach Ihren individuellen Wünschen zusammenzustellen und wir kümmern uns um den Rest. Unser Ziel ist es, Ihnen ein einzigartiges Individualisierung-Erlebnis zu bieten, das sich nahtlos in den Tesla-Lifestyle einfügt.

Mit unserem Tuningkonfigurator haben Sie die volle Kontrolle über die Individualisierung Ihres Fahrzeugs. Egal, ob es um die Auswahl von hochwertigen Folien für einen Farbwechsel, das Hinzufügen von stilvollen Karosseriekomponenten oder die Verbesserung der Leistung geht - Sie sehen genau, welche Optionen zur Verfügung stehen und wie viel sie kosten. Keine Überraschungen mehr!

Darüber hinaus arbeiten wir mit über 100 zuverlässigen Partnern in der gesamten Schweiz zusammen. Wir koordinieren für Sie die Bestellung der benötigten Materialien und vereinbaren Termine mit qualifizierten Garagen in Ihrer Nähe. Auf diese Weise können Sie sicher sein, dass Ihre individuellen Tuningwünsche von Fachleuten umgesetzt werden, die mit den Besonderheiten von Tesla-Fahrzeugen bestens vertraut sind.

Wir sind stolz darauf, Ihnen eine umfangreiche Auswahl an Möglichkeiten bieten zu können, um Ihr Tesla-Fahrzeug einzigartig zu gestalten. 

Besuchen Sie unsere Webseite (www.tesolve.com), um den Tuningkonfigurator zu entdecken und Ihre Tesla-Individualisierung zu beginnen. Sollten Sie Fragen haben oder Unterstützung benötigen, steht Ihnen unser Kundenservice-Team jederzeit zur Verfügung.

Seien Sie Teil dieser aufregenden Innovation in der Tuning-Welt und gestalten Sie Ihr Tesla-Fahrzeug nach Ihren Wünschen. Wir freuen uns darauf, Ihnen den Weg zu Ihrem individuellen Fahrzeug zu ebnen.

Name: Xtreet
Description:
Xtreet specializes in providing efficient and compliant solutions for vehicle registration and parking management across California. As an authorized provider of California DMV services, the platform facilitates operations such as registration renewals, title transfers, and replacement of registration stickers through a seamless, online system.
Additionally, Xtreet offers innovative parking assistance services tailored to the needs of vehicle owners in urban environments. Using real-time data and an interactive platform, it simplifies parking by providing access to regulations, availability, and optimized parking solutions across various California cities.
The service is designed to reduce the administrative burden associated with vehicle registration and parking management by offering secure, DMV-approved transactions that align with California state regulations. Processes are optimized to ensure accuracy and reliability, minimizing the time and resources required for completion.
While Xtreet is not a branch of the California DMV, we still maintain full compliance with its guidelines. This ensures a trusted and efficient collaboration with organizations and entities involved in vehicle management, logistics, and transportation services.
By integrating modern technology with a focus on regulatory compliance, Xtreet enhances the accessibility and transparency of essential vehicle registration and parking services in California.

Name: Dit Bilsalg
Description:
Dit Bilsalg – En hurtig, nem og tryg bilhandel.
Hos Dit Bilsalg har vi et enkelt formål – at tilbyde en hurtig, nem og tryg bilhandel. Vi forstår, at det kan være en udfordrende proces at sælge en brugt bil, og vi har derfor dedikeret os til at gøre det så nemt og problemfrit som muligt. Vi har specialiseret os i at købe biler fra private, og har gennem vores mere end 40 års erfaring handlet omkring 1.000 biler om året.

Konkurrencedygtige priser og bred kundeportefølje.
Vores unikke netværk af partnere og brede kundeportefølje giver os mulighed for at købe alle typer og mærker af biler. Det betyder, at vi ofte kan tilbyde dig en fair og konkurrencedygtig pris.

Skader, fejl og mangler er ikke nødvendigvis en hindring.
Selvom din bil har skader, fejl eller mangler, vil vi stadig gerne byde på den. Det er vigtigt for os at have en åben og ærlig dialog om bilens stand, da det hjælper os med at give dig en retfærdig pris. Vi stræber altid efter at finde en løsning, der passer til situationen.

Vi går gerne lidt længere for vores kunder.
Hos Dit Bilsalg handler det ikke bare om at lukke en handel. Vi ønsker at give vores kunder den bedste oplevelse, og det betyder, at vi også hjælper, hvis du vil sælge en bil med restgæld. Vi håndterer restgælden direkte med din kreditor, og det overskydende beløb efter betaling af gælden overføres direkte til din konto. Med os er processen både nem og gennemsigtig.

Description:

Supporting local is a priority for us; all of our suppliers are local, and we try to source as many locally made products as possible. We promise to continue to introduce products our customers want and need, while keeping an eye on future industry trends. Name: OVM  Organizzazione Viterbo Motori
Description:
LEADER DEL SETTORE
DA OLTRE 20 ANNI

OVM VITERBO
CONCESSIONARIA UFFICIALE
Organizzazione Viterbo Motori, concessionaria ufficiale Peugeot, nasce alla fine degli anni '90 grazie alla decisione della Famiglia Santini di allargare i marchi commercializzati dal proprio gruppo inserendo a capo della nuova struttura il Sig. Pierluigi Santini che ne è responsabile sin dall'inizio.

Il binomio con il marchio Peugeot si rivela subito vincente ed in pochi anni la O.V.M. è diventata un punto di riferimento per il marchio sia a livello locale che regionale. 
Dal 2023 è nato un nuovo capitolo della nostra storia aziendale che inizia nel 1985 e continua con l'acquisizione di due amatissimi Brand del gruppo: Citroën e Opel
La politica aziendale si fonda principalmente sulla soddisfazione del cliente che viene coccolato ed ascoltato sin dal primo incontro, sulla professionalità delle figure con lui in contatto e sulla costante attenzione a tutti gli aspetti legati al mondo dell'automotive.

Sin dall'inizio O.V.M. sceglie di rivolgersi ai privati come alle aziende ed ai liberi professionisti, con particolare attenzione alla vendita dei veicoli commerciali Peugeot alla quale si affianca la vendita di veicoli usati. Il fornito magazzino ricambi (facente parte del consorzio Sincro), l'officina e carrozzeria autorizzate, gommista, elettrauto e revisione vetture completano la gamma dei servizi rivolti al cliente che trova in O.V.M. un solo referente con i vantaggi che ne conseguono.

Punto di forza dell'Azienda è un team affiatato composto da figure professionali altamente preparate ed in costante aggiornamento facenti capo ai diversi responsabili di settore che garantiscono ad O.V.M. solidità ed efficienza.

Name: Layyah Honda Palace
Description:
Layyah Honda Palace is a trusted and renowned 3S dealership (Sales, Service, Spare Parts) for Atlas Honda motorcycles, dedicated to serving the people of Layyah with excellence and integrity.
Our journey began in 1983 when Rana Mehmood Ahmad established the dealership under the name Layyah Auto Service. Initially, it was an Atlas Honda antenna dealership focused on handling warranty claims. Over the years, our commitment to quality service and customer satisfaction earned us a strong reputation within the community.

In April 2019, recognizing the growing needs of our customers, we upgraded our operations and rebranded as Layyah Honda Palace. This transformation into a full-fledged 3S dealership enabled us to expand our services to include not only warranty claims but also the sale of new motorcycles, comprehensive maintenance services, and a complete range of genuine Honda spare parts.

At Layyah Honda Palace, we are committed to providing top-notch services to ensure that every Honda motorcycle owner in Layyah can enjoy a reliable, smooth, and worry-free riding experience. Our team of experienced professionals is dedicated to maintaining the highest standards of service, reflecting the quality and reliability that Atlas Honda is known for.

Whether you’re looking to purchase a new Honda motorcycle, require expert maintenance, or need genuine spare parts, Layyah Honda Palace is your one-stop destination. We are proud to continue serving our community with the same dedication and care that has been our hallmark since 1983.

Name: Consorcio Nissi
Description:
Somos una compañía de servicios especializada en la industria automotriz, enfocada en brindar soluciones rápidas, confiables y eficientes para la distribución de piezas y autopartes a nivel nacional.
 
Atendemos a las principales compañías de seguros vehiculares del país, entre ellas Rimac, Pacífico, Mapfre, La Positiva y Qualitas Seguros, consolidándonos como un socio estratégico clave dentro de la cadena de atención post-siniestro. Asimismo, contamos con una alianza estratégica con Gildemeister, actuando como canal oficial de venta de Hyundai Motor Company en Perú, lo que refuerza nuestra posición como proveedor confiable de marcas líderes a nivel global.
 
Con más de 16 años de experiencia, hemos construido relaciones sólidas con proveedores internacionales en Corea del Sur, Japón, Malasia, China, Tailandia y Taiwán, asegurando un suministro constante de productos automotrices de alta calidad y cumpliendo con los estándares exigidos por el mercado asegurador y automotriz.
 
Nuestra operación se apoya en una red de más de 150 talleres automotrices especializados, a los que atendemos con agilidad, eficiencia operativa y excelencia en el delivery, contribuyendo a reducir tiempos de reparación y optimizar la experiencia del cliente final.

Name: Verhoeks Exclusief
Description:
Verhoeks Exclusief – Specialist in elektrisch, hybride & exclusieve auto's.

Sinds 2013 is Verhoeks Exclusief hét adres voor wie meer verwacht van zijn auto. Als pionier in jong gebruikte elektrische auto’s hebben we onze passie uitgebreid naar elektrisch, hybride en exclusieve voertuigen. Zo vind je bij ons altijd een selectie van topkwaliteit, betrouwbaarheid en verfijnd rijcomfort.

Stel je voor: jij achter het stuur van een auto die niet alleen indrukwekkend presteert, maar ook voorzien is van de nieuwste technologieën, maximale veiligheid én een design dat gezien mag worden. Elke auto in ons aanbod wordt met zorg geselecteerd, uitgebreid gecontroleerd en gepresenteerd alsof hij nieuw is.

Bij Verhoeks Exclusief draait alles om jouw rijbeleving. Ons ervaren team begeleidt je persoonlijk – van advies en proefrit tot financiering, verzekering en aflevering. Wij zorgen dat elk detail klopt, zodat jij met een goed gevoel en vol vertrouwen de weg op gaat.

Verhoeks Exclusief – omdat rijden meer is dan van A naar B gaan.

Uw droomauto, zonder zorgen.

Bij Verhoeks Exclusief maken we het kopen van een auto eenvoudig én zorgeloos. Vertel ons uw wensen – van merk en model tot kleur en opties – en wij vinden precies de auto die bij u past. Dankzij ons uitgebreide netwerk en jarenlange ervaring selecteren wij alleen betrouwbare, schadevrije auto’s met een eerlijke kilometerstand. Elke auto wordt grondig gecontroleerd op technische staat, onderhoudshistorie en verborgen gebreken.

Zo hoeft u alleen nog maar te doen waar het écht om draait: rijden.

Bezoek ons in Lunteren of neem vrijblijvend contact op – uw nieuwe auto staat dichterbij dan u denkt.

Name: APPRAISE ME INC
Description:
Appraise Me Inc. – Smarter Vehicle Appraisals for Dealers
At Appraise Me Inc., we provide real-time, accurate, and transparent vehicle appraisals to help dealerships maximize trade-in values, streamline inventory management, and close more deals—without auction hassles. With over a decade of experience in the online auction industry, we’ve built a trusted dealer network that ensures top-dollar offers for your trade-ins while eliminating unnecessary fees and delays.

We understand the challenges dealerships face—rising auction fees, arbitration risks, unpredictable valuations, and the time-consuming process of sourcing inventory. That’s why we’ve created a dealer-focused solution that provides instant appraisals, a direct buyer network, and a simplified sales process.

Why Dealerships Choose Appraise Me:
 Live Trade-In Appraisals – Get real-time, competitive offers backed by market data.
 No Seller Fees – Every dollar from your trade-ins stays with you.
 Flat-Rate Buyer Fee – No middleman cuts, just transparent pricing.
 Instant Dealer-to-Dealer Transactions – Bypass auction delays and sell inventory faster.
 On-Site Condition Reports – Accurate, risk-free appraisals ensure transparency.

Unlike wholesalers or auction platforms, Appraise Me Inc. works exclusively for dealers. Our model is designed to increase your profitability by connecting you directly with verified buyers who appreciate access to quality inventory. Our capture specialists handle on-site condition reporting, eliminating arbitration disputes and ensuring you get the most competitive offers from serious buyers.

If you're looking for a faster, more profitable way to manage trade-ins and inventory, we’re here to help. Let’s connect and maximize your dealership’s potential—without the headaches.

 Visit us at appraisemeinc.ca

Name: Shams Al Iman General Trading LLC
Description:
About Us
Shams Al Iman Trading LLC is a leading tyre trading company based in Baghdad, Iraq. Established in 2004, we specialize in the design, manufacture, and distribution of high-quality tyres, wheels, tubes, oil, and batteries for a wide range of vehicles. Our products are certified by international standards including DOT for the USA market, GCC for GSO markets, E-Mark for European markets, CCC Chinese standard, BIS Indian standard, ETL Intertek, and BV Bureau Veritus.

We take pride in our commitment to innovation, research, and development. Our team of experts is dedicated to providing high-quality products and services at competitive prices. We have a wide range of products to choose from, including TBR, PCR, OTR, LTR, Motorcycle tyres, Wheels, Tubes, Oil, and Batteries. Our company has done tremendously well in the last decades to build the business globally.

Our Vision
Our vision is to become the leading tyre trading company in the region. We aim to achieve this by providing high-quality products and services that exceed our customers’ expectations. We strive to be the go-to company for all your tyre and automotive needs.

Our Mission
Our mission is to provide high-quality products and services at competitive prices. We believe in continuous improvement and innovation. Our team is dedicated to ensuring that our customers receive the best products and services possible. We aim to build long-lasting relationships with our customers by providing exceptional service and support.

Name: AutoZitrA S.r.l.
Description:
Autozitra nasce a Milano nel 1968. I due fratelli fondatori, Schiavi Augusto e Gaetano, indovinarono pienamente il fortunato destino della casa ceca Skoda, “ Zitra ” difatti significa “ futuro ”. 

Da sempre Autozitra è il punto di riferimento per la vendita e per l’assistenza del marchio Skoda a Milano e provincia. Le nostre sedi site nel comune di Milano sono facilmente e rapidamente raggiungibili anche da Pavia e Novara.
Forniamo consulenza personalizzata nella scelta della vettura adatta alle proprie esigenze, trovando la formula più conveniente: acquisto diretto, leasing finanziario o noleggio a lungo termine. Per far questo disponiamo di strumenti gestionali, operativi e finanziari in grado di proporre servizi finanziari ed assicurativi, consulenza fiscale ed un parco autoveicoli dimostrativi e sostitutivi di svariati veicoli. 

Siamo specializzati nella vendita delle auto ibride ed elettriche e mettiamo a disposizione dei nostri clienti un parco autovetture da dimostrazione che possono essere utilizzate per test drive personalizzati. 

Da Autozitra, trasformiamo l’esperienza di acquisto di un’auto in un’esperienza altamente appagante, perché come family company, mettiamo sempre al centro le persone che tutti i giorni entrano nei nostri showroom con delle esigenze da soddisfare al meglio. 

Fiore all’occhiello di AutoZitra è il Service: l’assistenza Skoda. Godiamo di un ottimo indice di soddisfazione della Clientela, il nostro Staff è altamente qualificato e motivato, in costante aggiornamento. Siamo strutturati per ottemperare a qualunque tipo di occorrenza, dalla Carrozzeria / Cristalli ai Pneumatici
& Assetto, dalla Revisione Ministeriale al Soccorso Stradale, occupandoci cosi del Cliente a 360°

AutoZitrA, professionalità e cortesia al servizio del Cliente Skoda – Gruppo Volkswagen

Description:

Name: Protect Your ADAS
Description:
About Us — Protect Your ADAS

Protect Your ADAS is a sole-proprietor automotive safety company focused on solving a growing problem the industry has overlooked for far too long: forward-facing ADAS camera drift caused by solar heat, UV exposure, vibration, and everyday environmental stress.

Modern vehicles depend on their windshield-mounted cameras for lane-keeping, collision avoidance, pedestrian detection, and emergency braking. But these critical sensors are mounted in the hottest, harshest location on the vehicle — and they degrade faster than drivers, insurers, and manufacturers realize.

Independent testing, including Burke Porter’s TRC study, has shown that even low-mileage, undamaged vehicles can experience enough camera drift to cause late warnings, inconsistent braking, and failed AEB test performance. If ADAS doesn’t see correctly, it doesn’t protect correctly.

Our Product:

Protect Your ADAS offers a patent-pending forward-facing camera environmental shield designed to reduce heat load, UV impact, and micro-movement on the camera housing. This simple, lightweight accessory helps preserve camera stability and supports long-term ADAS performance — especially in harsh climates or high-solar load regions.

Our Purpose:

We exist to protect the safety technology that protects you. As ADAS becomes standard across the U.S. vehicle fleet, maintaining sensor stability is no longer optional — it’s a safety requirement.

Who We Serve:

Automotive accessory manufacturers
Aftermarket distributors
Auto glass and collision providers
Insurers and fleet operators
Drivers who rely on their ADAS every day

Protect Your ADAS is actively exploring licensing, partnerships, and manufacturing alliances to bring this first-to-market safety solution to scale.

Shield the camera. Protect the system.

Nos expertises

• Valves & capteurs TPMS, réparation de crevaison
• Parallélisme / géométrie (selon véhicules)
• Pneus auto, SUV/4×4, utilitaires, été/hiver
• Diagnostic d’usure, pressions, rotation et conseils d’économie au km

Au-delà de l’intervention, nous mettons l’accent sur la pédagogie : comprendre l’usure, vérifier ses pressions, choisir le bon indice de charge et de vitesse, planifier la permutation saisonnière. Cette transparence évite la survente, sécurise vos trajets et optimise votre budget dans le temps.

Pour les entreprises et flottes locales, nous proposons une organisation dédiée avec des créneaux réservés, des devis lisibles, une facturation simplifiée et un suivi d’usure consolidé. L’objectif est double : réduire le coût au kilomètre et limiter les immobilisations, tout en gardant un niveau de sécurité constant pour vos équipes.

Chaque prestation suit un déroulé maîtrisé : diagnostic express, sélection du pneu adapté (marque, indice, saison), montage et équilibrage, puis contrôle final avec conseils personnalisés. Nos délais sont tenus, et nous restons disponibles après l’intervention pour toute question ou ajustement.

Notre activité repose sur quatre pôles complémentaires :

1. Boutique de pièces détachées
Nous proposons des pièces rigoureusement sélectionnées, adaptées aux besoins du marché local, avec des standards de qualité élevés. Notre objectif : garantir à nos clients des solutions fiables, maîtrisées et durables.

Nous importons et distribuons des moteurs neufs, certifiés et garantis. Chaque moteur est contrôlé avant expédition et bénéficie d’une garantie pouvant aller jusqu’à 2 mois. Nous aidons nos clients à éviter les risques liés aux moteurs d’occasion non traçables.

Nous inspectons, restaurons et contrôlons chaque véhicule avant vente afin d’assurer sécurité, performance et tranquillité d’esprit. La transparence est au cœur de notre démarche : aucun véhicule n’est vendu sans diagnostic préalable.

4. Atelier de réparation et installation moteur
Nous offrons des services d’entretien, de diagnostic électronique et de remplacement moteur avec des outils modernes et des mécaniciens qualifiés. Notre approche est pédagogique : nous prenons le temps d’expliquer, d’accompagner et de conseiller.

Construire la référence automobile en Afrique de l’Ouest, fondée sur la qualité, l’expertise, la transparence et l’éducation des automobilistes.

Name: Ethnosphere India Private Limited
Description:
The myriad cultures of the world make up an intellectual, spiritual, and social web of life that envelopes the planet and is as important to its well-being as is the biological web-of-life that we know as the Biosphere. One can think of this cultural web-of-life as being an Ethnosphere. Thus we can define the Ethnosphere as being the sum total of all the thoughts, dreams, ideals, myths, intuitions, and inspirations brought into being by the imagination since the dawn of consciousness. Name: TSIpro Bedrijfswageninrichting
Description:
TSIpro Bedrijfswageninrichting

One Stop Shop

Bij TSIpro geloven we in totaaloplossingen. Dat betekent dat we niet zomaar een product of dienst aanbieden, maar samen met de klant kijken naar het volledige plaatje. Tijdens een persoonlijk gesprek nemen we de tijd om te luisteren naar uw wensen en noden. Op basis daarvan werken we een inrichting uit die perfect aansluit bij uw situatie.

We willen onze klanten een echte one stop shop ervaring bieden. Van planning tot uitvoering nemen we alle zorgen uit handen, zodat u zich nergens druk om hoeft te maken. TSIpro zorgt ervoor dat alle werkzaamheden naadloos op elkaar aansluiten en dat elk detail klopt.

Ons doel is duidelijk: wanneer wij klaar zijn, is uw wagen volledig gebruiksklaar. U stapt in een perfect afgewerkte en ingerichte wagen die meteen inzetbaar is. Zo combineren we gemak, kwaliteit en betrouwbaarheid in één totaaloplossing.

Onze troeven:

Maatwerk: elke inrichting wordt aangepast aan de noden van de klant.
Flexibiliteit: ook voor kleinere werken, zoals een dakdrager, verlichting of vloer, kan men bij ons terecht.
Hoogwaardige kwaliteit: wij werken uitsluitend met topmaterialen, zodat klanten jarenlang zonder zorgen kunnen genieten van hun wagen.
Eigen werkplaats & service: alle werkzaamheden worden in onze eigen werkplaats uitgevoerd, wat de kwaliteit garandeert. Voor klanten die dit wensen, voorzien wij een vervangwagen, zodat zij hun werk ongestoord kunnen verderzetten.

Von einer beschaulichen Waschanlage zu einem der modernsten Škoda-Partner des Landes - die über 25-jährige Erfolgsgeschichte des Autohaus RÜDIGER kann sich sehen lassen. Der direkte Kundenkontakt wurde im stetig wachsenden Familienunternehmen seit jeher großgeschrieben. Unter der Leitung von Simone Rüdiger-Kühne, die das Unternehmen mit Charme und weiblichen Auge für ansprechendes Design führt, erfolgte 2015 eine umfassende Modernisierung und Erweiterung des Autohauses. Der Showroom wurde auf einer Größe von 900 qm ausgebaut und ein 1500 qm großer Werkstattbereich, inklusive einer Teile- und Zubehör-Abteilung, geschaffen.

Simone Rüdiger-Kühne: „Als Tochter in die Rolle des Autohaus-Chefs zu schlüpfen hat viele Möglichkeiten geboten, denn Frauen haben einen anderen Blick für Dinge des Alltags, schenken dem Detail große Aufmerksamkeit.“

Heute umfasst das Team des Autohaus RÜDIGER über 50 zukunftsorientierte, zuverlässige Mitarbeiter - darunter auch mehrere Auszubildende.

Om emissievrije mobiliteit écht toegankelijk te maken, introduceert MAHIN Mobility een unieke batterijwisselservice in Amsterdam. Via mobiele wisselservice op lokatie én vaste batterijwisselstations in elk stadsdeel, bieden wij een flexibel alternatief voor opladen – ideaal voor stedelijke gebruikers en GO-YOYO autodeel platform.
MAHIN Mobility bouwt aan een toekomstbestendig mobiliteitsnetwerk dat stedelijke mobiliteit slimmer, schoner en sneller maakt. Met een focus op innovatie, service en duurzaamheid zijn wij dé schakel tussen technologische vernieuwing en praktische mobiliteitsoplossingen in de stad.

Name: Parts.Auto Expert — AI based Yard Management APP
Description: How it works? In a few clicks, a car purchased for sale will turn into a set of spare parts, correctly named and structured. All that remains is to add photos and post the spare parts for sale on the required sites. Further management of the stock of spare parts can be carried out directly from the smartphone. Sold - deleted, the spare part itself will disappear from the sites, and the application will add the sale to the statistics. Sales and profitability statistics for each car will help in planning your next car purchases.

Name: Muito Mais Moto - M3 MOTO
Description:
A Muito Mais Moto (m3moto) é uma empresa que atua no desenvolvimento e comércio de componentes para transmissão primária* e secundária para motocicletas, utilizando as modernas correias sincronizadoras existente no mercado mundial.

A empresa iniciou suas atividades no início do ano de 2002, com uma equipe de especialistas no setor automotivo, em usinagem e em engenharia de produtos. Esses profissionais possuem ainda, mais de 25 anos de experiência em conduzir vários tipos e modelos de motocicletas.

Inovar, esse é o nosso foco. Por que não se beneficiar de produtos de alta tecnologia que facilitem a vida do motociclista?

Em nossos projetos utilizamos a moderna correia cujos elementos principais, são os cordonéis de fibra de carbono, mais resistente que o aço por unidade de peso. Devido a isso são quase impossíveis de cortá-las, e desde os anos 80 são utilizadas em motos com mais de 1800 cilindradas, com alto torque e potência.

Nossos kits de transmissão são projetados para serem instalados sem adaptações ou modificações estruturais em mais de 95% dos casos. São dimensionados para que sua motocicleta mantenha as mesmas características e desempenho originais de fábrica.

Name: Europa Bee Electricas
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of Bee! We are a leading brand in the electric scooter industry, dedicated to providing innovative and eco-friendly mobility solutions. With a strong presence in the market, Bee has been revolutionizing urban transportation and enhancing the way people move in cities as São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro and Lisbon.

Our Journey 

With more than 26 years of experience in scooters solutions for cities, Bee has established itself as a trusted name in the electric scooter market since 2019. Our commitment to excellence and sustainability has driven us to create cutting-edge products that combine style, performance, and environmental consciousness.

 Innovation and Design 

At Bee, we believe that electric scooters should not only be efficient and reliable but also visually appealing. Our team of talented work tirelessly to craft scooters that seamlessly blend functionality with aesthetics. Each Bee scooter is a testament to our dedication to providing an exceptional riding experience while reducing carbon emissions.

Empowering Urban Mobility 

By choosing Bee, you're joining a community of forward-thinking individuals who embrace the power of sustainable transportation. Our scooters are equipped with high-quality components, including powerful Bosch motors, ensuring a thrilling and efficient ride. With a range of models and features to suit every need, Bee scooters are the perfect choice for urban explorers, commuters, and eco-conscious riders.

 Making a Positive Impact 

At Bee, we are proud to contribute to the global shift towards clean mobility. Our scooters help reduce traffic congestion, improve air quality, and promote a healthier and more sustainable way of moving around cities. Join us in making a positive impact on our planet, one electric ride at a time.

Awards and Recognition 

Bee's commitment to innovation and quality has been recognized within the industry since 2019 in Brazil Market.

Description:
Türkiye’de otomotiv ekosistemi her geçen gün büyürken, yedek parça tedarik zincirinde güvenilir, hızlı ve sürdürülebilir çözümlere duyulan ihtiyaç da artmaktadır. Ekonomik dalgalanmalara rağmen, sektörün dinamik yapısı doğru strateji, disiplinli operasyon ve müşteri odaklı yaklaşım ile önemli fırsatlar sunmaktadır.

Bu doğrultuda, yedek parça tedariği alanında faaliyet göstermek üzere yeni bir ticari girişimin temellerini atmış bulunmaktayız. Amacımız; doğru ürünü, doğru zamanda, doğru fiyatla sağlayan; kaliteyi ve güveni merkeze alan bir iş modeli ortaya koymaktır. Operasyonel tecrübemiz , uzun yıllara dayanan sektörel gözlemlerimiz ve tedarik zinciri süreçlerine hâkimiyetimiz  ile bu alanda değer yaratan, sürdürülebilir, şeffaf ve müşteri memnuniyetini önceliklendiren bir yapı kurmayı hedefliyoruz.

Günümüz ekonomik koşullarında “güven” en kritik rekabet üstünlüğüdür. Bu nedenle hem tedarikçiler hem de iş ortakları için öngörülebilir, güçlü ve uzun vadeli bir iş ilişkisi oluşturmayı önemsiyoruz.

Sektöre getirmeyi planladığımız yenilikçi yaklaşım; doğru stok yönetimi, hızlı teslimat süreçleri, dijitalleşmeye uyumlu iş akışları ve kaliteli ürün tedariğini esas almaktadır.

Bu yolculukta, Türkiye’nin güçlü otomotiv pazarında iş ortakları yaratarak karşılıklı fayda sağlayan, sağlam temellere dayalı bir tedarik ağı oluşturmayı amaçlıyoruz. Sektöre duyduğumuz güven ve yaratacağımız katma değer ile bu girişimi başarıyla büyüteceğimize inancımız tam.

Name: AVL Korea
Description:
AVL Korea:
AVL Korea has been a technology partner for a wide range of customers, including several automotive OEMs, automotive parts, construction machinery, shipbuilding and plants, research institutes, and universities for around 30 years since the Korean affiliate was established in 1991. We strive to help our customers increase their technology development capabilities by providing a variety of solutions from simulation software to test and measurement system, and engineering services and consulting.
The Korea Technical Center (KTC) located in Songdo provides engineering services to reduce the optimization research and development period for the powertrain system and the entire vehicle, and the service application center in Ansan provides maintenance, repair, and calibration of AVL test equipment.

AVL Globally:
With more than 11,000 employees, AVL is the world’s largest independent company for development, simulation and testing in the automotive industry, and in other sectors. Drawing on its pioneering spirit, the company provides concepts, solutions and methodologies to shape future mobility trends. AVL creates innovative and affordable technologies to effectively reduce CO2 by applying a multi-energy carrier strategy for all applications – from hybrid to battery electric and fuel cell technologies. The company supports customers throughout the entire development process from the ideation phase to serial production. To accelerate the vision of smart and connected mobility AVL has established competencies in the fields of ADAS, autonomous driving and digitalization. AVL’s passion is innovation. Together with an international network of experts that extends over 26 countries and with 45 Tech- and Engineering Centers worldwide, AVL drives sustainable mobility trends for a greener future. In 2020, the company generated a turnover of 1.7 billion Euros, of which 12% are invested in R&D activities.

Rusiya Federasiyası, Ukrayna, Qazaxıstan, Belorusiyanın və Avropanın nəhəng zavodları ilə sıx əməkdaşlıq edirik və məhsullarını ölkəmizə idxal edirik. “FLARM” MMC istehsalçı zavodların rəsmi nümayəndəliyi və dillerliyini almışdır. Orijinal ehtiyat hissələriylə yanaşı, həm kənd təsərrüfatı texnikaları, həm yüngül mühərrikli avtomobillər üçün təkər idxalı və satışına da başlayan şirkətimiz, hər il alıcılarının sayını artırmaqdadır. Əməkdaşlıq etdiyimiz şirkətlər keyfiyyətli və zəmanətli məhsulları ilə bütün istehlakçılarının etibarını qazanmışdır.
“FLARM” MMC məhsulları birbaşa olaraq istehsalçılardan idxal etdiyi üçün keyfiyyətli məhsulu müştərilərə daha sərfəli qiymətlərlə təklif edir.

Visión: Ser reconocidos como líderes en el mercado automotriz a nivel nacional e internacional, destacándonos por nuestra excelencia en el servicio, la innovación constante y el desarrollo de relaciones duraderas con nuestros clientes y socios comerciales.

Valores:

1. Calidad: Nos comprometemos a ofrecer productos y servicios de la más alta calidad.
2. Innovación: Fomentamos la creatividad y la mejora continua en todos nuestros procesos.

4. Integridad: Actuamos con ética y transparencia en todas nuestras operaciones.

Name: Dechent
Description:
Die DECHENT Autohausgruppe gehört mit zehn Standorten zu den großen automobilen Partnern im Südwesten Deutschlands. Vor allem der Erste Weltkrieg prägte Hans Dechent. Er wurde dem Kraftwageneinsatz an vorderster Front zugeteilt, wo er die Vorteile der motorisierten Mobilität kennenlernte. Dechent ahnt, dass im Auto enormes Potenzial steckt. Weil es den Wunsch der Menschen befriedigt, dorthin zu fahren, wo sie hinwollen – einfach weil sie es können. So stieg der Kriegsheimkehrer 1919 in die Firma Friedrich Krämer ein, eine Saarbrücker Wagenfirma, die damals noch Kutschen herstellte.

1919 machte sich Hans Dechent schnell ans Werk. Die Firma Friedrich Krämer ändert ihren Namen in Central-Garage. Hans Dechent verlagert das Geschäft von Wagenbau auf Karosseriebau. Um die von ihm verkauften Autos fortan warten und reparieren zu können, richtete er eine Werkstatt in der Gerberstraße in Saarbrücken ein. Das Unternehmen beschäftigte bald 60 Mitarbeiter und wuchs schnell.

Es stellt sich heraus, dass der Schwager von Hans Dechent, Dr. Fritz Opel, der Enkel von Adam Opel ist, welcher die Firma Opel GmbH gründete. Dr. Fritz Opel – Spitzname „Raketen- Fritz“ – beteiligte sich an dem aufstrebenden Unternehmen, sodass 1924 auf einem über 5.000 Quadratmeter großen Grundstück in der Mainzer Straße 66-70 in Saarbrücken eine moderne Autowerkstatt eröffnet wurde. Gleichzeitig mit dem Umzug wurde der Firmenname in “Central-Garage G.m.b.H.” geändert.

Die Generalvertretung von Opel übernahm das Unternehmen im Jahre 1928, was sie zu einem der führenden Betriebe im Saarland machte. Während des Zweiten Weltkriegs wurde das Unternehmen zweimal evakuiert. Der Wiederaufbau begann bis Anfang der 1950er Jahre, als der alte Standort zu klein wurde, sodass 1952 am heutigen Standort Saarbrücken in der Mainzer Straße 168 mit dem Bau einer modernen Instandhaltungswerkstatt mit 10.000 m2 begonnen wurde. Unter dem neuen Firmennamen „Autohaus DECHENT & Central Garage G.m.b.H.“ wu

UNOMOTOR SRL inició sus actividades en septiembre de 2001 en la ciudad de Rosario, contando con 20 años de presencia y trayectoria en el mercado.

Desde el comienzo de nuestras actividades nos especializamos en la venta mayorista de repuestos y accesorios para motocicletas. Disponemos de una amplia red comercial brindando cobertura nacional a través de ventas personalizadas, asistencia telefónica especializada y customer service.

Con el transcurso de los años hemos incorporado nuevas líneas de productos con el objetivo de proveer a nuestros clientes una solución integral a sus necesidades.

Unomotor SRL desarrolla alianzas estratégicas de mediano y largo plazo con sus principales proveedores de marcas líderes, tanto de origen Nacional como Importado.

Siguiendo esta premisa, contamos con la Representación y Distribución Oficial de Lubricantes IPONE (Francia), Cascos VERTIGO (Arg.), Zapatas y Pastillas de freno FRAS-LE (Brasil), somos Importadores Directos para Argentina de Repuestos/Accesorios PRO TORK, y Cubiertas/Cámaras LEVORIN (Brasil), sumando los productos de Seguridad LUMA, cascos NZI Helmets (España) y otras marcas, como baterías HAIJIU, y nuestra última incorporación: Kits de transmisión NAKATA (By Fras-le) fabricante de repuestos para el mercado de motocicletas, que completan nuestra Amplia Cartera de Productos.

Nuestro objetivo principal es el desarrollo de gestión y sistemas para mejorar día a día nuestra actividad, a fin de brindar un servicio que asegure la entrega en tiempo y forma con su correspondiente asesoramiento.

Nuestro servicio se fortalece con la disponibilidad permanente de stock en las principales líneas comercializadas.

Name: ENCA Technology & Services Ltd.
Description:
ENCA ( ENVIRONMENTAL CARE ) is dedicated to providing the best environmentally sustainable products and services to our customers. To achieve this, we have established two divisions: one focusing on electric powertrain systems and the other on vehicle thermal management systems. Our mission is to protect the environment and save the planet. We are engaged in the R&D, production, and offering of new energy vehicle powertrain systems, hydrogen fuel system accessories, and thermal management systems for new energy commercial vehicles.

We are proud to have formed a joint venture with Cummins (through Cummins’ acquisition of EDI) and to have established strategic partnerships with other world-renowned auto parts companies, such as EATON and DANA TM4, to promote the development of new energy vehicles. Our hybrid power system and pure electric power system products have been widely used in China, Southeast Asia, Europe, and other regions, and have received many positive feedbacks. To introduce international advanced technology and talent, we launched an International R&D center in Waterloo, Canada, in 2018.

We believe in “Environment Protection, Independent Innovation, Win-Win Cooperation,” and we are committed to helping our customers build efficient and reliable pure electric or hybrid electric vehicles, contributing to a cleaner world for future generations.

Name: GOTO Bearing
Description:
Company Profile

Since its inception in 1995, SHUOJING GROUP has excelled in diverse sectors, crafting a global business landscape where industrial and non-industrial operations synergize seamlessly.

Industrial Pillars
 Automotive Components (GOTO Bearing): Centered around our manufacturing bases in Hebei and Zhejiang, we specialize in bearing R&D and production, supplying critical components to international brands like Magneti Marelli (Italy) and SKF (Sweden). Our portfolio extends to shock absorbers, belt tensioners, and more, with strategic investment partnerships optimizing production efficiency.
 CNC Machine Tools: Leveraging our intelligent manufacturing hub in Dongguan, our precision machinery caters to key domestic markets and reaches global clients, driving innovation in the manufacturing sector.
 Bearing Distribution Network: As authorized distributors for NTN and NSK, we collaborate with Seiko to produce P4-grade high-precision bearings, integrating end-to-end manufacturing and distribution capabilities.

Non-Industrial Ecosystem
Diversifying beyond core industries, we've ventured into insurance, technology, and 8.8 alkaline drinking water. Through capital injection and industrial integration, our多元化 strategy thrives, fueled by our founder’s acumen as a seasoned investor expanding our commercial horizons.

Rooted locally, connected globally—SHUOJING GROUP welcomes partners worldwide to explore collaborative opportunities and pioneer industry advancements together!

Name: Autocore Solution Pty
Description:
Autocore Solutions is a full line, used automotive parts purchaser and supplier based in Queensland Australia. We purchase a large range of used automotive cores for remanufacturing purposes, such as: Diesel Injectors / Diesel Pumps / Diesel Particulate Filters / Turbochargers / Alternators / Stater Motors / AC Compressors / EGR Valves / Callipers / Steering Racks / Steering Pumps / Commercial Truck Parts / Engines / Transmissions / Catalytic Converters.
We believe in promoting a strong Circular Economy and getting the most out of what would otherwise be deemed as an end of life part by supporting the remanufacturing industry with quality used cores and promoting remanufacturing as an affordable alternative to new parts. In tern this offers a much more attractive financial solution for dismantlers, repair shops and wrecking yards with their non working / surplus used auto parts. 
Supporting remanufacturing can make an incredible difference to our planets overall climate impact. Repairs that reuse parts reduce CO2 emissions by as much as 75% compared to using new parts. This is one of the many reasons that we have such a passion for what we do and the Circular Economy as a whole. 
To learn more about what we do, or for a free no obligation quotation on your surplus used parts, please contact us directly at sales@autocoresolutions.com / +61 (0)437 226 301.
www.autocoresolutions.com

Name: Autoshopping Srl
Description:
AutoShopping nasce dalla passione e dall’impegno professionale nel mondo dell’automobile, caratteristica fondamentale e testimone della profonda esperienza maturata in oltre 50 anni di attività.

Ulteriore segno della volontà di arrivare ad offrire tutti i tipi di servizi che in qualche modo hanno nell’automobile il loro fulcro, è l’introduzione, dal 1999, del settore noleggio a breve termine (concessionari HERTZ) e del noleggio a lungo termine.

Attualmente, si commercializzano auto nuove in offerta di diverse marche e vetture km0, seminuove e usate, tutte accuratamente selezionate, revisionate e collaudate prima di ricevere il nullaosta per la reimmissione su strada.

AutoShopping è espressione dell’interesse professionale per l’automobile.
Con AutoShopping, un veicolo usato non è più un punto interrogativo, ma una certezza di qualità, affidabile e garantita, nero su bianco. Infatti, dal 1995, prima ancora che la norma lo prevedesse, AutoShopping rilascia un certificato di garanzia.

Se vi interessa una qualsiasi auto, AutoShopping vi offre la sua esperienza e i migliori prezzi di mercato, se cercate invece un’auto usata vi offre un usato sicuro: sicuro per resa, per efficienza, per sicurezza. Una moderna officina garantisce selezioni accurate, controlli periodici, controlli scrupolosi, collaudi severi. Se vi interessa che la vostra auto usata sia anche un ottimo investimento, AutoShopping vi offre l’usato che conviene: prezzi chiari, condizioni di acquisto trasparenti, finanziamenti agevolati fino a 84 mesi anche senza anticipo.

Se vi interessa un usato così, allora vi interessa AutoShopping: una scelta sicura.

Name: BMW Autobedrijf Martin Kuiper
Description:
Opgericht in 1985 is Autobedrijf Martin Kuiper gelegen in het dorpje Zevenhuizen te Groningen. Op een terrein van 8.000 m2 staan occasions ter verkoop, een loods met onderdelen en een ruime goed voorziende werkplaats. Niet alleen worden veel onderdelen verkregen door deze uit BMW's te demonteren en te reviseren maar ook worden deze per directe import uit Duitsland aangeschaft. Op deze wijze is het aanbod van BMW onderdelen van grote omvang. 

In het onderdelenmagazijn worden de nieuwe, alsmede de gebruikte onderdelen
gesorteerd en opgeslagen in de stellingen. In dit magazijn bevinden zich alle auto-onderdelen zoals motoren, versnellingsbakken, schokdempers, plaatwerk, radiateurs, remklauwen, bumpers etc. Alle onderdelen die van goede kwaliteit zijn worden hier na een grondige controle opgeslagen om weer verkocht te worden. De artikelen zijn goed gesorteerd en op de juiste plek opgeslagen om altijd een juist 
beeld van de voorraad weer te geven. 

Binnen autobedrijf Martin Kuiper is veel kennis van de mechanische kant van de BMW. In onze garage stellen we de wagens af , onderhoud en reparatie zijn hier dagelijkse werkzaamheden. Deze speciaal voor de BMW uitgeruste werkplaats is niet alleen een locatie om onderdelen te verkrijgen uit demontage modellen maar tevens de plek voor alle onderhoud en reparaties.

Bij autobedrijf Martin Kuiper stellen wij kennis en expertise met betrekking tot onze producten voorop. Door hiernaast te zorgen dat onze producten een goede kwaliteit genieten en altijd in de beste staat afgeleverd worden kunnen wij geheel met trots achter onze producten staan. Alleen met zo'n bedrijfsvisie kun je zowel ter plaatse #1 blijven.

Name: International Parts Concierge
Description:
We locate, purchase and ship  shucked and parts from the USA to Scandinavia and most of Europe

Finding and shipping Cars, Motorcycles, Boats or Jet-Skis and parts for any of these from the US to Europe can be both costly and time consuming. Some companies selling parts will NOT ship internationally at all. Some vehicles and parts sold privately are available for local pick-up only, and you need someone to get it for you. 

We specialize in finding and shipping parts from the US to Europe, and we can do this and more for you.

Are you restoring or want to upgrade your Classic American Car, Boat or Motorcycle, and the parts you need are only available used or New Old Stock on Ebay?
We can help; contact us for the details and you can have the seller ship the parts directly to us. We can store the parts for you until you have purchased everything you want to ship together. We will combine them in larger packages and ship them to you according to the service you prefer. 

For light weight items we can ship via regular mail if you want it fast. For heavy or bulky items we can ship in a container on a ship that takes about 30 days. We can also ship complete cars, boats, motorcycles and Jet-skis either in a container or on a RORO ship (Cars only). This takes more planning, but is not as expensive as you might think.

Vi forstår Norsk, Svensk og Dansk. Hvis du foretrekker å kommunisere på et av disse språkene, vil vi gjerne imøtekomme dette for deg.

Name: Jacquet Recyclauto
Description:
Nous sommes la troisième génération d'un métier en perpétuelle évolution de plus en plus axé sur la protection de l'environnement et la traçabilité administrative et physique des véhicules.

Avec le temps, notre métier a changé, évolué et nous sommes devenus aujourd’hui un acteur incontournable de la filière des Véhicules Hors d’Usage dit VHU.

Conscient de l’impact environnemental, nous dépolluons les VHU dans un respect total de la nature. Nous avons opté pour des machines de dernières technologies nous permettant de filtrer indépendamment tous les différents liquides d’un véhicule qui sont ensuite collectés par des filières agréées. Nous valorisons certaines pièces détachées et participons à une économie circulaire, en revendant des pièces d’occasion à un coût moindre. Enfin nous transmettons les véhicules totalement dépollués à un broyeur agrée afin de mettre fin au cycle de vie du véhicule.

Name: Clubauto SRL
Description:
Intermediazione di Auto tra Privati: Servizi Offerti

La compravendita di auto tra privati può essere complessa. Il nostro servizio di intermediazione rende questo processo sicuro e semplice, offrendo supporto completo per entrambe le parti.

Finanziamenti Personalizzati
Offriamo soluzioni di finanziamento flessibili, collaborando con istituti di credito affidabili per consentire ai clienti di acquistare l'auto dilazionando il pagamento. Ci occupiamo di tutta la documentazione per rendere il processo rapido e senza stress.

Garanzie e Ispezioni
Tutte le auto intermediarie tramite noi sono sottoposte a rigorose ispezioni e coperte da garanzie che proteggono l'acquirente da difetti meccanici ed elettrici, offrendo sicurezza post-vendita.

Permute
Valutiamo e accettiamo il tuo veicolo usato come parte del pagamento per un nuovo acquisto, semplificando il processo e massimizzando il valore del tuo veicolo.

Documentazione e Valutazione
Offriamo una valutazione equa del veicolo e gestiamo tutta la documentazione necessaria per il trasferimento di proprietà, garantendo una transazione senza problemi.

Conclusione

Il nostro servizio di intermediazione assicura una compravendita sicura, con finanziamenti, garanzie, permute e gestione della documentazione, offrendo un’esperienza senza stress per venditori e acquirenti.

Name: The Wheel Collection
Description:
Welcome to The Wheel Collection, based in Sandton, Johannesburg—your premier destination for high-end exotic and rugged 4x4 wheels across South Africa. With 20 years of industry experience, we specialize in OEM, aftermarket, and designer-forged wheels that elevate both luxury and performance.

What We Offer:

1. South Africa’s Largest Wheel Collection
We stock the biggest variety of high-end wheels in the country, catering to all major exotic and off-road vehicle brands. Whether you drive a Ferrari, BMW M-Series, G-Wagon, or Land Cruiser, we’ve got the perfect set to match your performance and aesthetic needs.

2. Custom & Designer-Forged Solutions: 
Looking for something exclusive? Our Designer FORGED collection allows you to craft bespoke wheels—engineered precisely to your specs, including offset, width, and PCD—offered in sizes from 17” to 24” 

3. Tyres & Wheel Packages: Browse our selection of wheel-and-tyre combos, such as 22” Range Rover wheels with brand new tyres, or Porsche Cayenne/Panamera wheels paired with Continental tyres—each eligible for nationwide delivery through Cargo Works 

4. 4x4 & Off-Road Specialists:
From lifted bakkies to trail-ready Land Cruisers, we offer robust and aggressive 4x4 wheel options, perfect for South Africa’s diverse terrain. Our range covers Ford Ranger, Toyota Hilux, Isuzu D-Max, Jeep, and more.

Why Choose Us
> Trusted Expertise: 
Two decades of commitment to quality, design, and customer satisfaction.
>Unbeatable Prices: 
Exceptional value on premium products—whether you're after luxury or rugged performance.
>Nationwide Reach: 
Located in Sandton, Johannesburg, we deliver across South Africa via Cargo Works—bringing your dream wheels right to your doorstep
> Dedicated Customer Service: 
We stand behind our products with a tyre and rim guarantee against factory defects, ensuring your peace of mind

Name: Primus Seat Covers
Description:
Things You Should Know About Primus

-    We’re van drivers like you
-    We are always improving, just like our products.
-    We know what you put up with, and what your van endures - that’s why we decided to do things better.

With decades of daily van use and 16 years’ experience in the seat cover industry, our founder and director knew that there was a real need for quality, hard wearing seat covers that did the job, and looked the part too. It sounds simple - and that’s because it is. 

How We Approach The Market

Keep it simple and do it right - that’s how we continuously improve, and it’s why thousands of people trust us to protect their seats and their investments.

We design our covers the way we’d want them in our own vehicles, because that’s exactly where they start. Every product is tested by us - in a real van, in the real world. If it’s awkward to fit, doesn’t stay put, or doesn’t hold up under pressure, it doesn’t make the cut.

How We Design Our Range

We build with three things in mind:
Quality, simplicity, and continuous improvement.

That means tough materials, smart designs, and no overpromising. Just reliable protection that fits right, lasts long, and won’t drive you mad during installation.

Our covers are made in world-class automotive factories with decades of experience, the kind trusted by global vehicle brands. But everything’s designed here in the UK, by people who know vans inside out. We work closely with tradespeople, fleet managers, hobbyists, and van-driving families to keep refining what we offer.

We’re not chasing perfection, or claiming to have attained it. We’re listening, improving, and doing the job properly one seat cover at a time and a huge part of that is the ongoing feedback we receive from van drivers and users out in the rat race, telling us what’s great about our offering, and what else they need.

Why Choose Primus?

Name: Eda Bike
Description:
Eda Bike, c’est la moto vue par des gens qui la vivent.
On achète, on revend, on équipe, on analyse.
Eda Bike, c’est trois activités, une même logique : du concret.

- Achat-revente de motos d’occasion, contrôlées sur 100 points avec notre partenaire Apro Racer.
- Vente d’accessoires moto, pensés pour ceux qui roulent vraiment.
- Études de marché sur le monde du deux-roues, basées sur une base de données unique en France.

Et parce qu’une marque sans personnalité, c’est ennuyeux, on a Tubo, notre mascotte moqueuse, qui dit tout haut ce que les motards pensent tout bas.
On partage sur YouTube et les réseaux, avec un ton un peu mordant, jamais creux.

Eda Bike : du concret, pas du PowerPoint.

•	Maquinaria obras públicas

Trabajamos con primeras marcas a precios de mayorista y tenemos un amplio stock en nuestros almacenes y una logística eficiente a fin de satisfacer cualquier pedido de nuestros clientes, tanto dentro como fuera de España.
Somos grandes compradores a fábrica, lo que nos garantiza un precio sumamente competitivo. Además, podemos suministrar los pedidos por el medio de transporte que más le convenga y generalmente en periodos de tiempo muy cortos.
Nuestro equipo técnico tiene un gran conocimiento y está muy especializado en nuestros productos y sus aplicaciones, ofreciendo así un soporte altamente cualificado a todos nuestros clientes ante cualquier duda o posible incidencia.
Además de nuestra central en Vigo (España), disponemos de un depósito en la población de Alicante para satisfacer principalmente la demanda de nuestros clientes en la zona este y sur de España con la mayor brevedad posible.
En el año 2015 abrimos nuestra primera sucursal en Portugal, siendo la ciudad de Leiria la localidad escogida para comenzar nuestra andadura en el territorio portugués.
En el año 2018 realizamos nuestra segunda apertura en Portugal, siendo Maia (Oporto) la ciudad elegida para proveer con nuestros productos principalmente a la zona norte y centro de Portugal.
Actualmente, seguimos creciendo en número de clientes y volumen de ventas, por lo que creemos estar sólidamente asentados y bien valorados, tanto en el producto comercializado como en nuestro personal técnico y de atención comercial.

Name: REX AUTO LLC dba REX AUTO PARTS
Description:
REX AUTO LLC is licensed to purchase in all 50 states so we can even help all buyers purchase vehicles from restrictive states for which they don’t have a license. Both Wholesale and Retail customers are welcome! REX AUTO LLC (referred to as “REX AUTO”) is a licensed auto dealer, established in 2004 in the state of Indiana.

REX AUTO offers intermediary solutions for US auto auctions, by purchasing and reselling vehicles to eligible US-based and foreign retail and wholesale buyers (referred to as “Buyer”). REX AUTO does not offer just broker services, instead, it completes the purchase, documentation, and title reassignment process as the rightful buyer of each vehicle, and then engages in reselling vehicles to eligible Buyers. 

REX AUTO can offer access to new vehicles, dealer-certified vehicles, previously leased vehicles, used vehicles, light damage vehicles, totaled rebuildable vehicles, parts-only bill-of-sale vehicles, specialty equipment, and so much more. We can offer access to the largest name US Auctions such as COPART, IAA, MANHEIM, ADESA, motorcycle/power sport such as NPA, and specialty heavy-duty equipment such as IRON PLANET and RB.

Our Services
Annual registration is made for larger buyers who wish to have full-time access to auto auctions as an authorized REX AUTO agent. Buyers will have full capabilities to search, place preliminary (Proxy) bids, Buy now, watch, and participate in the internet and live auctions.

Single purchase is made for easy instantaneous access to leave an order(request) to bid/buy (on) a vehicle/item with no long-term contract.

Since 2006, we have focused on offering comprehensive bearing kits, tailored to meet

renowned bearing manufacturer from Germany, thereby enhancing our product

After achieving this initial partnership, we have expanded our network to include

NTN SNR (2022). These collaborations are a testament to our commitment to
providing you with top-tier products. With these trusted partnerships, we aim to give
you peace of mind, assuring you of the safety, reliability, and seamless performance
of our products.
