Name: DNC Auto Part
Description:
Şirketimiz, 2010 yılında İzmir Karşıyaka’ da otomotiv yedek parça toptan ve perakende satışı üzerine kurulmuştur. Zaman içerisinde yaygın bir müşteri ağına sahip olan şirketimiz, araçların kilit aksamlarında ve otomotiv sektörünün dışında da birçok alanda kullanılan DC Motorların üretimine başlamıştır.  ‘Moment Auto’ markası ile ürettiğimiz motorlarımız yüksek kalitesi ile kısa sürede kendini duyurmuştur. Şu an DC Motor çeşitlerimiz ile sektörde en önemli yere sahip olarak zirvede bulunmaktayız. Üretimin yanında airbag makaraları, airbag şeritleri, cam kriko motorları gibi birçok ürünün ithalatını yaparak ürün çeşitlerimiz her geçen gün kendini yenilemektedir. Yurtiçinde etkili olduğu kadar yurtdışı ürün satışlarında da büyük bir ivme kazanan şirketimiz, ihracat alanında da kendini önemli ölçüde göstermiştir.

     İthalat, ihracat ve toptan satışın yanı sıra perakende satış da büyük rol oynamaktayız. Kurduğumuz geniş pazarlama ağımız ile Türkiye’nin dört bir yanına saha araçlarımız gitmektedir. Sürekli gezen saha araçlarımız sayesinde müşterilerimize ürünlerimizi daha kolay ve kısa sürede ulaşım sağlamaktayız.

     Ayrıca, 2020 yılında pandeminin tüm dünyayı etkisi altına alıp e ticaret sektörünün gelişmesiyle bizde e ticaretteki yerimizi aldık. Yurtiçi platformlarında yer aldığımız gibi yurtdışı birçok platformda da satışlarımızı gerçekleştirmeye başladık. Yaklaşık yurtiçi ve yurtdışı 20 platformda bulunan şirketimiz, gün geçtikçe bu sayıyı arttırarak yeni platformlar da yerini almaktadır.

    Her geçen gün siz değerli müşterilerimize daha kaliteli bir hizmet vermek ve ürün çeşitliliğimizi arttırmak için çalışan şirketimiz, İzmir Bornova’ da faaliyetine devam etmektedir. Yüksek ürün kalitesi, geniş ürün yelpazesi ve ekip arkadaşlarımızın emekleri ile her geçen gün daha çok çalışarak sizlere hizmet vermekten gurur duyuyoruz.

DNC Auto Part, bir ‘Moment Auto’ kuruluşudur.

Name: Dent Guard
Description:
Dent Guard The Genesis of Protection

There's a saying: necessity is the mother of invention. For many vehicle owners, the heartbreak of discovering a new dent or scratch on their beloved car is all too familiar. With statistics showing that more than half of all registered cars bear these battle scars, the issue and problem was clear. The solution, however, wasn't.

Cars are more than just vehicles; they're symbols of our hard work, memories, and even extensions of our personalities. These blemishes don't just mar the vehicle's appearance, but they also devalue it, and often, the cost of repair doesn't justify an insurance claim.

From this very realisation emerged Dent Guard. An innovative, affordable, and convenient answer to the ubiquitous problem of vehicular door dents and scratches. With the aim to craft a protection system that can easily reside and remove from the vehicle, ready to defend against the next potential dent.

The Innovation Behind Dent Guard

Trent Lecky isn't just any entrepreneur. With a history of establishing successful ventures and a knack for branding, he's a force to be reckoned with. As the inventor behind Dent Guard and creator of Dent Guard Pty Ltd, Trent saw the need, understood the pain points, and set out to create a solution. A product that would change the way we protect our vehicles.

Our Mission and Vision

At Dent Guard, our purpose is simple yet profound: offer an affordable protection system safeguarding passenger vehicles from unsightly dents and scratches. While our signature black and white Dent Guards have become a staple for many, we're not stopping there. We're continually evolving, with customisable colour options on the horizon for personalised branding and car colour matching and also the innovative Dent Guard Wall Protection system designed to shield home garage walls from those accidental nudges, marks and wall dents.

Follow our journey and connect with us to become part of our Dent Guard fam.

Core Milestones

• 1998: The company was established and its headquarters was located in Shunyi Industrial Zone, Beijing.

• 2003: Passed ISO 9001 quality management system certification, ushering in the era of standardized management.

• 2006: Two national invention patents were approved, and the technical strength ranked among the top in the world.

• 2016: Became the drafting unit of industry standards and led the formulation of national standards for engineering machinery brake pads.

• 2020: Passed 3C certification, started preparations for IATF 16949 certification, and strengthened international compliance capabilities.

Runcoro will continue to focus on the research and development of new energy vehicle braking solutions with the vision of "safety first, innovation driven". Customer-centric service concept
At Runcoro, we work closely with customers to provide customized solutions from material selection to performance optimization. The technical support team provides 7×24 hours global service to ensure seamless product adaptation and compliance with regional regulatory requirements.
Corporate Vision
"Safety first, innovation driven" - We are committed to becoming the preferred partner for sustainable braking solutions, and to escort safer and greener travel around the world.

Name: Dapel Autopeças Elétricas Ltda.
Description:
Fundada em 1976, a Dapel nasceu como uma empresa que não apenas fornecia peças automotivas, mas também prestava serviços. Nossos primeiros passos foram na Vila Velha, onde iniciamos atendendo o mercado local e conquistando cada cliente com eficiência e seriedade. Naquela época, nossas vendas eram conduzidas de maneira ágil, com uma Kombi de pronta entrega levando soluções de oficina em oficina.

Com dedicação e comprometimento, nosso crescimento foi notável. Em 1990, já tínhamos estabelecido uma presença significativa e expandimos nossas operações. Contamos com uma equipe de vendedores externos, que percorriam todo o estado do Paraná, estabelecendo parcerias e construindo uma rede de confiança.

Movidos pelo desejo de oferecer sempre o melhor, mudamos novamente de endereço e, hoje, nossa localização estratégica nos coloca em uma das principais avenidas de Londrina. Com uma extensa variedade de peças e parcerias com diversos fornecedores, somos capazes de atender tanto o varejo quanto o atacado, com a mesma dedicação e qualidade que nos acompanham desde o início.

Ao longo de nossa jornada, permanecemos fiéis aos nossos valores de tradição, seriedade e respeito aos clientes. A cada dia, buscamos aprimorar nossos serviços para oferecer soluções completas e satisfazer as necessidades de todos aqueles que confiam em nossa expertise.

Na Dapel, estamos prontos para enfrentar os desafios do presente e do futuro, sempre com o compromisso de servir com excelência e contribuir para o sucesso de nossos clientes. Agradecemos a todos que fizeram parte dessa trajetória e convidamos você a fazer parte dessa história de sucesso. Juntos, seguimos em direção a um futuro de crescimento e prosperidade.

Our mission is to reimagine e-commerce in ways that build a more fulfilling and lasting world, and we are committed to using the power of business to strengthen communities and empower people.

We are dedicated to creating the best customer experience possible, utilizing world-class design principles and the latest technologies to deliver a fast, easy-to-use, and mobile-responsive website. Kami menyediakan layanan komprehensif yang mencakup penjualan kendaraan penumpang dan niaga Mitsubishi Motors, penyediaan suku cadang asli, perawatan berkala, hingga perbaikan body & cat.  Fokus Kami

• Digitalisasi dan otomasi proses bisnis untuk meningkatkan efisiensi dan akurasi
• Membangun talenta unggul dan budaya kerja berbasis integritas, profesionalisme, dan pelayanan

 Visi Kami
Menjadi dealer otomotif terpercaya yang memberikan solusi mobilitas menyeluruh, mendukung pertumbuhan pelanggan, dan berkontribusi pada kemajuan industri otomotif nasional.

DIPO percaya bahwa keberhasilan jangka panjang hanya dapat dicapai melalui hubungan yang saling menguntungkan antara perusahaan, pelanggan, karyawan, dan mitra bisnis. Oleh karena itu, kami terus beradaptasi terhadap perubahan teknologi, tren pasar, serta ekspektasi pelanggan. Komitmen kami adalah menghadirkan pengalaman kepemilikan kendaraan yang nyaman, efisien, dan bernilai tambah, sambil terus meningkatkan standar layanan demi mewujudkan masa depan mobilitas yang berkelanjutan di Indonesia.

Name: Tuning Freaks
Description:
Natuurlijk, hier is een LinkedIn-omschrijving voor Tuning Freaks:

"Tuning Freaks - Jouw Bron voor Hoogwaardige Aftermarket Auto-onderdelen!

Welkom bij Tuning Freaks, dé bestemming voor autoliefhebbers die streven naar het bouwen van hun droomwagen. Wij zijn een toonaangevende webshop gespecialiseerd in hoogwaardige aftermarket auto-onderdelen en accessoires. Of je nu op zoek bent naar prestatieverbeteringen, stijlvolle aanpassingen of gewoon naar die ene unieke component om je voertuig te transformeren, bij Tuning Freaks ben je aan het juiste adres.

Onze passie voor auto's drijft ons om een uitgebreid assortiment van de meest geavanceerde en betrouwbare onderdelen beschikbaar te stellen. Of je nu een sportwagen, een off-roader of een dagelijkse chauffeur hebt, we hebben de producten die je nodig hebt om je voertuig te optimaliseren en te personaliseren. Van motoronderdelen tot carrosseriekits, van interieurupgrades tot velgen en banden, we hebben alles wat je nodig hebt om jouw visie op de perfecte auto tot leven te brengen.

Bij Tuning Freaks begrijpen we dat jouw auto meer is dan alleen maar een vervoermiddel. Het is een uitdrukking van jouw persoonlijkheid en passie voor rijden. Daarom streven we ernaar om niet alleen producten van topkwaliteit te leveren, maar ook uitstekende klantenservice en technische ondersteuning te bieden. Ons deskundige team staat klaar om je te helpen bij het maken van de juiste keuzes voor jouw project, zodat je met vertrouwen en enthousiasme aan de slag kunt gaan.

Word lid van onze groeiende gemeenschap van autoliefhebbers en laat je inspireren door de eindeloze mogelijkheden die Tuning Freaks te bieden heeft. Of je nu een doorgewinterde professional of een enthousiaste beginner bent, we verwelkomen je graag in onze wereld van automodificatie en verbetering.

Kies Tuning Freaks en zet de eerste stap naar het realiseren van jouw autodromen. Bezoek onze webshop vandaag nog en ontdek de kracht van personalisatie en prestatie!"

Name: Električni Automobili d.o.o.
Description:
Kompanija Električni Automobili je posvećena pružanju širokog asortimana prodaje proverenih polovnih električnih vozila, novih električnih vozila kao punjača i prateće opreme, uz vrhunske usluge i podršku klijentima. Naš cilj je da postanemo prepoznatljiva destinacija za ljubitelje električnih vozila koji traže sigurnu, pouzdanu i ekološki prihvatljivu vožnju.

Stojimo iza visokog standarda kvaliteta u svemu što radimo, obezbeđujući kvalitetne automobile, punjače i usluge za naše klijente. Naš tim stručnjaka je tu da pruži edukaciju, savete i preporuke o električnim vozilima, baterijama i punjačima.

Posvećeni smo očuvanju životne sredine i promociji održivih transportnih opcija radi smanjenja emisije štetnih gasova.

Kompanija Električni Automobili je vaša sigurna luka u svetu električnih vozila. Pružamo širok spektar proverenih polovnih vozila i najnovijih modela, kao i širok izbor punjača kako biste bili spremni za svaku vožnju.

Naš cilj je postati vaša prva destinacija za električnu mobilnost. Pružamo vrhunsku uslugu i podršku, kao i mogućnost iznajmljivanja punjača ili automobila radi prilagođavanja vašim potrebama.

Naš servis električnih vozila je vaš pouzdan partner za održavanje i popravke, osiguravajući sigurnu i bezbrižnu vožnju.

Name: Alternativa - L'Accademia dell'Auto
Description:
Siamo un’azienda costituita nel 2007 a Cusano Milanino da Lucia Sergianno e dalla sua trentennale esperienza nel campo della grande distribuzione di automobili e della gestione di flotte di veicoli provenienti da noleggio a breve e a lungo termine.

 

La collaborazione con aziende storiche nel settore automotive vede nella sua persona il perno umano e professionale di una sinergia, basata sulla fiducia e sul rispetto reciproco, che ha portato alla nascita di Alternativa: L’accademia dell’Auto.

 

Perchè l’accademia? Perchè nasce dalla volontà di creare un nuovo modo di vedere il settore Automotive, puntando sui giovani per trovare nuovi assetti in un mercato bisognoso di idee. E il privato? Nel 2012 nasce il progetto di intermediazione da privato a privato che punta ad agevolare una transazione sicura, trasparente, supportata passo dopo passo da esperti del settore. Dopo 10 anni, Alternativa è il punto di riferimento per oltre 200 operatori di settore che si affidano giornalmente ai suoi servizi, e conta oltre 1000 utenti privati soddisfatti.

Name: Tehrani Trading Co.
Description:
Tehrani International Trading has been at the forefront of the tire and beverage industries for over a decade. Our journey began in 2014 in the Middle East, where we quickly established ourselves as a trusted representative for leading tire brands like Matador, Sumitomo, Techking, and Zeetex. Our commitment to quality and excellence enabled us to build a strong foundation and foster lasting relationships with our partners.



Recognizing the immense potential and opportunities beyond our initial market, we strategically expanded our operations to North America. Establishing a branch in Vancouver, Canada, allowed us to cater to the dynamic and diverse needs of the North American market. This expansion underscores our dedication to providing top-notch products and services on a global scale.

Our success is rooted in our ability to identify and develop niche markets for each tire brand based on their unique strengths and cultural appeal. Our comprehensive sales network spans various industries, including mining, OEMs, tire retailers, and fleet companies, ensuring that we deliver tailored solutions that meet the specific needs of our clients.



In addition to our tire expertise, we have successfully ventured into the premium beverage market, representing high-end brands such as Tonino Lamborghini. Our well-organized network in the Middle East has enabled us to help brands and companies develop their businesses and distribute their products efficiently and effectively.



At Tehrani International Trading, we pride ourselves on our professionalism, strategic insights, and unwavering commitment to quality. Our team is dedicated to driving innovation and excellence, helping our partners achieve sustainable growth and long-term success.



Join us on our journey as we continue to redefine the tire and beverage industries, delivering unparalleled products and services that build trust and exceed expectations.

Name: SFAuto | Automotive Dealership | Used Car Export | New Car Distributor
Description:
Shanghai Senfu International Trading Co., Ltd. (SFAuto) is a leading automotive export service provider based in Shanghai, China. Established on March 1, 2012, we have steadily expanded our global reach from our strategic location, leveraging the advantages of Shanghai’s premier automotive district.

We are dedicated to connecting global buyers with China’s rapidly evolving automotive market. Our core business encompasses the export of New Energy Vehicles (NEVs), petrol cars, used vehicles, heavy construction machinery, and genuine auto parts.

Why Partner with SFAuto?

We offer a comprehensive, one-stop solution that eliminates the need for intermediaries. By managing the entire supply chain in-house—from dealership sourcing and vehicle inspection to logistics and freight forwarding—we ensure direct control, transparency, and highly competitive pricing for our clients.

Our Core Advantages:

Full Export Qualifications: We operate with complete legal licenses for automotive export, ensuring that every purchase is conducted through compliant channels for smooth customs clearance and zero risk.

Extensive Brand Coverage: Leveraging a vast network of cooperative offline stores and authorized dealerships, we provide access to virtually all major Chinese and joint-venture brands, including BYD, Zeekr, Toyota, Volkswagen, and more.

Financial Security: Backed by a robust capital chain and strong industry standing, we offer a secure transaction environment and flexible payment options tailored to diverse business needs.

Professional Global Team: Our dedicated overseas sales team is composed of industry professionals with international backgrounds. We understand global market rules and cultural nuances, ensuring efficient, barrier-free communication.

Whether you are looking to import the latest EVs or establish a stable supply of traditional vehicles, SFAuto provides the reliability, speed, and integrity you need to succeed.

E themeluar në vitin 2024 në Tiranë dhe ne partneritet me specialiste te kesaj industrie me eksperience mbi 15 vite, Panda sjell për herë te parë në vend teknologjinë më të fundit nga Kina dhe markat më të njohura të makinave elektrike - nga modelet ekonomike e deri tek ato luksoze.

Me një rrjet të ndërtuar fuqishëm partnerësh ndërkombëtarë, sherbim të certifikuar pas shitjes, dhe një garanci të plotë 5-vjeçare për baterinë, Panda garanton jo vetëm cilësi, por edhe besueshmëri afatgjatë. Në qendër të filozofisë sonë qëndron klienti - çdo makinë, çdo keshillim dhe çdo sherbim janë të menduara për t'i ofruar shqiptarëve dhe më gjerë një eksperiencë moderne dhe të sigurt drejt elektromobilitetit.

Me selinë tonë në Tiranë dhe plane ekspansioni në disa qytete tjera dhe përtej Shqiperise, Panda Electric Motors po bähet pika referuese për ata që duan të ndryshojnë të ardhmen - jo nesër, por sot.

E ardhmja eshtë elektrike. Dhe ekipi I Pandës është në timon.

Garantía de 7 años sin límite de kilometraje: Todos los vehículos nuevos cuentan con una garantía defensa a defensa por un plazo de 7 años y sin límite de kilometraje, brindando tranquilidad y confianza a nuestros clientes.

En Mitsubishi Universidad, nos esforzamos por construir relaciones duraderas con nuestros clientes, basadas en la confianza y la satisfacción. Nuestro equipo de profesionales está dedicado a brindar asesoría personalizada y soluciones efectivas para cada situación.

Name: Jetonda Automobile Group Co., Ltd.
Description:
Jetonda Automobile Group Co., Ltd. is a group enterprise mainly engaged in investing in automobile 4S stores. Its main business is automobile sales, after-sales service, automobile parts, second-hand cars, parallel imported and exported cars, automobile leasing and so on, with a registered capital of 190 million yuan.

Since the operation of the first automotive 4S store in 2001, it has achieved high-quality development and become the leading Chinese automotive dealer. As of the end of 2024, the group has 152 subsidiaries ,including two second-hand car’s markets.  152 4S stores ,mainly in Tianjin and Yunnan, employs nearly 5000 employees, and serves nearly 1250 thousand car owners. In 2024, the operating revenue was nearly 14.2 billion yuan.

Jetonda auto group has operated 42 well-known domestic and foreign automotive brands,including BMW, Mercedes benz, Audi, Volkswagen, Toyota, together with most of China local EV brand. Jetonda Overseas division has already exported more than 5000 vehicles to Central Asia, Southeast of Asia and Middles east and Russia.

Jetonda New Energy Vehicle Mall is the largest comprehensive exhibition hall of new energy vehicles in the northern region, and has established cooperation with many mainstream new energy brands to provide users with a new experience of car buying, leisure and entertainment.

All 4S stores under Jetonda Group have vehicle testing, maintenance and service workshops, which have mature technical capabilities and perfect personnel allocation in vehicle maintenance. In good faith, the professional service concept is to achieve industrialisation.

After years of accumulation, the company has established cooperation exhibition halls in Kyrgyzstan, Belarus, UAE, Jordan ，Cambodia and north Africa. In the future, we will gradually plan to replicate the investment experience of Getonta 4S stores in China to overseas countries, build directly operated stores, and further expand the scale and quality of automobile exports

Name: Obis Dış Ticaret A.Ş.
Description:
OBİS Dış Ticaret; 1995 yılında İstanbul Aksaray’da merkez ofis, Topkapı’da yedek parça depo ve lojistik hizmetiyle, Volkswagen ve Audi otomobillerinin yedek parçalarının toptan ve perakende satışı ile sektöre adım atmıştır. Her yıl ürün çeşidine yeni ürünler ekleyerek ticari hayatındaki yükselişinin sinyallerini o yıllarda vermeye başlamıştır.
Volkswagen marka otomobillerin ülkemizde ve dünyada hızla marka trendini artırmasıyla otomotiv ana sanayi üreticileriyle distribütörlük anlaşmaları yapmıştır.

Ürün çeşitliliğine kalite ve en uygun fiyat anlayışını da ekleyerek uzman pazarlama ve satış ekibi ile ülkemizin tüm bölgelerinde toptan yedek parça satışına hız vermiştir.

 

OBİS, hızlı ve emin adımlarla büyüyerek müşterilerine daha iyi hizmet vermek ve taleplere daha hızlı cevap verebilmek adına sürekli yenilenmeyi kendisine hedef koyan bir firma olarak, zaman içinde aynı otomotiv grubuna ait Seat, Skoda, Porsche ve Opel araçlarının yedek parçalarını da bünyesine katarak 2015 yılında Anonim Şirket yapısına geçmiştir.

Günden güne zenginleşen ve yenilenen stok çeşidimiz, 7500m2 lik yedek parça depomuz, Türkiye’nin 81 ilinde; her bölgeye ait branşlarında uzman satış temsilcilerimiz, hızlı ve hatasız felsefesini ilke edinmiş depo çalışanlarımız ve güncel teknolojik altyapımız ve B2B sistemimizle müşterilerimize hizmet veriyoruz.


OBİS DIŞ TİCARET A.Ş. sektörde edindiği tecrübe ve bilgisiyle SWB AUTOPARTS adında bir marka oluşturarak, yan sanayi yedek parça sektöründe kalite, uygun fiyat, geniş stok yelpazesi ve uzman pazarlama stratejileriyle sizlere en iyi hizmeti vermeye devam ediyor.

Micfil Ultra Fine Filter 0.5 Micron adalah filter ultra filtrasi yang tujuannya untuk mendapatkan tingkat kebersihan BBM ataupun Oli (cleanliness) sesuai dengan apa yang dibutuhkan oleh aset/mesin/alat kerja yang mengacu kepada Standard Internasional ISO 4406, NAS ataupun SAE.

Kami memiliki produk untuk disewa/rental ataupun dengan skema BOT (Build Operation dan Transfer).

Sebagai Prinsipal di wilayah Asia kami terus mengembangkan kerjasama dengan reseler- reseller di seluruh Indonesia dan negara-negara Asia lainnya, dan sampai saat ini masih terbuka bagi yang berminat terhadap produk kami.

Name: VROEM
Description:
VROEM is hét platform voor iedereen die zijn auto snel, veilig en zonder gedoe wil verkopen. Autobezitters melden hun auto eenvoudig aan via onze website. Vervolgens zorgen wij ervoor dat de auto razendsnel wordt verkocht aan een betrouwbare autodealer uit ons uitgebreide netwerk.

Global customers partner with us as their  “Supply chain Global Competency Center“,  due to our commitment to personalized service for their unique and customized  requirements.

As a boutique International Purchasing Office (IPO), we elevate traditional procurement by integrating advanced supply chain management methodologies and a Center of Excellence approach.

Name: NECATİ KESER Petrol Ürünleri ve Otomotiv Sanayi A.Ş.
Description: Necati Keser Inc. is the exporter of leaf spring and leaf spring products group. With our over 40 years of experine and high stock, Necati Keser Inc is leading the leaf spring in Turkey. Our stock of leaf springs products group includes various OEM products like spring buffer, spring cushion, bracket, shackle, clutches, spring bush, rubber bushing-axle rod, spring suspension parts, ubolt ,shock absorber, air spring, bolt spring,nut-spring, mounting-spring, repair kit- spring ,pin-spring, bogie bearing,wear ring-bogie suspension, stabilizer bar-link, shock absorber. The parts range covers popular models of Mercedes (including Actros, Atego & Axor), Volvo, Scania, MAN, Renault, Iveco and DAF trucks & trailers such as BPW, ROR, SAF, York, etc. Necati Keser is already established experience in exporting, particulary Russia, Moscow, Ukraine, Syria, Iraq and Saudi Arabia. With the capacity to provide all your needs we are ready to doing business with you.

Name: Partstore
Description: Partstore, the leading destination for automotive enthusiasts and professionals alike, offers a comprehensive range of high-quality spare parts and accessories to cater to all your vehicle maintenance and repair needs. With a commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction, we've established ourselves as the go-to source for top-notch automotive components in the vibrant city of Dubai. Our extensive inventory covers everything from engine components and brake systems to electrical parts, suspension, and more. We understand the importance of quality and reliability when it comes to your vehicle, and that's why we meticulously source our products from reputable manufacturers and suppliers. With competitive pricing, expert guidance, and a user-friendly online shopping experience, Car Spare Parts Dubai is your reliable partner in ensuring the longevity and optimal performance of your vehicle. Trust us to provide you with the right spare parts and accessories, allowing you to drive with confidence on the roads of Dubai.

Name: Kora Cars
Description:
Kora is the only EU company specialised in sales of new and low-mileage Korean cars with a trusted representative in Korea and an own base with 100 parking spaces. Our team of 17 handles car search, inspection and preparation in Korea, as well as shipping, customs and registration in Europe. 

Korean cars boast a wide range of engines, endless interior options, latest safety features and best combinations of exterior colours, interior trims and wheels. These cars come at a relatively cheaper price than the models adapted for the EU, allowing you to buy a much better car for the same amount of money you would spend for a basic model in Europe. 

Are you looking to buy a higher-specification car with more interior and exterior options? Kora is your trusted go-to choice to get the best cars at a fair price. We handle import, logistics and registration of your new car so that you do not have to worry about anything.

Name: Mieloch Motocykle
Description:
We are a family-owned, multi-generation company born from a passion for motorcycles and motorsport. Since 1990, we have been developing the motorcycle, scooter, and maxiscooter parts market. We combine tradition with innovation - the distribution of premium brands with advanced e-commerce solutions. We supply both OEM components and tuning parts, supporting shops, workshops, and riders across Europe.

As the exclusive distributor of Malossi, Polini, Yasuni, Stage6, Motoforce, STR8, Giannelli, TNT, and Carenzi, we have built a strong position in the industry over the years. Our portfolio also includes manufacturers such as Athena, Airsal, Dell’Orto, Arrow, LeoVince, Galfer, Top Performances, Italkit, Jasil, RMS, Vicma, NGK, Motul, Castrol, Buzzetti and many more.

Our offer covers over 200,000 products - from original parts (Piaggio Group / Honda / Yamaha / Kawasaki / Suzuki) and maintenance components to high-performance tuning solutions. We support our B2B partners in stock planning, rotation management, and replacement part selection. We ensure fast delivery, full technical support, and comprehensive product data -  images, fitment details, and descriptions.

We combine family values with professionalism and technology that drive the growth of the motorcycle industry.

Mieloch Motocykle - a family passion driving motorcycling since 1990.

Name: Volt Auto
Description: Volt Auto is Jamaica’s premiere Japanese supplier of new and used auto parts for brands such as Honda, Mitsubishi, Subaru, Toyota, Mazda, Suzuki and more! Visit us today at Port Sea District, Red Bank, Junction.

Name: Fever Feld
Description: Soluções em logística e mobilidade urbana sustentáveis em Goiás e Distrito Federal

Name: Lada shop
Description:
We sell original Lada Parts (OEM) from Russia through internet (B2B & B2C) and have more than 40 years experience in the Lada parts business. 

Delivering from our warehouse in the Netherlands with good transport connections world wide. We import directly from the factory in Russia.

Name: BREACH AUTO
Description:
Breach Auto est une entreprise spécialisé dans la maintenance et la fourniture des pièces de rechange automobile (machineries) et entretiens de tous type d'automobiles, allant de véhicules passagers à des véhicules utilitaires et industriels. Nous sommes basées à Kolwezi en République Democratique du Congo, avec des representations à Likasi, Fungurume et Lubumbashi.

Nous avons prouvé notre résilience à nous adapter au marché. Notre expertise en la matière est sans doute notre plus grand atout.

Notre mission est d'être le fournisseur le plus fiable et polyvalent au Katanga et partout en RDC.
Servir les clients industriels et particuliers sur toute l'étendue de leurs besoins automobiles.
Vente en gros et fournitures d'accessoires automobiles.

Name: Kawasaki Heinrich
Description: Seit Generationen sind wir vertrauenswürdiger Ansprechpartner für alle Kawasaki Enthusiaten in der Region. Als traditioneller und moderner Familienbetrieb legen wir besonders Wert auf persönlichen Service und höchste Fachkompetenz.

Name: GTO MOTORS SRL
Description:
GTO MOTORS a Gerenzano in provincia di Varese, oltre alla vendita, può offrire ai suoi clienti ogni possibile servizio necessario al mantenimento, miglioramento e restauro di qualsiasi auto nuova, usata o d’epoca. Questo è possibile grazie alle sue specifiche e consolidate conoscenze acquisite nel tempo.

Con i nostri clienti condividiamo una passione molto forte che porta questi ad essere spesso molto informati e attenti. Questo ci obbliga, piacevolmente, ad offrire servizi di assoluta qualità, puntando al raggiungimento di un risultato al di sopra di ogni aspettativa. La qualificata competenza consolidata da una lunga esperienza e conoscenza del settore, ci permette di offrire una consulenza su ogni vettura, o singolo pezzo, di qualsiasi epoca. Il forte know-how garantisce, oltre al personale altamente preparato, un punto di assistenza all’avanguardia fornito di tutte le attrezzature specifiche e di sistemi di diagnosi di ultima generazione.

Name: Bodo Schmidt Motorsport
Description:
Unser Unternehmen wurde 1984 in Lebach gegründet. Seitdem wurden Marken wie Triumph, Ducati, Cagiva, Bimota und Suzuki angeboten. 1994 erfolgte die Erweiterung und Neueröffnung am heutigen Standort in Schmelz. Heute zieren KTM - seit 1996 das Flaggschiff der Firma Bodo Schmidt Motorsport - Kawasaki und Husqvarna die Ausstellungsflächen.

Wir bedanken uns für die Treue in den vergangenen Jahren und blicken gemeinsam in eine spannende Zukunft, geprägt von der Leidenschaft für den Motorsport.

Name: Prime Falcon Motors LLC
Description: Falcon Motors provide premium quality automobiles by making luxury affordable to a larger section of people. They deal with both pre-owned and new products thereby making luxury available to all their customers without compromising the quality of the product.

Name: IGM Repuestos
Description:
IGM Repuesto es una empresa dedicada a venta de repuestos al por mayor y al detalle, fue fundada en 2017 por David Melipil quien cuenta con más de 30 años de experiencia en la venta de repuestos. La sucursal se encuentra ubicada en Los Ángeles donde trabajamos repuestos de calidad y a precios altamente competitivos. Somos representantes de repuestos originales en marcas como KS y BF, también trabajamos repuestos alternativos en marca Mahle, Engine Parts, World American y otras, para que el cliente pueda elegir de acuerdo a sus gustos y presupuesto.


Nuestros clientes son variados, ya que atendemos a dueños de vehículos pequeños, transportistas, embarcaciones pesqueras, maquinarias forestales o de construcción, minería y otros distribuidores de repuestos. Estamos creciendo de forma acelerada pero de forma ordenada, logrando mayor disponibilidad de repuestos y mejorando la atención a nuestros clientes.



Proyectamos un aumento de personal, incorporando personal calificado a nuestro equipo y aumentando nuestra presencia en la web y en las diversas plataformas sociales.

Name: Mr Cylinder Head
Description:
We at Mr Cylinder Head are dedicated to providing you with premium quality engine parts at unbeatable prices. We have a huge range of engine parts including cylinder heads, timing belt kits, water pumps, gasket kits, head bolt kits, engine valves, pistons and rings, engine bearings and complete engine rebuild kits.

If there is an engine part you are looking for and you can’t find it then chances are we can find it for you.

We stand by all products we sell. We are upfront and always put the customer first. All our products are backed by a minimum of 12 months Australia Wide Warranty.

We have been in the engine rebuild industry for over 20 years and started selling quality engine parts online since 2009, We originally started as a small Ebay store but now our customer base has grown into the hundreds. To provide a more cost effective way for our consumers we started our own website so consumers can save even more.

Name: Top Notch Tyres (Uk) Ltd
Description:
Top-Notch Tyres are experts in automotive repair including puncture repairs, wheel balancing, and alignment, car servicing, brakes, and batteries. Our precise aim and business objective are to keep customer satisfaction sky high.

Our team is expert in automotive parts with over 20 years experience.

Name: Europe Fleet Bulgaria
Description:
Many small and medium-sized enterprises, such as car rentals, leasing companies and traders, require only a few vehicles for their business. These companies are unable to, by themselves, obtain attractive scale benefits in their vehicle
purchases. our varied selection and reasonable prices, and our uncomplicated service and complete one-stop solution for the supply and update of their fleet. Within a short time, we were able to establish Europe fleet Bulgaria as a fair and competent partner in the segment of small and medium-sized enterprises. We have a loyal partner base that grows almost daily through recommendations. Here is where Europe Fleet Bulgaria comes in, as a central purchasing company. We have a framework agreement with vehicle manufacturers based on our volume, and thus are able to offer vehicles under very attractive conditions.

Name: She Drives Limited Spec Autos
Description:
Founded in 2010, She Drives Limited Spec Autos has emerged as a beacon of innovation and sophistication in the global automotive landscape.  Rooted in excellence, the brand has carved a unique niche by blending cutting-edge technology with timeless design, redefining the luxury automotive experience for its discerning clientele. 

Over the past decade, She Drives Limited Spec Autos has achieved remarkable financial milestones, boasting annual revenue growth of 15% and an expanding footprint in premium markets worldwide. With a portfolio that includes some of the world’s most exclusive marques, the company has sold over 50,000 luxurious vehicles to date, catering to elite individuals, corporate fleets, and automotive collectors. Its focus on sustainability has further positioned the brand as a pioneer in green luxury, integrating electric and hybrid models into its offerings to meet the evolving demands of environmentally conscious consumers. 

Operationally, She Drives Limited Autos maintains state-of-the-art showrooms in major global cities and a seamless digital interface for a superior client experience. The company employs a team of 50 highly skilled professionals, from design consultants to technical experts, who ensure every vehicle delivered embodies perfection. Additionally, its partnership network with global automakers and financiers enhances customer accessibility to bespoke financing options and exclusive models. 

She Drives Limited Autos is more than a luxury car dealership—it is a lifestyle brand that symbolizes aspiration, performance, and elegance. From private VIP events to collaborations with philanthropic foundations, the company continually uplifts its community and supports future innovation in the automotive sector. 

Buggati leads the luxurious futuristic portfolio which Rolls-Royce Cullinan, Ghost, All Electric Spectre, Mercedes Benz G63s, BMWs. Every motor car sold at the Home of She Drives Limited Autos is an element of Bespoke Luxury.

Name: U-Haul Truck Parts & Truck Sales
Description: U-Haul Truck Sales has a wide selection of used box trucks, tow dollies, cab and chassis, and other vehicles for sale. Our trucks have been professionally maintained since day one, so you can be confident you’re purchasing a reliable used truck for business or personal use. We offer finance options to help you get the right equipment for your needs. We also have truck parts for sale to help you maintain your used box truck, cab, and chassis, or tow dolly.

Name: Megataller
Description:
En 2010 nace megataller.com, tienda online de recambios y accesorios para coche y moto. Desde nuestros inicios apostamos por el canal online, aspirando a convertirnos en la tienda online de referencia en el mercado español. Lo que en aquel entonces era un proyecto de futuro hoy es una realidad. Somos la tienda online con mayor número de referencias de recambios y accesorios para coche y moto en España. En nuestro catálogo contamos con más de 300.000 referencias de más de 250 marcas.

Nuestra filosofía de negocio es clara: poder ofrecer a nuestros clientes los mejores recambios, accesorios y herramientas a precios asequibles. Todo ello manteniendo el carácter del pequeño comercio, la cercanía con el cliente, el trato personalizado y un excelente servicio de asesoramiento pre y post venta, lo que nos ha permitido convertirnos en la web de venta online de recambios y accesorios de referencia en España.

Y todo esto gracias a la confianza depositada en nosotros y al esfuerzo de toda la gente que ha pasado por aquí para hacer que megataller.com fuera, sea y siga siendo la tienda de recambios y accesorios de referencia en España.
